GFH2_1.content:
1. You are the living God
Forevermore,
Of wonder and glory,
“I am that I am.”
Mid the Father, the Son,
And the Holy Spirit,
There’s interflow of love
before time began.

2. The Father and the Son and the Spirit,
Sweet and perfect in one, love boundless and deep.
Now I can partake such closest tie and love,
Drink from the highest love, my heart rests in peace.

3. O God, the First, the Last, great Your glory!
Yet You have thought of me since eternity.
How precious are Your thoughts, they outnumber the sand
Or the stars of heaven, all with love for me.

4. Through all eternity, You’re loving me,
Long that I’m joined to You, e’er in love abide.
Lord, You are my Beloved; Your heart , Your arm are mine,
Sharing Your everything, with me You desire.
GFH2_1.name: The Love of the Father, The Son And The Holy Spirit

referenceSongs.name: O Amor do Pai, Filho e Espírito Santo

GFH1_1.name: A Mighty Fortress Is Our God

SOL1_2.content:
1. Let's rejoice! He is risen!
Overcame Satan and death;
He swallowed up death, gives us glow-ing hope.
The glorious Lord rose from the dead,
For-ever we should rejoice!

2. My Jesus' tomb is empty,
He has overcome death,
Manifesting life incorruptible.
In life's journey, He walks with me,
He is my fountain of joy.

3. The risen Lord lives with me,
He clothes me with joy and smile.
He's my strength and drive, He's my sweet portion.
He lives in my heart; He's my Beloved;
With Him, life is warm and sweet.

4. The risen Lord is like the dawn,
Like the dew in the bright morn.
He is my Beloved; He's my closest Friend,
Joined in spirit, we live in love;
Life is meaningful and sweet.

5. The risen Lord is full of power,
But He is kind and gentle.
He shattered my doubts, wiped away my tears;
His love's appearance, I so relish.
My dear Lord, may You come soon.

6. Let's rejoice! He is risen! *(Ha! Ha!)*
*(O that glorious dawn!)*
He conquered Satan and death, *(Ha! Ha!)*
Broke the bar of death, brought us light and hope.
*(O death, where is your victory?)*
*(O death, where is your sting?)*
"The glorious Lord rose from the dead!"
What a glorious news of joy! *(Ha! Ha!)*
*(Hallelujah!)*
SOL1_2.name: The Adorable and Captivating Risen Lord

SOL2_2.content:
He became flesh, dwelt among men.
He's full of grace and full of truth.
His glory shone in this dark world.
He is so good; He is all fair.

2. My gracious Lord sojourned on earth.
He had no place to lay His head.
He is the light shines in darkness,
Righteous among the unrighteous.

3. Man of sorrows, for all His life,
He was reviled, acquaint'd with grief.
My Lord humbled Himself and walked
On the path of self-denial.
SOL2_2.name: Love Journey of the Lord—from Infant to Adult

referenceSongs.name: Jornada de Amor- de Bebê até Adulto

SOL3_2.content:
At the Lamb's wedding feast,
Your manifold glorious light
Shines forth, surrounding me.
My heart is drawn by You!
The joy of that moment of love
Will last throughout eternity.
Such stunning love expression
Is revealed throughout all time!
The joyous wedding feast may pass
But love endures and grows.
And in a flash I see
The depths of Your heart.
I am amazed! Forever I'm amazed!
I'll keep discov'ring Your love fore'er.
We walk this path of love hand in hand,
Enthralled in this love river evermore!
SOL3_2.name: The Wedding Feast of the Lamb

HC1_2.content:
1. I know sin is not good. I don't want to sin.
I have received Jesus
And become a new creation.
Old things have passed away. All things have become new.
I will walk with the Lord. By Him I'll do my best.

2. It is best to love God, to be close to Him,
And I love what God loves.
I want to follow His word.
Now is better. Life is wonderful with Him.
I'm a new creation. I enjoy heav'nly blessings.
HC1_2.name: By Him, I'll Do My Best

referenceSongs.name: By Him, I'll do my best

HC2_2.content:
I long for You! I long for You!
My Love, my King, my life, my song.
I long for You! My Morning Star,
To walk with me, to stay with me.

2. I long for You! I long for You!
My Love, my King, my life, my song.
I long for You! My Morning Star,
To take me home, to take me home.

3. I long for You! I long for You!
My Love, my King, my life, my song.
I long for You! My Morning Star,
Come, to take me into glory!
HC2_2.name: I Long For You

GFH2_3.content:
Before time began was salvation grace
Given to me in Christ Jesus.
From e’erlasting, He’s thought of me.
Such love draws me, com-forts my soul.

2. What length, breadth, height and depth, 
Lord, is Your love!
Gives me warmth, melts my heart each passing hour.
My soul adores, flows endless praise.
Your bands of love draws me to You.
GFH2_3.name: Grace Before Time Began
tags: The Lord Came From Heaven to Earth

SOL2_3.content:
The morn light shines on this sleeping land,
Awakens thousand souls.
God's great love vast as the boundless ocean;
Deep in you, deep in me, the same we feel:
His love perfect and true.
Let us grow together,
With our songs send off the winter,
Vines giving fragrance,
Voice of turtle doves has been heard.
Let us rise, and say goodbye
To all fancies, pride, and sighs;
To the promised land,
Fairest resting place, let us strive!

2. Why stay in dreams of passing splendors?
Soon they'll all disappear!
Oh my dear, don't look back and keep sighing;
Bear in mind Jesus Christ's precious calling.
Pursue with all your strength.
Come along! Come along!
Take the task upon your shoulders.
Keep our faith in Him.
Let all hardships be turned to power!
Come along! Come along!
Take the task upon your shoulders.
With our hearts steadfast
Let's strive for His will together.
Come along! Come along!
SOL2_3.name: Take up the Task

GFH1_3.content:
1. O Lord of heaven and earth and sea,
To Thee all praise and glory be;
How shall we show our love to Thee
Who givest all?

2. For health and home and lengthened days,
For all the blessings earth displays,
Our God, we owe Thee thanks and praise,
Who givest all.

3. Thou didst not spare Thine only Son,
But gav’st Him for a world undone,
And freely with that blessed One
Thou givest all.

4. For souls redeemed, for sins forgiven,
For present grace and hopes of heaven,
Father, what can to Thee be given,
Who givest all?

5. We lose what on ourselves we spend;
We have as treasure without end
Whatever, Lord, to Thee we lend,
Who givest all.
GFH1_3.name: O Lord Of Heaven And Earth And Sea

HC1_3.content:
1. O' God, You created all things,
And they exist by Your will.
All things have their purpose.
All things are beautiful.
They're well designed by God.

2. O' God, You created all things,
Everything's beautiful in its time.
You've made all things in order.
Nothing happens by chance.
You make all work for Your will.

3. O' God, You've seen us from afar,
And You know our every thought.
Your love is personal;
You guide us with care.
You make all things work for our good.

4. O' God, strengthen our faith in You.
We don't argue; we have no doubts.
May we give thanks and obey;
We say "Yes" to Your plan,
And trust all You arrange for us.
HC1_3.name: Fully Trust and Obey

HC2_3.content:
There's a land that is fairer than day,
And by faith we can see it afar;
For the Father waits over the way,
To prepare us a dwelling place there.

Chorus:
In the sweet by and by,
We shall meet on that beautiful shore;
In the sweet by and by,
We shall meet on that beautiful shore.

2. We shall sing on that beautiful shore,
The melodious songs of the blest;
And our spirits shall sorrow no more,
Not a sigh for the blessing of rest.

3. To our bountiful Father above,
We will offer the tribute of praise;
For the glorious gift of His love,
And the blessings that hallow our days.
HC2_3.name: Sweet By and By

SOL1_4.content:
His personal love to me,
*(Your personal love to me,)*
Pure, undying to the end.
Great floods cannot quench it;
Time, ev'n years, can't make it fade,
Withstands var-ious trials and tests;
It never fails my heart to gain.

2. His personal love to me,
Is my drive through all my life.
When I'm despaired, His love comforts me;
His love overcomes all things.
Rich, colorful, tender and soft,
I'll boast of His love forever.

3. His personal love to me,
Sweet and warm and gives me hope,
Shares in my life's sorrows and joy,
Gives me courage and gives me faith,
Fills my heart like a living spring,
In His bosom may I e'er stay!

4. His personal love to me,
Makes the angels admire, amaze.
Deeper than the sea, higher than the sky,
His love paves my path of life.
Grace upon grace I can't number,
Beyond compare, no else to find.
SOL1_4.name: The Lord’s Personal Love to Me

GFH2_4.content:
1. God’s beloved Son came from heaven to earth,
His name is Jesus,
Dwelt among men with glory,
Full of grace, full of truth.
From heaven to earth He came to bring me
Back to the Father’s fold.

2. God’s beloved Son came from heaven to earth,
Was in a manger born.
He bore all sorrows for me.
He walked to the cross for me.
God’s beloved Son came from heaven to earth;
He gave Himself for me.

3. God’s beloved Son came from heaven to earth,
To fight battles for me.
Destroyed the works of Satan,
He took away all my sins.
From heaven to earth He came to bring me
Out of death into life.

4. God’s beloved Son came from heaven to earth,
Forever He is man.
He is so kind and friendly.
What love and warmth He gives me!
God’s beloved Son came from heaven to earth,
His great love melts my heart.
GFH2_4.name: He Came From Heaven To Earth
tags: The Lord Came From Heaven to Earth

referenceSongs.name: Ele veio do céu a terra

GBH_4.content:
1. My Abba stretches out His hands, 
invites me gladly to join
The most joyous Holy Trinity's 
eternal dance of love.
Such joy's beyond all dreams! 
Such love's above all thoughts!
I'm embraced in Your warmest circle of love. 
My bliss and joy overflow.

2. Abba, You stretch out Your hands, 
invites me gladly to join
With You, the Lord and the Spirit, 
Your eternal dance of love.
Such joy's beyond all dreams! 
Such love's above all thoughts!
I now enter Your circle of love. 
My bliss and joy overflow.

3. Into Your fellowship of joy, 
I'm embraced with tender love.
As I join in Your dance of love, 
my bliss and joy overflow.
Such joy's beyond all dreams! 
Such love's above all thoughts!
Most blessed am I in the universe. 
I'm treasured in the depth of Your heart!
GBH_4.name: Eternal Dance of Love

SOL3_4.content:
1. Abba, You sent your Son -
Your only begotten Son.
He came to earth, became flesh,
Fore'er a man for me!
Abba, You have made an oath.
You'll never, never relent.
And You have ordained Him
As my High Priest fore'er.
You sent You only Son
To come down from heaven to earth,
To live for me and die for me.
Fore'er He lives for me

2. You have brought me to You,
Forever perfect, complete,
To enter the depths of
Your warmest, fairest heart!
For Your beloved only Son,
A wedding feast You've prepared.
You gave me to You Son
To be His sweet darling love.
I'm His and He is mine.
Forever we're joined as one.
With Him I'll inherit all!
Fore'er He lives for me
SOL3_4.name: A Never-Relenting Oath

referenceSongs.name: 起誓、永不後悔、烈焰愛的決定
Juramento, não se Arrependerá da Decisão do Amor Fervente

SOL2_5.content:
I surrender my all to satisfy You, Lord.
Though rugged is the way, follow the trails of Your flock.
Every step as I see more my weakness,
I will praise Your love more and more.
Your banner over me is love. I'm conquered.
You are my heart's desire, I lay down riches and fame.
You are full of grace; Your bosom's my resting place.
Lord, put me like a seal over Your heart.
Put me like a seal upon Your arm.
For love is as strong as death. All the world can't replace.
O' Lord, I long for You, to see Your glorious face.
Take up my cross today,
Till You come I'll watch and wait.
SOL2_5.name: Lord, I Surrender All

GFH1_5.content:
1. Blessed be God, our God!
Who gave for us His well-beloved Son,
The gift of gifts, all other gifts in one;
Blessed be God, our God!

2. What will He not bestow?
Who freely gave this mighty gift, unbought,
Unmerited, unheeded, and unsought;
What will He not bestow?

3. He spared not His Son!
‘Tis this that silences each rising fear,
‘Tis this that bids the hard thought disappear;
He spared not His Son!

4. ‘Tis God that justifies!
Who shall recall His pardon or His grace?
Or who the broken chain of guilt replace?
‘Tis God that justifies!

5. The victory is ours!
For us in might came forth the Mighty One,
For us He fought the fight, the triumph won,
The victory is ours!
GFH1_5.name: Blessed Be God, Our God

HC1_5.content:
I didn't want to be trapped,
But temptations closed me in.
I didn't want to fail and fall,
But I was very weak.
without physical chains,
I was bound by sins.
O' Please come to help me!
Please come to save me!
God always loves me;
He knows all my struggles.
A Saviour He sent to me,
Paid the ransom for me.
Hallelujah! I am out of bondage!
O' My Lord loves me! He came to save me!
No more load of sin! Now I am set free!
I'm out of the darkness into the marvelous light!
HC1_5.name: Glorious Freedom! I am Free from Sin!

HC2_5.content:
Give me this land! Give me this land!
Giants, dangers, I despise all.
Rugged pathways, the Lord is with me.
Until we reach the peaks and sing.
HC2_5.name: Caleb's Song

SOL1_6.content:
1. O' my Beloved so glorious,
He is above all things.
His love to me is high and deep
Throughout eternity.
To gain my heart He became flesh.
For many years He suffered much.
He did love me and die for me.
He desires me.

2. O' my Beloved, His fervent love
Is like flashes of fire.
Many waters cannot quench love.
His love is stronger than death.
All things may change, His love's the same.
His love to me is ever fresh.
He lives with me from dawn to dusk.
He desires me.

3. O' my Beloved loves me deeply.
He suffered all for me.
My eyes of faith capture His heart,
And make His heart beat faster.
I'm His darling, His dearest one.
He shouts for joy, dances for me,
Quiets for me; His heart is filled.
He desires me.

4. O' my Beloved His tender love
Satisfies all my heart.
He is the myrrh between my breasts
That heals the wounds of my heart.
His love gives me joy, rest and peace,
He draws me. I overcome the world.
He gives me faith to pass through all.
I desire Him!
SOL1_6.name: The Love of the Beloved

GFH2_6.content:
Gazes upon the earth, the hea’en above,
Yet the earth has never cared.
But today, dear Lord, it’s so different now,
Through heaven and earth 
Your love is shown.

Looking up, run my tears, 
‘cause You’ve once left there,
And now again You are there.
Why should the heaven 
bow to kiss the earth?
Why should it shelter the earth?

If You were the clouds up high,
I could only be a small grass down on earth.
Yet the clouds turn to rain, showering down,
To nourish my whole life.

Never dared I to dream of the things above,
But today I am seated in heaven with You.
Tis too good to be true, 
yet this message from You,
Is the best that’s ever come true.
GFH2_6.name: The Love Song Of Heaven And Earth
tags: The Lord Came From Heaven to Earth

referenceSongs.name: Poema de amor do céu e da terra

GBH_6.content:
1. More than fearfully created, 
I was born again of God.
Now my life is joined to His life; 
such love bond satisfies me.
Born of God! Wonderful! 
Born of God! Wonderful!
He's my true eternal Abba! 
I'm His darling child, His joy!

2. Such love's miracle amazes me, 
manifests Your love and pow'r.
O such deepest tie and love bond 
satisfies Your heart and mine.
Born of God! Wonderful! 
Born of God! Wonderful!
I'm the fellow heir with Jesus; 
I'll inherit all with Christ,
Reign with Him forevermore. 
Wonderful! Wonderful!
GBH_6.name: Born of God

SOL3_6.content:
1. Your jealousy is fierce as the grave!
Your love to me is like flames of fire!
You long for me to set my love on You.
Your love has overcome pains and trials!
Every barrier torn down,
Every idol destroyed,
Clouds and shadows removed,
You have vanquished all foes!
Your love conquered all,
Triumphed over all things.
Your love banner flies over me.

2. Your desire and love began before time!
Your love thoughts outnumber sands and all stars!
Your love of the cross is stronger than death!
You leapt over mountains to see my face.
You request to hear my voice.
Your love I can't forget.
Lord I relish Your love.
Your affections fill my soul!
Draw me to a secret place.
We'll be face to face, heart to heart.
May Your banner fly over me,
Fly over my heart evermore!
SOL3_6.name: Your Jealousy of Love is Unyielding as the Grave

referenceSongs.name: 愛的嫉恨如陰間的殘忍
O Ciúme do Amor mais Duro que a Sepultura

HC2_6.content:
Deeper than the sea, high'r than the sky,
Before time began, with no end,
Is Your tender love. The stars bear witness.
The sand tells Your boundless love.

2. Deeper than the sea, high'r than the sky -
Your love covers all my guilts removes all my shadows.
I have no doubts and fears
I can rest in Your bosom.

3. Deeper than the sea, high'r than the sky -
Your love uplifts my failing heart.
You light up my life. With passion I will shine.
I will march forward bravely.

4. Deeper than the sea high'r than the sky -
Your love has conquered my heart.
It's my longing, desire, my joy, delight and rest,
My song and my sweet though.

5. Deeper than the sea, high'r than the sky -
Your love's banner flies over me.
You are my love, my life, my dream and my vision.
You are the center of my life.

6. Deeper than the sea, high'r than the sky -
Your love's better than all my dreams.
You are my true Beloved. Your love touches my heart.
I sing songs of love for You.
HC2_6.name: Your Love is Higher than the Heaven

SOL2_7.content:
To the Mountain of Myrrh,
I will taste death for you;
To the Hill of Frankincense,
I'll pray for you, bless you.
Until the day breaks,
The shadows flee away,
I will return and take you
To our sweet home above.

2. Lord Jesus, I love You,
On earth I live for You.
On this path of suffering,
I will never turn back.
Oh my Beloved,
May "the day" soon come!
When the shadows flee away,
You will receive me home!

3. Hurry my Beloved,
Leaping like a gazelle,
On the mountains of spices.
You will come soon, come soon.
My bright morning Star,
The night is far spent.
May You return from the blue,
Take me into glory.
SOL2_7.name: Mountain of Myrrh, Hill of Frankincense

GFH1_7.content:
1. To God be the glory, great things He hath done,
So loved He the world that He gave us His Son,
Who yielded His life an atonement for sin,
And opened the Life-gate that all may go in.

*Refrain:
Praise the Lord, praise the Lord,
Let the earth hear His voice!
Praise the Lord, praise the Lord,
Let the people rejoice!
O come to the Father, thro’ Jesus the Son,
And give Him the glory,
great things He hath done.*

2. O perfect redemption, the purchase of blood,
To ev’ry believer the promise of God;
The vilest offender who truly believes,
That moment from Jesus a pardon receives.

*Refrain:
Praise the Lord, praise the Lord,
Let the earth hear His voice!
Praise the Lord, praise the Lord,
Let the people rejoice!
O come to the Father, thro’ Jesus the Son,
And give Him the glory,
great things He hath done.*

3. Great things He hath taught us,
Great things He hath done,
And great our rejoicing thro’ Jesus the Son;
But purer, and higher, and greater will be
Our wonder, our transport, when Jesus we see.

*Refrain:
Praise the Lord, praise the Lord,
Let the earth hear His voice!
Praise the Lord, praise the Lord,
Let the people rejoice!
O come to the Father, thro’ Jesus the Son,
And give Him the glory,
great things He hath done.*
GFH1_7.name: To God Be The Glory

HC1_7.content:
It's so wonderful when we come together!
See your face; let you hear my voice.
We are close together, warm and sweet.
Pray to Him, sing songs to Him, read His word,
Draw close to Him and we feel so sweet.
Come, O' brothers!
Come, O' sisters!
Together we come before Him.
We offer our hearts to Him.
HC1_7.name: God's Happy Family

GFH2_8.content:
From heaven, Lord, You came.
It makes me so amazed.
You were mocked and despised,
yet Your love was still the same.
E’en Your brothers’ sneers could not quench Your love,
Men’s indifference showed more Your love of endurance.
The world forsook You, and cried, “Away with Him!”
You were steadfast, walked to Calvary!
Wondrous Cross! Wondrous Cross!
Vast forgiveness and bountiful grace flowing from the cross!
Love as flashes of fire, as the flame of God!
Your fervent love to men makes me ever amazed, adore!
GFH2_8.name: The Love Of Endurance

GBH_8.content:
I am amazed I affect You most!
You've thought of me from eternity past.
For me, You sent Your beloved Son from Heaven,
And He gave Himself for me on the cross.
Abba, Your beautiful heart
Was pierced through with arrows!
O glorious! The Lord cried out,
"It is finished!"
The veil was rent; You ran to me,
Embraced me to Your heart, covered me with kisses,
Rested on my neck; You're overjoyed!
Your love dream's gloriously fulfilled!
La La La La La La La La La La La La La La La La La
You prepared a rich feast; You sang and danced!
You shouted for joy over me. Your heart was filled;
Embracing me, You're ravished in love!
I am amazed: infinite You are,
Out of love, You need me most!
Yearning for me to be close to You,
Hand in hand You and I live in love.
GBH_8.name: Who Affects the Father Most

SOL3_8.content:
I appeared out of Your love.
I'll fore'er exist for You.
You're the myrrh upon my heart.
You're the purpose of my life.
You're more precious than love and life.
I exist fore'er for You.

2. From of old, You've longed for me.
I am Your eternal love.
I’m the secret of Your love
Hidden deeply in Your heart.
You and I embrace forever.
To each other we belong.

3. Whom have I in heaven but You?
I desire none else on earth.
You’re my fountain, living spring!
Only You can fill my heart!
You’re my only rest and home.
May my heart be Yours fore’er!
In Your bosom I'll abide.
SOL3_8.name: I Appeared Out of Your Love

HC1_8.content:
O' God, You wrote me this long love letter
To tell me Your love so very deep.
O' God, You wrote me this long love letter
To show me Your grace so very rich.

2. O' God, You wrote me this long love letter
To give me Your light in my heart.
O' God, You wrote me this long love letter
To brighten all my life journey.

3. O' God, I come, I come to You
To enjoy Your precious word.
Draw me nearer, nearer to You.
O' God, I love You!
HC1_8.name: God Wrote Me a Long Love Letter

HC2_8.content:
Stay before Him, in the light of His face.
In His presence enjoy the good portion.
Draw near to Him - It is your daily need.
Let nothing take away your good part.

Chorus:
Stay before Him. See His glory.
The Holy Spirit will mould you.
Draw near to Him; He'll draw near to you.
I long to be with Him always.

2. Stay before Him, in the light of His face.
Receive His words, let His love fill your heart.
You're drawn by Him, away from all your cares.
Draw near to Him, enjoy a world of two.

3. Stay before Him, in the light of His face.
Pour out your heart and sing love songs to Him.
He's your best friend. Tell Him your sorrow and joy.
Live in sweet love with Him and share your all.
HC2_8.name: Stay Before the Lord

referenceSongs.name: Permanecer diante da Face Cheia de Amor

SOL1_9.name: March on by Faith

SOL2_9.content:
My eyes of faith behold
The Lamb once slain for me 
Covered with wounds!
You suffered much for me;
You long to see my face.
I should love You always,
Cherish Your face!

2. My eyes of faith behold
The risen, good Shepherd 
With mighty pow'r!
You're with me all my days
Through trials, flood and flames.
I will be strong and brave, rejoice always.

3. My eyes of faith behold
My Beloved in glory 
With love and grace!
You set me on Your heart,
Think of me day and night.
In Your bosom I'll stay, rest with delight.

4. My eyes of faith behold
My Bridegroom coming soon 
Full of glory!
You'll take me by Yourself,
To be with You always.
I'll watch and wait for Your glorious coming!
SOL2_9.name: My Eyes of Faith Behold

GFH1_9.content:
1. “Abba, Father,” We approach Thee
In our Saviour’s precious name.
We Thy children here assembling,
Now the promised blessing claim.
From our guilt His blood has washed us,
‘Tis thro’ Him our souls draw nigh.
And the Spirit too has taught us
“Abba, Father,” thus to cry.

2. Once as prodigals we wandered,
In our folly, far from Thee;
But Thy grace, o’er sin abounding,
Rescued us from misery.
Clothed in garments of salvation,
At Thy table is our place;
We rejoice, and Thou rejoicest,
In the riches of Thy grace.

3. Thou the prodigal hast pardoned,
“Kissed us” with a Father’s love;
Killed the fatted calf, and want us
E’er to dwell with Thee above.
“It is meet,” we hear Thee saying,
“We should merry be and glad;
I have found My once-lost children,
Now they live who once were dead.”

4. “Abba, Father,” we adore Thee,
While the hosts in heaven above
E’en in us now learn the wonders
Of Thy wisdom, grace, and love.
Soon before Thy throne assembled,
All Thy children shall proclaim
Abba’s love as shown in Jesus,
And how full is Abba’s name!
GFH1_9.name: “Abba, Father,” We Approach Thee

HC1_9.content:
1. Heaven is a good place.
My dear Lord has prepared for me
A beautiful city, a beautiful home.
La la la la la la la la,
God and I will live forever together.

2. Heaven is a good place.
Each one is shining in this royal family.
Having sweet fellowship, we praise one another.
La la la la la la la la,
You and I will live in love together.

3. Heaven is a good place.
Every day is rich and abundant:
Endless discoveries, new activities.
La la la la la la la la,
God and we will have lots of fun together.
No eye has seen, no ear has heard,
No mind has conceived,
The most beautiful heaven,
The home of you and me!
HC1_9.name: Heaven is a Good Place

SOL1_10.content:
You are worthy to take the scroll,
And to open its seals; for You were slain,
And have redeemed us to God by Your blood out of every tribe
and tongue and people and nation, and have made us kings
And priests to our God; and we shall reign on the earth.
Then I looked, and I heard the voice of many angels
Around the throne, th' living creatures,
And the elders; and the number
Of them was thousand of thousand, saying
With a loud voice, "Worthy is the Lamb"
Who was slain to receive power,
Riches, wisdom, might, honour, glory, and blessing!"
And every created thing which is in heaven, on the earth
And un-der the earth and in the sea, and all in them,
I heard saying, "Blessing and honour and glory and pow'r
To Him who sits on the throne,
And to the Lamb forever!"
SOL1_10.name: The Lamb Who was Slain

GFH2_10.content:
1. Lord Jesus, You once gave Yourself for me.
Once You poured out Your life freely for me;
Walked up to Golgotha, You were hung on the tree,
Blood and water came out, all for me.

2. Lord Jesus, You suffered so much for me.
For me You bore those stripes in your body;
You are God, yet for me, were despised by the world.
That I might gain You. Thank You, Lord.

3. O Lord Jesus, whom my soul loves!
Now and ever, You abide in my heart;
Precious indwelling, union forever!
Nothing can keep You and me apart.

4. Storms and waves may come to me all the way,
But all these just urge me to draw near You;
Lord, I’m glad to abide in Your bosom of love,
And respond to You with all my life.
GFH2_10.name: All For Me

GBH_10.content:
1. A father of the fatherless,
a defender of widows,
Is God in His holy dwelling,
looking after the helpless.
God makes the lonely ones
to live in a home of love.
God makes the lonely ones
to live in His warm family.
From eternity He desires me to be
His bosom darling child!

2. Now He's my dearest Abba,
my eternal Father!
O I'm His joy, His darling child,
fellow heir with Christ forever.
As He loves His beloved Son,
He loves me with the highest love!
I can face the world with Abba,
rejoice daily in His love.
I can dance and shout for victory,
sweetly rest in His warm bosom!

3. Now You're my dearest Abba,
my eternal Father!
O I'm Your joy, Your darling child,
fellow heir with Christ forever.
As You love Your beloved Son,
You love me with the highest love!
I can face the world with You Abba,
rejoice daily in Your love.
I can dance and shout for victory,
sweetly rest in Your warm bosom!
GBH_10.name: Father of the Fatherless

SOL3_10.content:
I did not appear by chance. I exist for You!
I am reserved for You.
Since time of old, I am Your love dream,
Your first and only love, and Your eternal love!
How precious You're my all knowing
Beloved of manifold love!
And I am Your eternal love,
Your most loved, well-suited bride!
Your matchless, fairest love, eternal love
Is forever mine!
You, the glorious, boundless Lord, belong to me!
You've committed Yourself
Forever to Your darling love!
SOL3_10.name: I Did Not Appear By Chance

HC2_10.content:
O' God, preserve me, preserve me,
For I take refuge in You.
O' my soul, you have said to the Lord,
"You are my Lord. I have no good besides You."
The saints in the earth are the fairest one
In whom is all my delight.
Those run after another god,
The sorrows of them shall be multiplied.
O' Lord, You are my chosen portion.
You are my cup. You hold my lot.
You support my lot.
The lines have fallen unto me
In the pleasant places.
My heritage is beautiful.
I will bless the Lord who have given me counsel.
Indeed my heart instructs me in the night.
I have set the Lord always before me.
I have set Him before me.
Because He is at my right hand,
I will not be moved. I will not be shaken.
My heart is glad, my glory rejoices.
My flesh will dwell steadfastly in hope.
My flesh will rest in hope.
For You will not leave my soul
In sheol, in sheol.
Nor will You allow Your Holy One
To see corruption or to undergo decay.
You will show me the path of life.
In Your presence is fullness of joy.
At Your right hand are pleasures forever,
Pleasures forever.
HC2_10.name: The Beautiful Journey of the Son of Man

SOL2_11.content:
Yesterday, today, forever,
Jesus is the same;
All may change, but Jesus never!
Glory to His name!
Glory to His name!
Glory to His name!
All may change, but Jesus never!
Glory to His name!
SOL2_11.name: Yesterday, Today, Forever

HC1_11.content:
1. Lord, You command'd us to go to
The corners of the world
To preach the good news to all nations.
You desire all to be saved.

Chorus:
Lord, I love You.
I follow You.
Lord, I love You.
I'll bring many to follow You.

2. Lord, You command'd us to baptize many
In the name of the Father
And of the Son and of the Spirit.
You desire all to be Yours.

Chorus:
Lord, I love You.
I follow You.
Lord, I love You.
I'll bring many to follow You.

3. Lord, You command'd us to make disciples
To teach them to keep all the commandments
You desire all to be close to You,
To walk on the righteous path.

Chorus:
Lord, I love You.
I follow You.
Lord, I love You.
I'll bring many to follow You.
HC1_11.name: I am the Lord's Disciple

SOL1_12.content:
‘Tis the most pleasant home, the desire of God and man,
Full of fragrance of love, songs of joy everywhere;
A home of warmth and grace, ov’rflowing rivers of joy,
The peaceful dwelling place of God and man forever.
Home, sweet, sweet home!
The hearts of God and man become one in this sweet home.

2. Through all eternity, in God’s plan, “home” is the core,
The Father, the Son and the Spirit gave all for this.
The Lord came to the earth and was nailed upon the cross.
God’s heart was pierced. He gave His all for me.
Home, sweet, sweet home!
This is my vision, my goal, my dream and my rest.

3. Through all eternity, the myst’ry of all ages
Has been revealed to me, I’ve found the greatest treasure.
Now, I have understood “Myst’ry of the Universe,”
I have the goal of life, ‘tis my hope and ‘tis my aim.
Home, sweet, sweet home!
The hearts of God and man are fully satisfied.

4. Through all eternity, and throughout the universe,
Only in this home God and man can be at rest.
God’s house is bountiful – rivers of joy, fount of life,
This household reveals God’s glory and beauty.
Home, sweet, sweet home!
God’s infinite fullness overflows from this household.

5. Gone all sorrows and sighs! Comes this home down on new earth!
No more grief and pain! God wipes away every tear.
His tab’nacle’s with men, His love flows to all the earth;
The city of clear gold shines forth beams of jasper.
Home, sweet, sweet home!
The masterpiece of God, the model of His love.

6. The place of God and man – the city of clear gold,
Founded on precious stones, and pearls as its welcome gates.
Each one is radiant in this Royal family.
The city lights up the new heaven and new earth.
Home, sweet, sweet home!
The vast ocean of grace ripples with waves of love.
SOL1_12.name: Home, Sweet Home

GFH2_12.content:
1. Not that I loved the Lord Jesus,
But He has loved me first,
Dying for me on Calvary,
Bearing all my sins for me.

2. My Lord’s love is as strong as death,
Fervent as burning flame.
Waters, great waters cannot quench;
All treasures cannot replace.
GFH2_12.name: The Love Of The Cross

GBH_12.content:
1. Can a woman forget her nursing child, 
forget her nursing child,
That she should have no compassion 
on the son of her womb?
Yes, these may forget, forget, 
yet I will not forget you.
Behold, I have engraved you 
upon the palms of My hands!

2. Yes, I've loved you with everlasting love, 
you'll be ever on My mind.
I will never leave you, nor forsake you; 
I will carry you through life.
How happy! I have God Himself 
as my Father eternally.
When I'm fatherless or motherless, 
Yahweh will take care of me.

3. He loves me as He loves His only Son, 
He loves me with the highest love!
His thoughts of love, more than sands or stars, 
O He even numbers my hairs.
How happy now He's my Abba, 
and forever I'm His darling child.
O Father and son walk hand in hand, 
journey on endless glorious path!
GBH_12.name: I'll Never Forget You

SOL2_12.content:
I behold the bright Morning Star.
I'll leave this world, heaven to go.
Dark is the world, the night's far spent.
Bright Morning Star, I long for You.

2. I can see the finish line.
I'll run the course, steadfast I'll go.
Short is the time. God's will be done.
Forget the past, march on forward.

3. I see the church will be finished.
With diligence, I'll serve my Lord.
Things of this world will pass away.
My labour is never in vain.

4. I can see the Lord's coming soon.
In Him, I will trust and obey.
Say no to sin, endure all trials.
You will dry my tears when You come.

5. I can see the crowns and rewards.
I'll gladly bear shame for the Lord.
Take up my cross, follow the Lord.
I wait for His praises with joy.

6. I can see the coming glory.
I'll despise all trials and pain.
Light affliction's working for us
The eternal weight of glory.

7. I can see my heavenly home.
As a pilgrim, I live on earth.
This world has no lasting city.
A fairer home's prepared for me.
SOL2_12.name: The Bright Morning Star

GFH1_12.content:
1. Father, ‘twas Your love that knew us,
Earth’s foundation long before;
That same love to Jesus drew us,
By its sweet constraining pow’r
And will keep us, and will keep us,
Safely now, and evermore.
Safely now and evermore.

2. Now that changeless love enfolds us,
All its wealth on us bestows,
While its pow’r unchanging holds us
In a holy calm repose.
Oh, dear Father, Oh, dear Father
Unto You our worship flows,
Unto You our worship flows.

3. ‘Tis the Father’s tender mercy
That doth cause me to rejoice;
And myself am given wholly
As a son thro’ God’s own Choice.
God so loves us! God so loves us!
That He gave us His dear Son!
That He gave us His dear Son!

4. God of love, our souls adore You!
We would still Your grace proclaim,
Till we cast our crowns before You,
And in glory praise Your name;
Praise and worship, Praise and worship,
Be to God and to the Lamb!
Be to God and to the Lamb!
GFH1_12.name: “Father, ‘Twas Your Love That Knew Us”

SOL3_12.content:
You love me eternally
Like there's none else on earth.
Everything manifests
Your abundant love for me.
I am Your first love.
I am Your eternal love.
From of old, I've been Your love dream.
We'll live through this endless dream
Forevermore
My heart's ever tied to Your heart.
I'm the seal ever set on Your heart.
I'm Your heart's most cherished one!
SOL3_12.name: I Am Your First And Eternal Love

GFH2_13.content:
1. “Away with Him!”‚ cried men on earth.
They drove the Lord out of the gate.
Wounded He bore the cross for me,
To Golgotha bled all the way.

2. Though He was rich; He became poor
Even His clothes cast lots they took.
All thro’ His life, weary and sore,
In manger born, died on the cross.

3. His hands were nailed; His feet were pierced,
Hung on the tree, dreadfully cursed.
His blood flowed down, bones could be counted,
Tongue cleaved to jaws, heart melted like wax.

4. “Fountain of Life‚” said, “I’m thirsty.”
From lake of fire, He did save me.
God’s beloved Son, by God forsaken.
Lonely, He tasted death for me.

5. His face was marred, and He was crushed.
Bloody and scarred, within and without.
The precious veil is rent for me.
A living way to God He leads me.
GFH2_13.name: The Loving Course Of Jesus – The Crucifixion

HC1_13.content:
1. Let's pray in the name of the Lord,
Ask according to His will.
Let us pray for the glory of God.
Let us bless many.

2. Let's speak in the name of the Lord,
Speak words of blessing and give thanks.
Let us speak for the glory of God.
Let us bless many.

3. Let's work in the name of the Lord,
Speak words of blessing and give thanks.
Let us speak for the glory of God.
Let us bless many.
HC1_13.name: In the Name of the Lord

HC2_13.content:
O' Lord, I know You appreciate me.
Let me enjoy Your full understanding.
Lift up the shield of faith, destroy flaming arrows.
I will enter Your great love,
The depth of Your heart.
Deeply I will taste
The sweet fruit of the cross.
Let my eyes of faith capture Your heart.
HC2_13.name: Enjoy the Lord's Appreciation

SOL1_14.content:
1. Where love abides, where love abides,
 Mountains are turned to plains;
 Where love abides, where love abides,
 Darkness is turned to day.

 2. Where love abides, where love abides,
 Winter feels just like spring;
 Where love abides, where love abides,
 Sweetness whelms over pain.

 3. Love your household, love your household,
 And you will see them change;
 Don't cease to pray, don't cease to pray,
 And you'll see God's glory.
SOL1_14.name: Where Love Abides

GBH_14.content:
Most precious and sweet! You're my true Beloved!
For Your love dream You committed Yourself.
For your love, You yearned to be a man forever.
You loved me and gave Yourself for me.
You redeemed, betrothed me
With Your precious blood,
To be Your darling love, the seal on Your heart.
Your eternal scars of love
Is Your love pledge forever.
Lord, Your love enthralls, captivates my heart.
Your love is stronger than death,
A very flame of Yahweh!
Now You and I are most deeply united!
The love covenant is forever sure.
Your love dream's gloriously fulfilled!
La La La La La La La La La La La La La La La La La
Your love is like a rainbow:
Colourful, beautiful; so tender,
So bountiful, romantic, most personal.
From dawn to dusk, You are sweetly gazing on me,
and thinking of me,
Longing for me, embracing me.
O Lord, grant me undying, bravest faith,
A thankful, dancing heart
To echo Your matchless, Your touching love,
Your heart's desire towards me,
And set my love on You!
GBH_14.name: Love Like a Rainbow

SOL2_14.content:
Amazing grace! How sweet the sound
That saved a wretch like me!
I once was lost, but now am found.
Was blind, but now I see.

2. 'Twas grace that taught my heart to fear,
And grace my fears relieved.
How precious did that grace appear
The hour I first believed!

3. The Lord hath promised good to me,
His word my hope secures.
He will my shield and portion be
As long as life endures.

4. Through many dangers, toils, and snares,
I have already come.
'Tis grace hath brought me safe thus far,
And grace will lead me home.

5. When I've been there ten thousand years,
Bright shining as the sun,
We've no less days to sing God's praise
Than when I first begun.
SOL2_14.name: Amazing Grace

GFH1_14.content:
1. Father, Thy name our souls would bless,
As children taught by grace,
Lift up our hearts in righteousness
And joy before Thy face.

2. Sweet is confidence Thou giv’st,
Though high above our praise,
Our hearts resort to where Thou liv’st,
In heaven’s unclouded rays.

3. There in the purpose of Thy love,
Our place is now prepared,
As sons with Him who is above,
Who all our sorrows shared.

4. Eternal ages shall declare
The riches of Thy grace,
To those who with Thy Son shall share
A son’s eternal place.

5. Absent, as yet, we rest in hope,
Treading the desert-path,
Waiting for Him who takes us up
Beyond the pow’r of death.

6. We joy in Thee, Thy holy love
Our endless portion is,
Like Thine own son, with Him above,
In brightest heavenly bliss.

7. O Holy Father, keep us here
In that blest name of love,
Walking before Thee without fear
Till all be joy above.
GFH1_14.name: “Father, Thy Name Our Souls Would Bless”

SOL3_14.content:
I'm my Beloved's, He desires me.
Let us rise early to the vineyards we go;
Let us see if the vine has grown,
And if the pomegranates have bloomed.
There I will give my love to you,
There I will give my love to you!
Mandrakes give off a fragrant scent,
All the choice fruits are beside our door!
All manner new and old I've laid up for you,
O my beloved, I've saved them up for you.
SOL3_14.name: In the Vineyard I Give My Love to You

HC1_14.content:
It's so good to believe in Jesus
We have the Lord by our side.
He will never leave me. He is so close.
La la la la, together we live with Him.

2. It's so good to believe in Jesus.
We are not afraid of death.
The Lord will receive our soul to heaven.
La la la la, it's so good to be with Him.

3. It's so good to believe in Jesus.
The Lord will come to take the church.
Our body will be transformed! How glorious!
La la la la, O' Lord, come to take me up!
HC1_14.name: It's So Good to be with the Lord

referenceSongs.name: It's So Good to be with the Lord

HC2_14.content:
Christ, the Victor, holds on high
All authority;
He gives you the pow'r to
Trample enemies.
Be awesome as an army
With its banners bold;
Sing your praise, and use the pow'r to
Conquer all the foes.
He prepares a feast for you
Before your enemies;
Raise your head with glory,
With your heart set free.

2. Facing various trials you should
Be more rejoicing;
'Tis the way to grow fast,
To receive glory!
Be strong and courageous,
Face the fight with joy;
Cast not away your confidence
To gain great reward
He is with you through the valley
Of the shadow of death,
Protects you with His rod,
Guides you with His staff.
HC2_14.name: Be Strong and Courageous

SOL1_15.content:
1. You have crowned the year with Your bounty,
And Your paths dripped with fatness.
You have crowned the year with Your bounty,
And Your paths dripped with fatness.

2. For His anger is but for a moment,
His favour is for a lifetime.
Weeping may last for the night,
But a shout of joy comes at morn.

3. You have helped me, my Lord, You have helped me.
Under Your wings I shall shout for joy.
Closely, my heart will follow, follow You.
Your right hand will take hold of me.
SOL1_15.name: Grace upon Grace

GFH2_15.content:
1. How I thank You, dear Lord!
You came to die for me.
You shed Your blood; Hands, feet were pierced,
To save a wretch like me.

2. Moved deeply by this love,
Eyes brimmed with tears I bow.
O Son of God, how can it be
That You should die for my sins!

3. Saved from eternal death,
Set free from pow’r of sin,
Led into the marvelous light,
E’er in God’s kingdom I live.
GFH2_15.name: The Love Of Salvation
tags: The Lord Died on the Cross

SOL3_15.content:
1. I'm brought forth dearly and deeply from You,
From the depths of your heart's desire.
Since eternity I've been Your love dream!
I am always in Your love thoughts.
Since eternity I've been on Your heart!
You have longed to gain me as Your own!

2. I appeared from Your deep love longing.
I appeared from Your beautiful heart.
I appeared from Your flaming desire!
I appeared from Your dream of love,
From Your boundless and fairest thoughts!

3. I appeared from Your love, pow’r and wisdom.
I appeared from Your wounded side.
I’m the flesh of Your flesh, bone of Your bones.
I return to the place in Your side.
I am Your well-matched darling love.

4. We most deeply belong to each other
In our union of manifold love.
O we share such a vibrant life union!
I am always Your joy ahead.
’Tis a love path with no end!

5. I'm most deeply brought forth from Your heart.
I belong most deeply to You!
Without me there’s a missing piece in Your heart.
You embrace me into Your heart.
You love me, need me boundlessly.
I am Your greatest joy forever!
'Tis an endless romantic path
Of sweet and eternal love!
SOL3_15.name: I'm Brought Forth Most Deeply From You

referenceSongs.name: 我非作夢，祢是我親阿爸

HC1_15.content:
1. Lord, You are the real and living God.
I rely on You. I follow You
On the righteous path.
I obey all You commanded.
Now I am in Christ, united with the Lord,
Live with Him in the light,
Out of the power of darkness.

2. Lord, You loved me and died for me.
I rely on You. I'm dead to sin.
Old things have passed away.
Today I live to You.
Now I am in Christ, united with the Lord,
Live with Him in the light,
Out of the power of darkness.
Pursue Him every day,
Close to Him every day,
Follow Him every day,
Till I go to the heavenly home.
HC1_15.name: I Will Follow the Lord Every Day

SOL1_16.content:
On the cross, my Lord conquered all the foes;
On the cross, all my sins He washed away.
O' Moving, life-yielding love!
Its depth and height infinite!
By the cross, God's love to me is displayed.

2. On the cross, "It is finished!" He declared;
On the cross, the wall of sin He shattered.
O' Salvation of glory!
I've obtained glorious freedom!
By the cross, God and man embrace as one.

3. In the cross, I can see a ray of hope;
In the cross, my soul's comforted and healed.
O' Tender light of the cross!
What encouragement it gives!
By the cross, my life has a glorious change.

4. On the cross, His off'ring is once for all;
On the cross, His blood washed me white as snow.
O' Perfected for all time!
Full acceptance, endless love!
By the cross, God and man are ever close.

5. In the cross, He cast away my load of sin;
In the cross, He freed me from the yoke of law.
O' How warm and sweet to live
In His vast ocean of love!
By the cross, God's love on me is outpoured.

6. In the cross, His love kindles my whole life.
In the cross, His love gives me faith and might.
O' Wondrous love of the cross -
Shall be my drive and my rest!
By the cross, I shout for joy and vict'ry.
SOL1_16.name: In the Cross
tags: Fruit of the Cross. Glorious Salvation

GFH2_16.name: It’s You Who Have Loved Me, My Lord!

referenceSongs.name: És Tu que me amas Senhor

GBH_16.content:
His personal love to me!
Undying, pure and ever new,
therefore with loving kindness
His love great floods cannot quench,
Through all ages, it will not fade,
Overcomes all trials and pain.
He ever strives my heart to gain!

2. His personal love to me
Is my great drive through all my life. have I drawn you.
When I'm in despair, He comforts me,
His love overcomes all things,
Colourful, warm, tender and strong.
I'll praise His love forever!

3. His personal love to me!
So sweet and warm, it gives me hope.
He shares all my sorrow and joy.
His love is my courage and faith,
Fills my heart like a living spring.
O in His bosom may I ever stay!

4. His personal love to me
Captures my heart and makes me sing!
O what breadth and length, height and depth!
His love paves my lifelong path,
Grace upon grace through all my days,
Beyond compare, His love to me!
GBH_16.name: His Personal Love to Me

SOL2_16.content:
I am really really rich!
Almighty God is my Father.
Jesus Christ has thousand names
To satisfy my every need.
Holy Spirit abides in me.
He is my Helper forever.
I have a warm, eternal home
And the Bible dearer than gold.

2. See the sky and clouds so bright,
Flowers and trees, mountains and seas.
Birds and bugs give tunes so nice.
The moon and stars light up the night.
My Lord walks with me all the way,
Giving me joy, faith, hope, and love.
I have glad tidings of glory
For thousands souls in misery.

3. O Lord, make me give, give, give.
Make me a giver all my life.
More I have as more I give
Till overflowing in my heart.
Giving water to little ones,
Eternal reward will bring me.
"Better to give than to receive."
Five loaves, two fish can feed many.
SOL2_16.name: I am Really Rich

GFH1_16.content:
1. This is my Father’s world,
And to my listening ears
All nature sings, and round me rings
The music of the spheres.
This is my Father’s world
I rest me in the thought
Of rocks and trees, of skies and seas.
His hand the wonders wrought.

2. This is my Father’s world,
The birds their carols raise,
The morning light, the lily white,
Declare their Maker’s praise.
This is my Father’s world:
He shines in all that’s fair;
In the rustling grass I hear Him pass,
He speaks to me everywhere.

3. This is my Father’s world,
O let me ne’er forget
That tho’ the wrong seems oft so strong,
God is the Ruler yet.
This is my Father’s world:
Why should my heart be sad?
The Lord is King: let the heavens ring!
God reigns: let earth be glad!
GFH1_16.name: This Is My Father’s World

HC2_16.name: Faith On, Darling

SOL3_17.content:
1. May I return
To the place in Your side
To fill the space reserved
For me in Your heart.
As Your bone of bones,
In the blessing of love I dwell!
By day, by night,
I sweetly live with You.
Without You, Lord, I drift astray.
I will return to Your love!
I'll be anchored firm in Your love.
Deeply I drink of You!

2. In Your presence and love I dwell.
You've reserved Your heart for me.
You have kept the place
In Your side for me.
I'm Your most loved one.
I'm the bone of Your bones.
I'm Your only love,
Your ultimate darling love,
The love secret deep in Your heart!
Without You, Lord I wither dry.
I will return to Your love!
In Your love I rest, anchored firm,
My heart overflows!
'Tis the fairest love return
To the depths of Your heart!
SOL3_17.name: The Most Beautiful Return

referenceSongs.name: 活在骨中骨愛的幸福中
Viver na Felicidade do Amor de Osso dos Ossos

HC1_17.content:
1. Before I knew You, I felt
Empty deep inside.
I had many friends around.
I was seeking a better one.
It was endless search for true love.
Can it be ever found?

2. Before I knew You, I didn't know
The secret of the universe,
The meaning of relationships.
Why is there romantic love?
It was endless search for meaning.
Can it be ever found?

3. O' Now I know I was created for You.
Only when I return to Your heart,
Only when I fall in love with You,
Then I can be satisfied.
Every day I come to You.
You draw near to me.
On earth You and I live our every day.
In heaven You and I
Will live better days.
HC1_17.name: Lord, I was Created for You

referenceSongs.name: Lord, I was Created for You

HC2_17.content:
Shout for joy to God, all the earth,
Sing the glory of Your name,
Make Your praise glorious, for Your great power
Your enemies surrender to You.
All the earth will worship You,
And will sing praises to You.
You turned the sea into a dry land,
They walked through the river and rejoiced.
O' God for You have put us to the test.
You have refined us as silver is tried,
Brought us into the net.
We went through flood and firs,
Yet You brought us to the abundant land.
I'll come into Your house
With burnt offerings.
To You I will perform my vows
Which I spoke in trouble.
Blessed be God who has not
Turned away my prayers
Nor His mercy from me.
He's always with me.
HC2_17.name: Psalm 66

SOL1_18.content:
Rejoice! Rejoice! He is risen!
Overcame Satan and death, He is risen!
Rejoice! Rejoice! He is risen!
Overcame Satan and death, He sets me free!
SOL1_18.name: Rejoice! The Lord is Risen!

GFH2_18.content:
1. O the cross of Golgotha
Tells the love of my Saviour, how deep!
Down from heaven full of wealth and glory,
You did come, shed Your blood for me.
Foxes have holes, even birds of the air have nests, 
Yet You had no place to lay Your head.

2. O the cross of Golgotha
Tells the love of my Saviour, how rich!
Suffered all the shame and scoffs so sorely,
Gave Yourself, bore the stripes for me.
The crown of thorns, the wounded hands and feet and side -
I am set free by Your sacrifice!

3. Think and think - O Lord, Your love undying!
Ne’er its depth can I realize!
Gazing upon the cross - Your arms are open wide,
May I come and consecrate my life.
GFH2_18.name: The Cross Of Golgotha

GBH_18.content:
In Glory my Lover, my best Friend, 
holds all authority!
He's the beloved Son of God, 
my glorious Saviour!
For me, He came from Heaven to Earth, 
as a Man forever.
He loved me so much that He gave Himself 
on the cruel cross for me.
But He has risen from the dead 
and ascended to Heaven!
O one day, from Glory He will come back
To bring me to His most wonderful home.
Now in Heaven, He lives for me; 
from dawn to dusk He's thinking of me.
O I belong to Him; His desire is toward me.
His fairest heart, His strong arms, all are mine!
How I love Him! He's my treasure, He's my portion,
Incomparable!!!
GBH_18.name: My Lover in Glory

SOL2_18.content:
I was lost in worldly pleasures,
And indulged in mortal things;
Strayed from "Fount' of Living Water,"
Bound in sin, how mis'rable!
Now, the glory of Christ draws me,
My heart's melted in His great love;
Forget things behind, reach forward,
Press toward the goal ahead.

2. All things that are under the sun,
Are vanity, toils in vain.
Soon the world, its lusts will vanish.
As the mist, none will remain.
The Lord alone will never change.
Only He satisfies my heart.
Whom have I in heaven but Christ?
I desire nothing on earth.

3. Whatever things were gain to me,
All I have counted as loss
For knowing Christ Jesus my Lord,
My greatest treasure of all.
For whom I have suffered the loss
Of all things, and count'd them as dross,
That I may gain Christ my Lord,
That I may gain Christ my Lord.
SOL2_18.name: Gain Christ

GFH1_18.content:
1. Thou didst leave Thy throne 
and They Kingly crown,
When Thou camest to earth for me;
But in Bethlehem’s home 
was there found no room
For Thy holy nativity.
Oh, reign in my heart, Lord Jesus!
There is room in my heart for Thee;

*Refrain:
My heart shall rejoice, Lord Jesus!
When Thou comest and callest for me;
My heart shall rejoice, Lord Jesus!
When Thou comest and callest for me.*

2. Heaven’s arches rang
When the angels sang,
Proclaiming Thy royal degree;
But of lowly birth
Didst Thou come to earth,
And in great humility.

*Refrain:
My heart shall rejoice, Lord Jesus!
When Thou comest and callest for me;
My heart shall rejoice, Lord Jesus!
When Thou comest and callest for me.*

3. The foxes found rest,
And the birds their nest
In the shade of the forest tree;
But Thy couch was the sod,
O Thou Son of God,
In the deserts of Galilee.

*Refrain:
My heart shall rejoice, Lord Jesus!
When Thou comest and callest for me;
My heart shall rejoice, Lord Jesus!
When Thou comest and callest for me.*

4. Thou camest, O Lord,
With the living Word
That should set Thy people free;
But with mocking scorn,
And with crown of thorn,
They bore Thee to Calvary.

*Refrain:
My heart shall rejoice, Lord Jesus!
When Thou comest and callest for me;
My heart shall rejoice, Lord Jesus!
When Thou comest and callest for me.*

5. When the heavens shall ring,
And the angels sing,
At Thy coming to victory,
Let Thy voice call me home,
Saying, “Yet there is room,
There is room at My side for thee.”

*Refrain:
My heart shall rejoice, Lord Jesus!
When Thou comest and callest for me;
My heart shall rejoice, Lord Jesus!
When Thou comest and callest for me.*
GFH1_18.name: Thou Didst Leave Thy Throne

SOL1_19.content:
At the Sea of Tiberias,
The risen Lord appeared to me;
He prepared a barbecue on the shore,
With fish and bread and His tender love.
O’ Lord! You know that I love You
Though I have failures and weakness.
May You strengthen me by the Spirit,
To follow and love You to the end.
SOL1_19.name: At the Sea of Tiberias

HC1_19.content:
Many good things God has given us,
An abundant life, a rich eternity.
We should love Him. We should give ourselves to Him.
We should follow Him.

Many good things God has given us,
Grace upon grace, love upon love.
We are willing, we are willing to share,
To give our two little coins,
To bless many many.
HC1_19.name: Many Good Things God has Given Us

HC2_19.content:
Though you have not seen Him,
You love Him, you love Him.
Though you do not see Him now,
You believe, believe in Him,
You greatly rejoice with joy,
You greatly rejoice with joy,
With joy in expressible,
And full of glory.

2. Though I have not seen You,
I love You, I love You.
Though I do not see You now,
I believe, believe in You.
I rejoice with joy untold,
I rejoice, full of glory.
I can't tell how sweet it'll be
When I see You one day.

3. Though I have not seen You,
I love You, I love You.
Though I do not see You now,
I believe, believe in You.
Lord, You are above all things,
Far beyond what I can see.
O' my heart longs for You,
Think of You day and night.
My Beloved, whom my soul loves,
You deserve all my heart.
HC2_19.name: Though You Have Not Seen Him

SOL1_20.content:
1. One day the Lord will come,
To take me to the clouds;
That day He'll wipe away my tears,
I'll dance and sing aloud.

*Chorus:
O' Lord, I love You. 
My heart longs for You.
Gladly waiting for that day,
I'll see Your glorious face.*

2. One day the Lord will come,
To transform my body.
To be like His form of glory,
How wonderful and free!

*Chorus:
O' Lord, I love You. 
My heart longs for You.
Gladly waiting for that day,
I'll see Your glorious face.*

3. One day the Lord will come,
I'll marvel and rejoice.
To see my Lord's glorious face,
Shall be my spring of joy.

*Chorus:
O' Lord, I love You. 
My heart longs for You.
Gladly waiting for that day,
I'll see Your glorious face.*

4. One day the Lord will come,
Take me to Abba's home.
I'll see His wondrous love design,
For me the new abode.

*Chorus:
O' Lord, I love You. 
My heart longs for You.
Gladly waiting for that day,
I'll see Your glorious face.*

5. One day the Lord will come,
Gone all sorrows and tears!
I'll drink from the river of joy,
Enthralled in His love.

*Chorus:
O' Lord, I love You. 
My heart longs for You.
Gladly waiting for that day,
I'll see Your glorious face.*

6. One day the Lord will come,
Crowns, rewards to present.
We'll reign fore'er, His government
Will increase with no end.

*Chorus:
O' Lord, I love You. 
My heart longs for You.
Gladly waiting for that day,
I'll see Your glorious face.*

7. One day the Lord will come,
He is my hope so blest,
There'll be new heaven and new earth,
In which dwells righteousness.

*Chorus:
O' Lord, I love You. 
My heart longs for You.
Gladly waiting for that day,
I'll see Your glorious face.*
SOL1_20.name: One Day the Lord Will Come

referenceSongs.name: One day the Lord will come

GFH2_20.content:
1. Behold! The sun gave not its light.
The earth was darkened and shook;
He left His Father’s face and died,
For me lowly and vile.

2. I view the cross from every side,
His blood, His wounds I meet:
His head, His face, His hands, His back,
His side, His trunk, His feet.

3. For me to understand His love,
He let His side be pierced;
Flowed blood and water proving this:
His heart‘s wounded for me!

4. Hear, on the cross the Lord’s first words:
"Father! Forgive them! Forgive!"
He died to pardon countless sins;
He died that we might live.

5. To the corners of the earth
I’ll tell The wondrous love of the cross.
Begone, the world’s riches and pride! I
lose them to gain Christ!
GFH2_20.name: Bitterness On The Cross

GBH_20.content:
1. Long long ago, You knew Your path of suffering,
And You'd be raised on the bitterest cross.
But glorious Lord, You never had a second thought;
For love You longed to be a Man for me.
My dearest Lord, so precious with joy You have come!
Forev'r a Man, so deep You comfort my heart,
Shatter my fears and my feeling of distance.
You yearn to be closest to me and live in me;
And now You live with joy forever in my heart!

2. Forev'r a Man, You make me know my true worth,
And I'm the seal, the dearest dove on Your heart!
Born as a Child, You make Heaven and Earth wonder,
Myriads of angels behold, adore and praise!
My dearest Lord, so precious with joy You have come!
"Forev'r a Man" sealed Your love's deep commitment.
Your fervent love comforts my soul, warms my heart.
May I forev'r enjoy Your presence and love.
O Emmanuel forev'r You're worthy of my heart!
GBH_20.name: Forever a Man Emmanuel

SOL2_20.content:
1. If then you were raised with Christ,
Seek those things above,
Where Christ is, seated at the right hand of God.

2. Set your mind on things above,
Not on the things on earth;
For you died, 
and your life's hidden with Christ in God.

3. When Christ, who is our life,
Who is our life, appears,
You will also appear with Him in glory.
SOL2_20.name: Christ is My Life (Col. 3:1-4)

GFH1_20.content:
1. O Lord, when we the path retrace
Which Thou on earth hast trod,
To man Thy wondrous love and grace,
Thy faithfulness to God.

2. Thy love, by man so sorely tried,
Proved stronger than the grave;
The very spear that pierced Thy side
Drew forth the blood to save.

3. Although Thou passed through woes and grief,
Thy works were ever good;
Although midst sorrows all Thy life,
Thou spak’st no murmuring word.

4. Faithful amidst unfaithfulness,
‘Mid darkness only light,
Thou did’st Thy Father’s name confess,
And in His will delight.

5. Unmoved by Satan’s subtle wiles,
Or suffering, shame, and loss,
Thy path, uncheered by earthly smiles,
Led only to the cross.

6. We wonder at Thy lowly mind,
And fain would like Thee be,
And all our rest and pleasure find
In learning, Lord, of Thee.
GFH1_20.name: O Lord, When We The Path Retrace

SOL3_20.content:
1. Since eternity past,
A sweet dream outflowed from God's heart.
A household He desires
To make known His great glory!
He broke through the "Impossible",
Passed through shame, all sufferings, the cross.
He poured out His boundless all
To accomplish His dream of old!

Chorus:
Home sweet home! Home sweet home!
'Tis the ultimate mystery of God!
God's sweet home! God's sweet home!
Endless, fairest sweet love dream!

2. O the Holy Trinity
Embraces all His precious ones!
O this is God's household -
The myst'ry deep in God's heart.
Each one pours out his all;
O we live out perfect love!
'Tis the hidden fair love dream
In the heart of the great I AM!
SOL3_20.name: "Home" - The Love Dream of Old in God's Heart

referenceSongs.name: 甜美家是神亙古心底至美的愛夢
O Doce Lar é o mais Belo Sonho de Amor

HC1_20.content:
O' God, I come to You.
You love to hear my voice.
I entrust everything to You.
You make all things work for me.
Sometimes Your answer comes late;
You have a better time.
Sometimes You answer me at once,
Cheer me up from time to time.
Every day I come to You, open my mouth wide.
I need You to give me blessings and grace.
Every day I come to You. In silence I wait,
Wait for You to come close to me.
HC1_20.name: O' God, I Pray to You

referenceSongs.name: Oh God I pray to you

GBH_21.content:
1. On the cross, Jesus conquered all our foes!
On the cross, Jesus took away my sins!
O He gave Himself for me!
His love no one can fathom.
By the cross, God's great love is shown to me!

2. On the cross "It is finished!"He proclaimed!
By His death, Jesus shatters walls of sin!
O such great salvation!
Now I taste glorious freedom.
By the cross, God and I embrace in joy!

3. From the cross, dazzling light and hope I see!
By the cross, from a broken life I rise!
O tender light shines from the cross,
Cheers me through life to march on.
By the Lord, my life blooms anew with
joy! O A glorious life I own!
He's my Beloved, my best friend,
And He lives in my heart forevermore!
GBH_21.name: On the Cross

SOL2_21.content:
Behold, behold what manner of love
Abba has bestowed on us,
That we should be called children of God!
And we are children of God!

2. Therefore the world does not know us,
Because it did not know Him.
Therefore the world does not know us,
Because it did not know Him.

3. Beloved, now we are children of God,
What we shall be has not shown.
But we know that when He is revealed,
We shall be like Him, like Him.

4. For we shall see Him as He is,
And everyone who has
This hope in Him purifies himself
Just as the Lord is pure.
SOL2_21.name: What Manner of Love

HC2_21.content:
You need to prepare to meet your God,
And the day of the stage of Christ.
This world and its lust will soon pass away.
They will quickly pass away.
Only the Lord is always the same.
His love satisfies my heart.
May I always love Him with a pure heart,
Set my hope on the grace brought by His coming.

2. You need to prepare to meet your God.
Life is short and time is swift.
What you have prepared for eternity?
Can you meet Him without shame?
Thinking of the endless days to come,
I should treasure this life more.
May You teach me how to number my days.
Same heart with You, I'll strive for You till You come.

3. This light momentary affliction
Is indeed preparing for us
An eternal weight of glory,
To enter the Lord's joy.
I have seen the joy set before me.
By faith I'll overcome all.
I now boast of my glorious hope,
Despise the world and love Him with all my heart.

4. Help me to see the eternity—
The endless generations to come,
Joy upon joy, eternal glory
Forever increasing.
Help me to see the results of sins—
The lake of fire with sulfur;
There will be no more hope, no more hope,
But sufferings forever and ever.

5. Don't you feel fearful when you think of
The heaven and the lake of fire:
The endless glory; the pain with no end?
What do you think? How do you feel?
O' Lord, help us to redeem our time,
And bring many back to You.
Let us prepare for eternity.
One day we will meet the Lord face to face.
HC2_21.name: Prepare to Meet the Lord

SOL1_22.content:
Can a woman forget her nursing child?
Even these may forget, I won't forget you.
Behold, I've inscribed you on My palms.
Your adorable countenance's always before Me.

2. The mountains shall depart, the hills be removed;
But My kindness shall not depart from you.
All things may change. My love is the same.
My covenant of love is forever sure.

3. My child, I will never leave you, never forsake you.
Till the end of the age, I'm always with you.
I love you as the Father loves Me.
Day and night I watch over you, fix My eyes on you.
SOL1_22.name: His Gaze of Love
tags: Victoriously Overcome Satan. Spirit Set Free

GFH2_22.content:
1. The grace of my Lord Jesus Christ -
O what a costly grace!
The Son of God once became poor for me.
In manger born, He was humble and toiled,
Died on the cross, for me suffered all loss,
Of flesh and blood, bore the cruel punishment,
God’s beloved Son was by God forsaken.
O what a costly grace, that makes me rich in faith,
My Lord, I love You, adore You,
Such love deserves my heart to gain.

2. The grace of my Lord, Jesus Christ
Immense, glorious and rich!
Surpasses human thoughts God’s vast ocean of love!
Captives of sin now with the Lord shall reign;
Men of distress now are children of God;
Once enemies now become His darling;
One with the Lord, never sep’rate again
O what a costly grace! What a beautiful heart!
My Lord, I love You, embrace You,
Enjoy and trust. My heart‘s amazed!
GFH2_22.name: The Costly Grace
tags: The Lord Died on the Cross

GBH_22.content:
The Bleeding Heart unfolds before me, 
opens up a pure, white heart.
In Your purest, beautiful, loving heart 
is hidden deep Your love desire, Your love dream!
O why were You crushed with pain for me? 
O why was Your heart broken for me?
For I'm Your sweet joy ahead, 
Your desire, Your fairest dove. 
You saw me, and eternity...!
So You despised the shame, the cruel cross. 
Drops of blood oozed from Your heart.
O such suff'ring who can comprehend? 
Your pierced side showed me Your pain, Your love.
For me, You drank the bitterest cup. 
Your love to me is God's flashing flame!
This flow'r whispers words of love: 
Your heart's broken for me, 
and Your desire is toward me,
and I'm the seal upon Your heart!

Birds are singing. Flowers are blooming. 
Pink petals pave our path of love,
Celebrating Your glorious rise from the dead, 
and our love union, the endless spring of our love.
Your heart's forever calling for me! 
Unto Your bosom sweet I plunge myself.
Lord, Your bosom is my rest. 
I nest under Your wings.
You embrace me. 
You embrace me to the depth of Your heart!
Your heart's forever calling for me! 
Unto Your bosom sweet I plunge myself.
*rit*
You will carry me through life; 
I rejoice under Your wings.
You embrace me. 
You embrace me to the depth of Your heart!
GBH_22.name: The Secret of the Bleeding Heart

SOL2_22.content:
O' Lord, keep me near the cross,
May I perceive Your heart.
Let Your love pierce through my soul,
I shall never be free.
Lord, Your love of the cross
Thrills my heart immensely!
Could I still live for myself?
Should I ignore Your love?

2. God's own Son walked to the cross,
Such love is amazing!
I am captured by His cross,
I surrender myself.
Lord, Your love of the cross
Thrills my heart immensely!
This love conquers, compels me
To be same heart with You.
SOL2_22.name: The Thrill in the Love of the Cross
tags: The Lord Died on the Cross

GFH1_22.content:
1. I have a Friend whose faithful love
Is more than all the world to me.
‘Tis higher than the heights above,
And deeper than the soundless sea;
So old, so new, so strong, so true,
Before the earth received its frame.
He loved me, blessed be His name!

2. He held the highest place above,
Adored by all the sons of flame;
Yet such His self-denying love,
He laid aside His crown and came
To seek the lost, and at the cost
Of heavenly rank and earthly fame
He sought me – blessed be His name!

3. It was a lonely path He trod,
From every human soul apart;
Known only to Himself and God
Was all the grief that filled His heart,
Yet from the track, He turned not back,
Till where I lay in want and shame,
He found me – blessed be His name!

4. Then dawned at last that day of dread
When desolate, yet undismayed,
With wearied frame and thorn-crowned head,
He, God-forsaken, man-betrayed,
Was then made sin on Calvary,
And dying there in grief and shame,
He saved me – blessed be His name!

5. Long as I live my song shall tell
The wonders of His dying love;
And when at last I rise to dwell
In the bright home prepared above,
My joy shall be His face to see,
And bowing there with loud acclaim
I’ll praise Him – blessed be His name!
GFH1_22.name: I Have A Friend Whose Faithful Love

SOL3_22.content:
He walked in the garden with Adam and Eve.
He at with Abraham.
He wrested all night with Jacob.
He buried Moses.
He made a cov'nant with David.
He became a nursing child!
Joseph and Mary, He obeyed,
O a carpenter He became.
In all things He's made like me
He sat by the well and asked for a drink.
He opened the eys of the blind.
He opened His heart to Mary.
He wept before the tomb.
He washed His own disciples' feet!
He bled for me to ever live in me,
To unite with me!
He said "Reach out your hand,
And place it in My side!"
He said, "Do you love Me?"
"Feed My lambs; tend My sheep!"
"O come, follow Me!"
One day, I'll come to take you
To be with Me forevermore!
SOL3_22.name: The Infinite Lord Enters Into Every Facet of Our Lives

referenceSongs.name: 無限主進入我們人生種種

HC1_22.content:
I don't want any fightings, any death,
I don't want any hunger, disasters.
Lord, may You come back quickly
And bring peace to the earth.

2. I don't want any sorrows, any pains,
I don't want to cry and say goodbye.
Lord, may You come back quickly
And bring love to the earth.

3. Come O' Lord, come O' Lord,
Come to take us to meet You.
Come O' Lord, come O' Lord,
Bring to the earth the eternal bliss.
HC1_22.name: O' Lord, May You Come

SOL1_23.content:
1. My sins more than I can number,
His blood washed me white as snow,
And He has purged my conscience.
Now I am free before God.
Precious blood redeemed me.
What can I pay Him back?
Let me enjoy Your great love,
Your perfect salvation.

2. I was away from the Father.
By His blood, He brought me back.
The veil was torn for me fore'er.
I can see the Father's face.
I dwell in the Holy Place,
My home's God's tabernacle.
God's perfect love casts out my fear.
And I cry, "Lord, may You come!"

3. My Lord's ascended to heaven
For me, appears before God.
In heaven I sit with Him,
Enjoy the Father's delight.
Closest to the Father,
Closest to the Father,
I am His dear child forever.
It's so sweet to cry, "Abba!"

4. The bitter way You walked for me.
You said, "Finished!" on the cross.
You laid down Your life for me.
Now I can embrace You.
Lord, let me see Your heart,
Move me to love You more.
I offer my life for You,
Forever I will love You.
SOL1_23.name: The Perfect Salvation
tags: Fruit of the Cross. Glorious Salvation

HC1_23.content:
1. The church is God's household.
All of us are joined by love.
Hello, big brother! Hello, big sister!
We are so close!
Hello, young brother! Hello, young sister!
You're so lovely.

2. The church is God's household.
We serve God with one heart.
You preach the gospel. I shepherd the young sheep.
We work together.
You share the truth. I give comfort.
We bless many.

3. The church is God's household.
The Lord oversees, guides the church.
O' Let us offer ourselves to bless
This family.
Let us get involved to satisfy
the Lord's heart.
HC1_23.name: Serving in God's Household

GFH2_24.content:
1. May I oft meditate:
What a place You put me in Your heart!
How You long to be united with me!
What a price You have paid for this!

2. May I oft meditate:
"I am willing," You said through Your blood.
Betrothed me with Your blood ever to You,
How You desire and long for me.

3. May I oft meditate:
How You long to abide in my heart,
Be one spirit with me, ever draw near.
You will to share all things with me.

4. Never forget Your grace!
May I think of Your love every day;
Shakes the earth, thrills my heart, Lord, Your great love!
May my heart ever love You only!
GFH2_24.name: The Love Of The Blood
tags: The Lord Died on the Cross

SOL2_24.content:
What amazing grace, Immense and boundless!
I am in Christ -
Died with You, live with You, 
sit in heaven with You.
Your love journey on earth was all for me.

2. In heav'n I sit with You! I am whiter than snow!
My sins no more!
I'm holy as the Lord, 
dwell in the Holy Place.
Forever Abba's smiles brighten my heart.

3. In heav'n I sit with You! What amazing grace -
Beyond measure!
The Father welcomes me 
as He welcomes the Lord.
Forever I live in this grace and love.

4. My perfect Christ for me appears before God.
You're my High Priest!
Perfectly You've brought me 
to the Father's bosom.
This highest Father's love belongs to me.

5. In heav'n I sit with You. This wondrous love and grace
Makes me amazed.
I'm closest to Abba. 
He delights in me.
I'm precious as the Lord in Abba's heart.

6. In heav'n I sit with You. This wondrous love and grace 
Who can fathom?
Abba has given me precious identity.
O' I am my Abba's dearest treasure!

7. In heav'n I sit with You - I'm closest to Abba,
Sit by His side.
He gives me great glory. 
I am enthroned with Him.
I will reign with Abba eternally.

8. In heav'n I sit with You. God has opened His heart -
Love overflows.
Now He can freely pour out His love on me.
O' He's dancing for me with great delight!

9. In heav'n I sit with You - enjoy Abba's embrace,
Warmest welcome!
I can see Abba's heart - beautiful, committed.
He desires me to be closest to Him.
SOL2_24.name: Sit in Heaven with the Lord

GFH1_24.content:
1. O teach me what it meaneth:
That Cross uplifted high,
With One, the Man of Sorrows,
Condemned to bleed and die.
O teach me what it cost Thee
To make a sinner whole;
And teach me, Savior, teach me
The value of a soul.

2. O teach me what it meaneth:
That sacred crimson tide,
The blood and water flowing
From Thine own wounded side.
Teach me that if none other
Had sinned, but I alone,
Yet still, Thy blood, O Jesus,
Thine only, must atone.

3. O teach me what it meaneth:
Thy love beyond compare,
The love that reacheth deeper
Than depths of self-despair!
Yea, teach me, till there gloweth
In this new heart of mine
Some beautiful reflection
Of that pure love of Thine.

4. O teach me what it meaneth,
That You came to die for me;
And grace alone can reach me,
And love alone can win.
O teach me, for I need Thee,
I have no hope beside,
The chief of all the sinners
For whom the Savior died.

5. O infinite Redeemer,
I bring no other plea;
Because Thou dost invite me
I cast myself on Thee.
Because Thou dost accept me
I love and I adore;
Because Thy love constraineth,
I’ll praise Thee evermore.
GFH1_24.name: O Teach Me What It Meaneth

HC1_24.content:
The Bible is the word of God.
It's beyond man's wisdom:
Written by many at different times
Yet without contradictions.
The Bible is the word of God,
With prophecies fulfilled,
With science and knowledge proven so.
It turns sinners to be good.
Let's treasure the Bible,
Trust in God's word.
Let's treasure the Bible,
Trust in God's word.
HC1_24.name: The Bible is the Word of God

HC2_24.content:
Let us dance for the joyful new -
Christ arose from the dead!
He's risen! He's risen!
We shall rejoice. Let us dance!
For te Lord is risen!
For the Lord lives forevermore!

2. Let us dance! He rules over all.
He loves me forever.
He's ascend'd. He's ascend'd.
We shall rejoice, shout for joy!
For the Lord is glorified.
For the Lord is glorified forever!

3. Shout for joy! He's coming quickly
To take us to His home.
He's coming! He's coming!
This is our hope, 'tis our hope!
May the Lord Jesus come soon!
We'll live together in heav'n forever!

4. Shout for joy! He will come to reign,
To restore all things.
The Lord reigns! The Lord reigns!
All lands rejoice, shout for joy,
The Lord will reign forever!
The Lord Jesus will reign forever!
HC2_24.name: Let's Dance and Shout for Joy

SOL1_25.content:
God sent His only Son into the world
That we might live through Him, through Him.
The love of God is shown.
His love is shown to all.
Not that we who loved God
But it's God who loved us,
Sent His only Son to be a sacrifice
To save us from sin.
This is true love.
SOL1_25.name: This is True Love

GFH2_25.content:
Lord Jesus, Your love‘s so deep;
I can never measure all.
For my sake, You suffered,
Gave Yourself and bore my sins.
Rugged road, You hold my hand;
In troubles, You relieve me.
I should rest inside Your love,
Let Your love fill me deeply.
I know You did everything for me.
I should love You more than anything.
In north wind or south wind,
I’ll still sing and praise You.
Only You can fill my heart.
May the whole world taste Your grace.
GFH2_25.name: Deep Deep Love Of The Lord

GBH_25.content:
1. Rejoice! Rejoice! He’s risen!
Overcome Satan and death,
He’s risen!
Rejoice! Rejoice! He’s risen!
Overcome Satan and death, 
He sets me free.

2. Rejoice! Rejoice! He’s risen!
Overcome Satan and death, 
He conquers all!
Rejoice! Rejoice! He’s risen!
Overcome Satan and death, 
He sets me free.
GBH_25.name: Rejoice, He’s Risen!

SOL3_25.content:
1. Infinite distance - I dare not reach You.
Lord, it's You who came to pursue me.
Before time, I was Your sweet love dream!
Your eternal love is fair!
You desire to be a Man forever,
To make You and I the closest.
You lived Your life, facing the cross ahead.
You were born for me and You died for me.
You drank the bitter cup, kept Your scare of love.
This forever declares Your steadfast love!
I am the bone of Your bones,
Most compatible with You!
Only I can fill the space
Kept for me in your heart!
You cried out, "It is finished!"
Winter's passed, the fair endless spring has come!
You've overcome 'The impossible',
Triumphed gloriously with love!
You've accomplished Your fair, sweet love dream!

2. All creation can't help but celebrate
Your glorious resurrection,
