Your love journey on earth, Your victorious love,
And Your love dream fulfilled!
Endless sweet love dream! Beautiful future!
Lovely flowers that sweetly blossom
Pave our endless romantic journey of love.
Dancing butterflies and singing birds rejoice!
We're forever deeply united.
O the LORD's love dream will flourish
Forevermore! Oh!
Our sweetest future! The Lamb's wedding feast!
Everlasting, glorious New Jerusalem
Will abound with hope and splendour!
My beloved Lord, the great I AM,
Said, "Behold, I make all things new!
O the heavens and earth I make new!"
SOL3_25.name: The Most Disparate Yet the Closest

referenceSongs.name: 無限懸殊的愛倆，最震撼動人，最完美的結連

SOL1_26.content:
When I lifted my head for Your face I wished to see,
I met Your gaze on me which was from eternity.
I could not realize when You began
To put me on Your heart!
When I considered that was just our first encounter,
Instead it was Your long expected embrace with me.
I was surprised with joy when I met You the first time,
Yet, all along, You've been deeply loving me.
As time goes by, I love You more and more.
Since long ago You've desired me, thought of me.
O' This sweet love that surpasses time and space
Is a true experience of You and me.
SOL1_26.name: The Long Expected Embrace

GFH2_26.content:
1. Lord, Your love‘s so true! 
For me You suffered all sneers and sores.
For me You bore the cross! 
For me You abide in my heart. 
For me You ever live! 
I know for sure this love is true, 
Not just brief mercy You give.

2. Lord, Your love‘s so deep, 
Gives me abundant life of glory, 
Like a charming melody. 
Thru’ days, thru’ months, thru’ all the years, 
Brings forth enchanting hymns. 
When I reach home, may I repeat 
ev’ry song of love at Your feet.
GFH2_26.name: Your Love So Touching

GBH_26.content:
1. O what a joy! I have the risen Lord.
O what a joy! I can live in love with Him.
He has passed through the darkest night.
He's overcome the world, Satan and death!
He holds my hand and walks with me through life.
He leads me through storms and fires.
And I shout, "Vict'ry!"

2. The risen Lord, my life and spring of joy!
This joy no one can snatch away from me.
He fills my heart with faith and hope.
I joy in Him while onward go.
He holds my hand and walks with me through life.
He leads me toward the peak.
And I shout, "Vict'ry!"

3. I've tasted death, but now am living.
I've conquered death and forever I will live.
I hold the keys of Sheol and Death.
My hand holds all authority.
Fear not, My love, I'll always be with you,
Yes, to the end of the age!
O let's shout, "Vict'ry!"
O let us rejoice!
GBH_26.name: The Risen Lord

SOL2_26.content:
Rejoice! Rejoice! The Lord's risen!
Overcame Satan and death, He is risen!
Rejoice! Rejoice! The Lord's risen!
How can I forget His love appearing!

2. The Lord's appearing 
Wiped off my tears.
His Father is my Father,
I'm dear to Him.
The Lord's appearing 
Removed my grief.
It's too good to be true.
I clung to Him.

3. The Lord's appearing 
Cast off my fear.
The Lord's love will never change.
My heart's comfort'd.
The Lord's appearing 
Opened my eyes,
Took away all my sorrow.
My heart's fervent!

4. He appeared to me 
And gave me peace.
He sent me to the world
To work with Him.
He appeared to me, 
Showed me His wounds.
"My Lord, and my God,
I love You so!"

5. He appeared to me 
By the seashore.
He prepared breakfast for me
With tender love.
He said to me,
"Do you love Me?
If you do, shepherd My sheep
And follow Me."

 6. He commissioned me 
On the mountain
To finish the glorious church,
Wait till He comes.
I'll never forget
His face and voice.
With same mind I'll work with Him,
Strive till He comes.

7. He appeared to me, 
Opened my eyes:
My Brother - the Son of God,
Who came for me.
He's the Son of Man,
The same with me.
Yet He is without sin.
He's glorious.

8. On Mount of Olives 
He said to me,
"You'll receive the Spirit.
Be My witness."
When He's blessing me,
He's taken up,
Ascended to the Father,
Living for me.
SOL2_26.name: His Unforgettable Appearing

HC1_26.content:
1. When the enemies accuse me,
The Lord saves me to the end.
When the world tries to tempt me,
The Lord saves me to then end.
When I don't have any strength,
The Lord saves me to the end.
When I'm down and my heart fails,
My Lord stretches out His hand
To save me.

2. When I'm weak and I fall,
His love stays the same.
When I feel I am not good,
His love stays the same.
When I lose hope and despair,
His love stays the same.
When I feel God has left me,
His love always
Stays the same.

Chorus:
I don't want to rely on myself,
But trust in His unchanging love.
His love is always the same
Let me not be afraid of the enemies or failures,
But trust in Him. He'll save me to the end.
HC1_26.name: The Lord's Love is the Same. He Saves Me to the End.

HC2_26.content:
The angel showed me the river
Of the water of life, bright as crystal,
Flowing from the throne of God
And of the Lamb in the middle of its street.
On either side of the river was
The tree of life bearing twelve kinds of fruit.

2. The tree yields its fruit every month;
Its leaves are for the healing of the nations.
There'll be no more curse, and in the city
There will be the throne of God and of the Lamb.
And His servants will serve Him.
They will see His face. They will see His face.

3. His name will be on their foreheads.
His name will be on their foreheads.
Night will be no more. Night will be no more.
They will need no lamp nor light of the sun,
For the Lord God will be their light,
And they will reign forever and ever.
HC2_26.name: The Eternal Bliss

GFH2_27.content:
Is there any love as Lord Your love,
More lasting than the universe?
Through all the ages Your thoughts for me
Outnumber the sand of the sea.
Hark, the voice of my Beloved!
Behold, from heaven He came.
To find me He came from heaven.
And took the form of a slave.
Why for me a homeless life You lived,
Acquaint’d with pain and grief?
I retrace in Bethany
Before the tomb You did weep.

God’s love is the same to the end.
Behold the perfect Son of Man,
Without a trace of changing shadow,
He’s gentle and mild even now.
His gaze is tender and charming,
Draws me from wandering.
It melts my heart, it melts my heart,
It melts my unyielding heart.
Why You had a marred and grieved form,
No place to lay Your head?
I retrace on the cruel cross
Your love that overcame death.

I have to give thanks, I am amazed,
Such love in this world I’ve obtained.
To me steadfast and unchanging,
It’s You who’s ever-loving.
Your love that great waters cannot quench,
Deserves all my heart to gain.
GFH2_27.name: The Steadfast Love

GFH1_27.content:
*Alas! and did my Savior bleed?
And did my Sov’reign die,
Would He devote that sacred head
For such a worm as I?*

1. Was it for crime that I had done
He groaned upon the tree?
Amazing pity! grace unknown!
And love beyond degree!

2. Well might the sun in darkness hide
And shut his glories in,
When Christ the Mighty Maker died
For man, the creature’s sin.

3. Thus might I hide my blushing face
While His dear cross appears,
Dissolve my heart in thankfulness;
And melt mine eyes to tears.

4. But drops of grief can ne’er repay
The debt of love I owe;
Here, Lord, I give myself away;
‘Tis all that I can do.
GFH1_27.name: Alas! And Did My Savior Bleed?

SOL1_28.content:
1. In the middle of the lampstands
One like the Son of Man,
Clothed a robe reaching to the feet,
Gird'd on His chest a golden band.
His head and hair were white like wool,
As white as snow.
His eyes were like a flame of fire,
His eyes were like a flame of fire.

2. His feet were like fine brass,
as if refined in a furnace.
His voice was like sound of waters;
His right hand held seven stars.
Out of His mouth came a sharp sword,
A sharp two-edged sword.
His countenance was like the sun
Shining in its strength, in its strength.

3. When I saw Him, I fell at His feet
Like a dead man, like a dead man.
He placed His right hand on me saying,
"Don't be afraid. Don't be afraid.
I am the First, I am the Last. I was dead and behold,
I am alive forevermore. I am alive forevermore.

4. And I have, and I have the keys of Hades and of death."
O Death, where is your victory? Where is your victory?
O Death, O Death, where is your sting?
Where is your sting?
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
The glorious Lord has overcome death!
SOL1_28.name: The Glorious Risen Lord

referenceSongs.name: 榮耀復活主（啟一13-18；林前十五55）

GBH_28.content:
I can face the world with Jesus.
I can face today and tomorrow
With the risen Lord!
Through storms, through life's billows,
Through the night, long dark valley,
Across the sea, over the mountain,
He leads me to glory.
He'll walk with me through my life-long journey
Till I see His face!
He'll carry me through my life-long journey
Till I see His face!
GBH_28.name: I Can Face All with Jesus

HC1_28.content:
1. The church is the family of God.
We all have a part in it.
God is our true Abba.
The Lord is our dear Brother.
We were once strangers,
Now we're one family. How sweet!

2. The church is the family of God.
We love one another.
We meet in the Lord's name.
He is greatly with us.
He supplies all our needs.
He has promised to bless us.

Chorus:
This is the warmest home.
This is the sweetest home.
This is the most joyful home.
This is the best home.
HC1_28.name: The Lovely Family of God

HC2_28.content:
And they overcame him by the blood of the Lamb,
By the word of their testimony.
They did not love their life even when faced with death,
Blessing and glory
To the Lamb who was once slain,
To the Lamb forever and ever.
HC2_28.name: The Blood of the Lamb - the Foundation of Victory
tags: Fruit of the Cross. Glorious Salvation

referenceSongs.name: 羔羊的血──勝仇敵的根基
羔羊的血——勝仇敵的根基

GBH_29.content:
1. "To live in my heart" is Your sweet love dream,
Your love desire, Your longing of love.
"To live in my heart" manifests Your heart.
Your love to me is God's burning flame!
Love desires to be nearest forever.
Hearts offer hearts! Hearts live in hearts!

2. "To live in my heart" is Your ultimate choice.
You set Your love forever on me.
Tis Your love choice, Your eternal joy.
My heart is Your sweet dwelling place.
Tis Your fairest paradise, heaven!
Your fairest heart is my heaven, my home!
GBH_29.name: Living in My Heart

SOL2_29.content:
*Chorus:
My dearest Lord, may You come soon!
May You return quickly from the blue.
Bright Morning Star, may You come soon!
Take me to the clouds to meet with You.*

Lord, I have been waiting for so long,
Even dark hair has become grey.
The night of this world is far spent,
How much longer should all groan and wait?

*Chorus:
My dearest Lord, may You come soon!
May You return quickly from the blue.
Bright Morning Star, may You come soon!
Take me to the clouds to meet with You.*

2. You should guard your heart with all your strength,
Watching, waiting for His coming.
Strive for God, abound in His work,
For our toil in Him is not in vain.

*Chorus:
My dearest Lord, may You come soon!
May You return quickly from the blue.
Bright Morning Star, may You come soon!
Take me to the clouds to meet with You.*

3. Things of this world will soon pass away.
The night's far spent, the dawn's at hand.
Lift our heads and bravely march on.
Run the race for Him unto the end.
SOL2_29.name: Strive Till He Comes

GFH1_29.content:
1. To Calvary, Lord, in spirit now
Our weary souls repair,
To dwell upon Thy dying love,
And taste its sweetness there.

2. Sweet resting-place of every heart
That feels the plague of sin,
Yet knows the deep, mysterious joy
Of peace with God within.

3. There, through Thine hour of deepest woe,
Thy suffering spirit passed;
Grace there its wondrous victory gained,
And endured its last.

4. O Lamb of God! Thy bleeding wounds,
With cords of love divine,
Have drawn our willing hearts to Thee,
And linked our life to Thine.

5. Our longing eyes would fain behold
That bright and blessed brow,
Once wrung with bitterest anguish, wear
Its crown of glory now.

6. Thy sympathies and hopes are ours:
We long, O Lord, to see
Creation all – below, above,
Redeemed and blessed by Thee.
GFH1_29.name: To Calv’ry, Lord, In Spirit Now

SOL3_29.content:
You love me, Infinite LORD,
I am Your love dream!
You love me, Infinite LORD,
I love You most!
You and I, though so distant,
You have bridged the gap.
You raise me to be Your
Most compatible beloved,
Compatible beloved.
SOL3_29.name: The Infinite One Loves Me, I am His Love Dream

referenceSongs.name: The Infinite One Loves Me; I am His Love Dream

HC2_29.content:
"Sing, my spirit!"
My response to "It's finished!" - Great is the Lord!
By Lord Jesus, I've got perfect salvation,
Become child of God!
Taste the Father's eternal love, full acceptance,
Fore'er I can drink from His vast ocean of grace!

2. "Be bold and free!" —
My response to "It's finished!" - Worship with joy!
How beautiful and precious is God's heart!
How sweet is His love!
O' by His cross all the hindrance is removed;
Now I long to draw closer to my dearest Lord!

3. "Shout for joy!" —
My response to "It's finished!" - Hallelujah!
The Lord's risen, ascended to God's right hand,
To be my High Priest!
Now the Father accepts me as He does the Lord;
Christ carries me. He appears for me before God.

4. "Be full of faith" —
My response to "It's finished!" - Fearless and bold!
The Lord has solved my greatest problem of life!
I have perfect peace.
He has gained all authority in heaven, on earth!
His grace must be more than sufficient for me!

5. "Fully love Him!"
My response to "It's finished" - Rightly I should!
The Lord bought me with His blood to be His own,
His love moves my heart!
With the highest and whole-hearted love He loves me!
O', how precious, I'll respond to Him with my love!
HC2_29.name: My Response to "It's Finished"

SOL1_30.content:
I strive even among daily chores,
In quietness live for You;
I strive even life’s busy and tight,
Lord, I still walk with You.
I strive despite the world’s corrupt course,
I’m sanctified to You.
I strive on! O’ Lord, for You I live.

2. I strive even in doubts and worries;
Let You comfort my heart.
I strive mid the storms of temptation,
Lord, keep my heart sincere.
I strive in the days of affliction,
My love to You I give.
I strive on! O’ Lord, for You I live.

3. O’ Lord, I know that You love me,
I have captured Your heart!
How precious Your favour, tender love,
That’s why I’m striving still!
Forget not You chose, commissioned me;
I’m glad to know Your will.
I strive on! O’ Lord, for You I live.
SOL1_30.name: Strive for the Lord

GFH2_30.content:
1. Rock of Ages cleft for me!
Precious blood was shed for me!
Cleansed me of my guilt and sin,
Cleared away thick clouds and mist;
Your love and blood, the best balm,
Heal the wounds deep in my heart.

2. Rock of Ages cleft for me!
Precious blood was shed for me!
Washed me whiter than the snow,
Even brighter than crystal.
The Father opens His arms,
Welcomes me back to His fold.

3. Rock of Ages cleft for me!
Precious blood was shed for me!
Cast away my fears and doubts,
Bestow me sufficient faith.
Boldly to the Holiest,
Father’s bosom is my place.

4. Rock of Ages cleft for me!
Precious veil is rent for me!
Let me see the Father’s face,
Enjoy His full acceptance;
Ever live in cloudless morn,
Abide in the Holy Place.

5. Rock of Ages cleft for me!
Your wounds are my hiding place,
Rest and shelter of my heart,
Shield me from tempest and charge.
No more shadows and dark clouds,
I rejoice in Your embrace.

6. Rock of Ages cleft for me!
Let me hide e’er in Your heart;
Fully taste fruit of the cross,
Daily drink of Your great love;
No more shadows, no more doubt,
My heart is drawn after You.
GFH2_30.name: His Wounds My Hiding Place
tags: Fruit of the Cross. Glorious Salvation

GBH_30.content:
1. Yahweh is my shepherd; I shall not want.
He makes me lie down in green pastures;
He leads me beside still waters.
He restores, re-stores my soul:
He leads me, He leads me in the paths of righteousness
For His name's sake, for His name's sake.

2. Though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death,
I'll fear no evil; for You are with me;
Your rod and Your staff, Your rod and Your staff,
They comfort me, comfort me.
You prepare a table before me, in the presence of my enemies.
You anoint my head with oil. My cup overflows, overflows.
Surely goodness, mercy shall follow, follow me
All the days, all the days of my life;
I shall dwell in the house of Yahweh forever.
*Ps. 2. :1. 6*
GBH_30.name: Yahweh is My Shepherd

SOL3_30.content:
As the heavens are high above the earth,
As the heavens are high above the earth,
So great is His mercy, His lovingkindness
For those who fear Him!
As far as the east is from the west,
As far as the east is from the west,
So far has He removed
Our transgressions from us.
As a father shows compassion to His children,
Yah-weh shows compassion to those who fear Him.
For He knows our frame, our form;
He remembers that we are but dust.
He desires mercy, not sacrifice.
His tender mercies will never fail.
Yes they are new, new every morning!
Your mercies, Lord, endure fore'er!
Beloved Lord, You love's so tender.
Your eternity and mine
are bound as one forevermore!
And You and I are joined as one!
Lord, Your mercy, compassion and Your love
Will never end!
The depths of Your heart is my rest!
SOL3_30.name: As the Heavens Are High Above the Earth (You Desire Mercy, Not Sacrifice)

referenceSongs.name: 永恆主的憐憫，永不止息！ 啊，神憐憫的心腸！
As Misericórdias Eternas do Senhor não têm Fim

HC1_30.content:
1. Before all creations,
God has been in control.
Before time, before space,
God has been working.
His love, His power,
His goodness are always there.
O' He is the
Wonderful Creator.

2. Before all, there is love
Amid the Trinity.
They make plans, They have fellowship,
They have the best design.
He made men, He made all,
He made God's family appear. 
O' This is God's
Beautiful love plan.

3. O' Father, I give thanks
I am Your dearest child.
Lord, thank You, You have brought me
Back to the Father.
The Spirit has come.
Now we can embrace with God.
O' We have the
Deepest union with God.
HC1_30.name: The Trinity and I

SOL2_31.content:
I put my faith in the glorious God.
He's able to raise the dead the Lord of life.
I put my faith in the glorious God.
He can make all from nothing the Creator!

2. He's full of life, He's full of might.
He gives life to my spirit when I am down.
He has the pow'r of resurrection.
He gives strength to my spirit when I am weak.

3. He is the God who gives me hope.
He's my song, He is my strength. He makes me smile.
He is the God who gives me joy.
He has turned my mourning into dancing.

4. In the wilderness, He lays a feast.
He can make rivers flow in the desert.
I have hope in all circumstances.
Ha! Ha! Ha! Almighty God is my Abba!

5. O' my brethren, lift up your head.
Your Abba, almighty God, loves you the most.
O' my brethren, march on forward!
Your Abba, almighty God, holds your hand.
(Your Abba, almighty God, carries you.)
SOL2_31.name: He is the God Who Gives Me Hope
tags: Victoriously Overcome Satan. Spirit Set Free

referenceSongs.name: Ele é o Deus que me dá esperança

GFH1_31.content:
1. Gazing on the Lord in glory,
While our hearts in worship bow,
There we read the wondrous story
Of the cross – its shame and woe.

2. Every mark of dark dishonour
Heaped upon Thy thorn-crowned brow,
All the depths of Thy heart’s sorrow
Told in answering glory now.

3. On that cross, alone, forsaken,
Where no pitying eye was found;
Now to God’s right hand exalted,
With Thy praise, the heavens resound.

4. Did Thy God e’en then forsake Thee,
Hid His face from Thy deep need?
In Thy face, once marred and smitten.
All His glory now we read.

5. Gazing on it we adore Thee,
Blessed, precious, holy Lord;
Thou, the Lamb, art ever worthy;
This be earth’s and heaven’s accord.
GFH1_31.name: Gazing On The Lord In Glory

HC2_31.content:
Though I am in the crowd,
In the busy and bustling place,
I always enjoy
Your attention on me:
Since eternity You have set Your
Gaze of love on me.
HC2_31.name: Your Full Attention

SOL1_32.content:
My dear Lord, day and night You're by my side;
All the years You've carried me,
Through floods and fires,
In the north wind and dark night,
On the path of easy life,
Walk in love hand in hand You and I.
Your calling and Your will can I deny?
I will run after You all my life.
Thank You that You have revealed
Such a love so high and deep!
Lord, Your love on the cross compels me.
When I look on to the fields,
Harvest plentiful and white;
Lord, revive my heart anew!
Can it be that I should let You grieve in zeal?
'Tis my plea, my Lord, for You I live!
Loving You, I'll press on towards the goal!
SOL1_32.name: What a Friendship the Lord with Me

referenceSongs.name: Que Amizade entre o Senhor e Eu

GFH2_32.content:
1. Behold, the veil is rent!
The Father runs to me;
He embraces and kisses me;
In His bosom so sweet.

*Chorus :
Deeper than the sea,
His love e’er will be!
In His sea of grace I live,
Drink from salvation fount.*

2. The lost son has returned,
The Father lays a feast.
Dancing, rejoicing, He’s merry.
In His delight I live.

*Chorus :
Deeper than the sea,
His love e’er will be!
In His sea of grace I live,
Drink from salvation fount.*

3. The lost son has returned.
There’s no more wandering;
The Father’s love captures my heart.
I mind only His things.

*Chorus :
Deeper than the sea,
His love e’er will be!
In His sea of grace I live,
Drink from salvation fount.*

4. The Cross removed hindrance,
Opened the gate of grace;
The Father’s love from heaven pours,
Fills up my thirsty heart.

*Chorus :
Deeper than the sea,
His love e’er will be!
In His sea of grace I live,
Drink from salvation fount.*

5. The Cross removed hindrance;
His wondrous grace I taste;
Living water from heaven flows,
Becomes a spring in me.

*Chorus :
Deeper than the sea,
His love e’er will be!
In His sea of grace I live,
Drink from salvation fount.*

6. Behold, the veil is rent!
I see the Father’s face;
Talking with Him so glad and free,
How warm and sweet to me.

*Chorus :
Deeper than the sea,
His love e’er will be!
In His sea of grace I live,
Drink from salvation fount.*

7. Behold, the veil is rent!
I see His boundless love;
The Holiest‘s my dwelling place.
I stay before His face.

*Chorus :
Deeper than the sea,
His love e’er will be!
In His sea of grace I live,
Drink from salvation fount.*

8. Behold, the veil is rent!
Christ’s at the Father’s right;
I see His glory, face unveiled,
Am changed to like Him be.

*Chorus :
Deeper than the sea,
His love e’er will be!
In His sea of grace I live,
Drink from salvation fount.*

9. Behold, the veil is rent!
In heaven sit with Him,
I share the Father’s face of love,
Enjoy cloudless mornings.

*Chorus :
Deeper than the sea,
His love e’er will be!
In His sea of grace I live,
Drink from salvation fount.*
GFH2_32.name: Behold, The Veil Is Rent!
tags: Fruit of the Cross. Glorious Salvation

GBH_32.content:
1. Lord Jesus, I love You! 
Lord, You died for me.
You made me white as snow, 
Your heart's fairest jewel.
You brought me from darkness
Into Your marvelous light.
You have changed my life.
I'm forever Yours!
You're forever mine!

2. Lord Jesus, I love You! 
Lord, You died for me.
You're my life. 
You're my song, sweetest portion.
You're my guide, my good shepherd,
My strong rock, my rest.
You're my hope, my morning star,
My Beloved, my all!
You're forever mine!
GBH_32.name: Lord Jesus, I Love You

referenceSongs.name: Lord Jesus, I Love You 主耶穌我愛祢

HC1_32.content:
No fears, no worries! Don't feel down.
Don't be deceived. (No!)
Think-ing: "I am not good"
"The Lord does not love me"
"I have lost the battle"
They are lies from the enemies.
The Lord has proclaimed, "It is finished!"
We are on the winning side!
In the Lord's, in the Lord's name,
Cast the enemies away.
Ha! Ha! Ha!
Trust in the words of God.
The truth has set us free.
The truth gives us hope and strength!
HC1_32.name: We are on the Winning Side

referenceSongs.name: We are on the Winning Side

HC2_32.content:
The Father in heaven is my true Abba,
I shall not want. I shall not want.
He makes me lean on His bosom.
He makes me rest in His love, His affection.
He comforts my heart. He restores my soul.
He leads me in the everlasting way.
For His name's sake, for His glorious will, He
Leads me in the finishing way.
Though I have walked through trails, floods and fires,
I fear no evil for You are with me.
Abba, Your big hand holds my little hand.
Your big hand always holds tight my little hand.
Your tender love and care warm my heart.
You prepare a feast before my enemies.
You make me rejoice in all afflictions.
You give me countless blessings.
I have endless gifts each day.
You give me the Spirit to nurture me,
To enjoy Your love, to be glorious,
To taste the Lord's love. My cup runs over.
Rivers of living water flow from my heart.
Every day of my life, Your mercy and love,
Your affection will follow me.
I will dwell in Your sweet home.
I'll reign with You forever.
HC2_32.name: Abba Shepherds Me Till Eternity

referenceSongs.name: 阿爸、父眷愛、牧養我一生到永恆

SOL2_33.content:
1. Smile all the day, for You are by my side.
Smile all the day, for Your love surrounds me.
I'm of good cheer even in various trials,
For You are holding all authority.

2. While I'm tempted, let me smile to You still,
For You've overcome the world and the foes!
Your grace's enough. The Spirit gives me life.
You uphold me walking on life's billows!

3. You carry me through the days of trouble.
Even in battles, I can smile by You.
Pressed by the foes, I still see Your face.
Before the foes, You lay a feast for me.

4. With You I pass through floods and flames in life;
Our friendship deepens as the days go by.
Suff'ring with You makes sweetest memories.
It works for me the eternal glory.

5. My dear brethren, we can only live once.
Let's bear the cross for Him in this brief life.
Break my vial, offer Him perfume today.
Anoint Him with love, give our heart to Him.
SOL2_33.name: Smile for the Lord
tags: Victoriously Overcome Satan. Spirit Set Free

GFH1_33.content:
1. Jesus, Thy head, once crowned with thorns,
Is crowned with glory now;
Heav’ns royal diadem adorns
The mighty Victor’s brow.

2. Thou glorious light of courts above,
Joy of the saints below,
To us still manifest Thy love,
That we its depths may know.

3. To us Thy cross with all its shame,
With all its grace be giv’n;
Though earth disowns Thy lovely name,
God honors it in heav’n.

4. Who suffer with Thee, Lord, below,
Shall reign with Thee above;
Then let it be our joy to know
Thy way of peace and love.

5. To us Thy cross is life and health;
Though shame and death to Thee;
Our present glory, joy and wealth,
Our everlasting stay.
GFH1_33.name: Thy Head, Once Crowned With Thorns

SOL3_33.content:
1. You desire to eat the Passover with
Your disciples that night.
Now You eagerly desire to
Break the bread with us.
You've revealed Your heart to us
And Your manifold love!
O the Spirit leads us to
Worship and remember You.

2. Blood You shed, and "Finished!" You declared.
This new cov'nant You've sealed.
Far exceeding time and space is Your
Glorious vict'ry of love!
O the Marriage of the Lamb
Is our longing of love.
We will toast and celebrate
In the kingdom of God!

3. Let us celebrate and let's enjoy
Your great vict'ry of love!
Till eternity, I'll treasure most
You're my true Beloved.
Brothers, sisters, raise a toast
With this blessed cup,
Sweetly taste the covenant,
Love Him all our lives!
SOL3_33.name: You Fervently Desire to Have Your Supper With Us
SOL3_33.translatedBy: Joanne Lok, Phoebe Cheung, Hymn Editing Team

referenceSongs.name: 主，祢太切願與我們擘餅聚會甜相會

SOL1_34.content:
1. In the silent night sky, stars twinkling bright,
In the town of Bethlehem my Saviour's born.
Lying in a manger, wrapped in cloths,
My Lord came in the flesh and blood.

*Chorus:
The Lord loved me and became flesh,
Fully understands my troubles.
He became a Man. He feels what I feel.
He's full of compassion and love.*

2. He once lived on the earth. He once was tired.
He once was thirsty, hungry, sad and angry.
His heart was once pierced through. He once did weep.
He once suffered all pains for me.

*Chorus:
The Lord loved me and became flesh,
Fully understands my troubles.
He became a Man. He feels what I feel.
He's full of compassion and love.*
SOL1_34.name: The Lord in the Flesh and Blood

GFH2_34.content:
1. "Sit at My right!" - the Father’s glad response to
"It is finished!"
He has given the Lord all authority,
Highly exalt’d Him,
And given Him the name which is above all names.
O how precious, forever I’m joined to the Lord!

2. "It is finished!" - the Lord’s great proclamation!
Full victory!
His victory now becomes my victory.
By Him I am rich.
The Lord is pleased to share with me all His glory,
I’ll sit with Him on His throne till eternity.
GFH2_34.name: “It Is Finished‚” And “Sit At My Right”
tags: Fruit of the Cross. Glorious Salvation

GBH_34.content:
1. The desire of God and man 
is the warmest loving home,
Full of fragrance of love, 
songs of joy everywhere!
This home of warmth and grace, 
overflows with rivers of love.
This home is God and man's 
eternal joy and resting place!
Home, sweet, sweet home!
The hearts of God and man 
embrace in oneness in His home.

2. Through all eternity, 
in God's plan, the core is "home".
O the Father, the Son 
and the Spirit gave all for this.
The Lord came down to Earth, 
and was nailed upon the cross.
God's heart was pierced through; 
He gave Him self without reserve!
Home, sweet, sweet home!
It's my vision, my goal, 
eternal joy, and my sweet rest.

3. God's dearest love dream, 
the hidden myst'ry of ages past
Was disclosed before me, 
I've gained the treasure of my life!
So precious, now I know 
the deep myst'ry of the universe!
I treasure this goal of life, 
'tis my hope and 'tis my dream!
Home, sweet, sweet home!
The hearts of God and man 
overflow with joy in His home!

4. Through all eternity, 
and throughout the universe,
It's only in this home, 
God and man rest satisfied!
The abundance of God's 
house is beyond our wildest dream!
God reveals His glorious heart 
in His lovely family.
Home, sweet, sweet home!
God's fullness, richest grace 
overflows from His love-filled home.

5. One day God's city 
descends to the beautiful New Earth!
Every tear He'll wipe away; 
no more mourning, death or pain.
The dwelling place of God 
will forever be with man.
This city of pure gold 
shines forth beams like jasper stone.
Home, sweet, sweet home!
This masterpiece of God, 
ever is the model of His love.

6. The abode of God and man 
is the city of pure gold.
It's adorned with precious stones, 
lovely pearls as"welcome gates".
Its lamp is the Lamb. 
We will reign eternally.
The city shines and glows 
in the New Heaven and New Earth.
Home, sweet, sweet home!
This ocean of God's love 
ever ripples with echoes of love!
There's no end to His love dream; 
we will reign forevermore.
GBH_34.name: God’s Sweet Home

HC1_34.content:
1. The Lord said, "Do this in remembrance of Me."
On that night, He commanded us
That we would not forget, we would not forget
The Lord was born for us,
He died for us,
He suffered for us, He gave His all.
We don't forget that He pours out all His love for us.

2. The Lord said, "Do this in remembrance of Me."
On that night, earnestly the Lord
Desired us to always remember
His salvation grace, His salvation grace.
We remember His heart is always for us.
We remember one day we'll meet the Lord in the clouds!
HC1_34.name: We Come to Remember the Lord

SOL1_35.content:
1. For love, You came from heaven to the earth.
You were born in a manger.
You became the son of a carpenter.
But for love, Lord, You came.

2. For love, You endured various temptations.
You had no place to lay Your head.
When You were weary, You thought of my needs.
And for love, Lord, You came.

3. For love, You're willing to bear all the shame.
You were spat on the face.
You bore all the stripes, wore the crown of thorns.
But for love, Lord, You came.

4. For love, You were willing to be nailed.
You bore my sins on the cross.
For me, You were forsaken by God.
But for love, Lord, You came.

5. For love, You've overcome all pains and trials.
Lord, I want to follow You.
May I love the world with You all my life.
For Your love I'll go forward.
SOL1_35.name: For Love, Lord, You Came

GFH2_35.content:
1. Christ arose from the dead!
The stone was rolled away;
O what a joyous, glorious news,
The angels did proclaim,
He is not here, He is not here,
For He is risen, For He is risen, as He said

2. Christ arose from the dead!
And death was swallowed up!
Satan who had the pow’r of death
Forever was destroyed.
Christ holds the key of death,
Set free those who fear death;
O Death, where is your sting?
O Hades, where ‘s your victory?

3. Christ arose from the dead!
And death was swallowed up!
He brought life and immortality
To light so gloriously.
He fills my life with hope,
With meaning and bounty.
It is so sweet - the risen Lord
Is now living with me!
GFH2_35.name: Christ Arose From The Dead

SOL2_35.content:
I should praise God every day.
Then I live the normal way.
Great is the Lord and highly to be praised.
His greatness can't be measured.

2. I should praise God every day,
Consider His love and grace.
My heart is strengthened and always fervent,
Till His glorious return.

3. I should praise God every day,
Look upon His glorious face,
Give praises of faith. Weakness becomes strength.
Shut the mouth of enemies.

4. I should praise God every day,
Glorify His name always.
Shout for joy, clap hands, sing praise and dance.
Rejoice before Him always.
SOL2_35.name: A Life of Praise

GFH1_35.content:
1. Glory to God on high!
Let heav’n and earth reply,
“Praise ye His name!”
The Lord of love adore
Who all our sorrows bore;
Sing loud forevermore,
“Worthy the Lamb!”

2. While they around the throne
Cheerfully join in one,
Praising His name –
Ye who have felt His blood
Sealing your peace with God,
Sound His dear name abroad,
“Worthy the Lamb!”

3. Join, all ye ransomed race,
Our Lord and God to bless;
Praise ye His name!
In Him we will rejoice,
And make a joyful noise,
Shouting with heart and voice,
“Worthy the Lamb!”

4. What though we change our place,
Yet we shall never cease
Praising His name;
To Him our songs we bring,
Hail Him our gracious King,
And without ceasing sing,
“Worthy the Lamb!”
GFH1_35.name: Glory To God On High

SOL3_35.content:
1. God, You made a cov'nant with me,
O my heart is moved!
Lord, You used Your precious blood to seal
This new cov'nant of love.
All my lawless deeds
Your remember no more.
All my shadows you removed.
I can rest in You.
I can freely draw close to You
And enjoy You.

2. O the glorious, better cov’nant
Stands forever firm!
Gloriously I’m born again of God,
Made compatible to Him,
To be Abba’s dearest child
And the darling of Christ,
To enjoy eternal life,
To know God and Christ.

3. Lord, You are a Man forever,
Your love touches my heart!
You with fervour went up to the cross.
You were smitten by God.
With Your blood You have made
A love cov’nant with me,
That we’ll have a union
Of love and life.

4. O the Son of God with His blood
Made a cov’nant of love,
Now and ever, I belong to Him
As His ultimate love.
With this better covenant
That surpasses all else,
God’s achieved the purpose and dream
Hidden in God’s heart.

5. You’re the guarantor of this new cov’nant for all time!
God’s love cov’nant and His dream of love
Are gloriously fulfilled!
You retain Your scar of love to declare fore’er
That You will cherish our love forevermore.

O the Holy Trinity
Made a cov'nant with me!
I will have the fullest faith
To enjoy Your love!
God has made a cov'nant with me.
O my heart is moved!
SOL3_35.name: The Trinity Made the Eternal New Covenant With Me

referenceSongs.name: 無限者三一神竟與我立永遠新約
O Deus Infinito, a Trindade fez uma nova aliança eterna comigo

HC1_35.content:
1. What do you see? Why do I have so little
But others have so so much?
Why is that? It is not fair!
How can I have a better life?
When will I have a better life?
Turn your eyes and see God's will.
He richly provides us
With every good thing.
He is fully involved in our life.
He surely give me the best. He will
Give me the best.

2. What do you see? Wicked people have prospered;
Those who do good are not reward'd.
Why is that? It is not fair!
How can I have a better life?
When will I have a better life?
Turn your eyes and see God's plan.
He looks down from heaven
And He knows all things.
At His time He'll repay each person
For what he's done. He'll reward you for the
goodness of your heart.

3. What do you see? Gold and silver, jewelry,
Lavish feasts, fine food and fancy clothes.
Why is that? It is not fair!
How can I have a better life?
When will I have a better life?
Turn your eyes and see God's hand.
He has opened
The gate of heaven.
He has poured down spiritual blessings
Into your heart. The glory of the Lord
Surrounds, surrounds you.
God is with you now.
He's with you forever.
HC1_35.name: What do You See?

HC2_35.content:
Sufficient is a day for its own trouble.
Your yoke indeed is easy and light.
I cast all my loads on You.
You will comfort me.
This is the day that You have made.
By You I shall rejoice.
I enjoy walking with You every step of the way.
There's a beautiful purpose in it.
Let Your heart and mind be harmonized.
You mould me. You have the highest purpose on me.
In every moment Your love thoughts towards me
Are so precious and countless.
Your extraordinary thoughts are
In my every ordinary day.
Every moment is a success.
It's not in vain.
By You, I can rejoice, give thanks for all.
I always live before You.
HC2_35.name: Enjoy Walking Each Step with the Lord

referenceSongs.name: 與主同享每一步的路程
與主同享每一步的路程
與主同享每一步的路程

GFH2_36.content:
At dawn He’s risen! Bright morn light shines,
Drives off the world’s dark night.
The glorious Lord parts from the grave,
Wipes all sorrows away.
The world has hope hence forth! *(Hurray!)*
And I can boast to the end! *(Hurray!)*
The risen Lord has conquered death,
1. A glorious hope He gives. *(Wonderful!)* 
2. Takes all my fears a - way. *(Wonderful!)*
What a boastful hope He gives! *(Hallelujah!)*
GFH2_36.name: The Dawn

SOL2_36.content:
O' most beautiful among women,
What is your beloved more than other beloved,
What is your beloved more than other beloved,
O' fairest one, that you so charge us?

My beloved's dazzling and ruddy,
Outstanding among ten thousand.
His head is the finest gold, pure gold;
His locks are wavy, his locks are wavy,
Black as a raven.
His eyes as doves by the rivers,
With milk, they're washed and fitly set.
A bed of spices, 
banks of scented herbs are his cheeks.
His lips are like lilies,
Dripping liquid myrrh.
His hands are like the rods of gold
And set with beryl.
His body is as carved ivory,
Inlaid with sapphires.
His legs, pillars of marble,
Set on bases of fine gold.
His bearing as Lebanon,
Excellent as the cedars.
His mouth is full of sweetness,
He's altogether lovely.
O' daughters of Jerusalem,
This is my beloved and this is my friend.

O' most beautiful among women,
Where about has your beloved gone?
Where has your beloved turned aside?
We will seek him together with you,
We will seek him together with you.
SOL2_36.name: Enjoy the Lord (Song 5:9-6:1)

SOL1_37.content:
1. "He loved me and died for me!"
Consider this grace
That changes all my life,
Gives me hope and joy!
Lord, Your great and tender love
Heals the wounds of men;
Yet, You were oft despised,
Acquainted with grief.

*Chorus:
On the cross You bled and died,
To ransom my soul.
Your heart was wounded for me!
There's a living way
To the Father's fold!
Think'ng of Your love, I'm moved to tears.*

2. You were forsaken for me
Both by God and men;
Lonely, You prayed that night
In great agony!
Silently, You bore the cross,
Walked to Calvary,
Bled all the way, and were lifted on the tree!

*Chorus:
On the cross You bled and died,
To ransom my soul.
Your heart was wounded for me!
There's a living way
To the Father's fold!
Think'ng of Your love, I'm moved to tears.*
SOL1_37.name: Consider This Grace
tags: The Lord Died on the Cross

GFH2_37.content:
1. He’s risen! He’s risen!
Jesus has conquered death!
My Lord is risen,
He has conquered Satan.
My Lord Jesus has saved me;
My Saviour has set me free.

*Chorus:
So let us sing! Hallelujah!
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!*

2. He’s ascended on high!
He’s ascended to heav’n!
He’s given glory,
That is above all things.
He’s living up there for me;
He’s holding authority.

*Chorus:
So let us sing! Hallelujah!
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!*

3. He’s ascended on high!
He’s ascended to heav’n!
He’s thinking of me;
He is praying for me.
Preparing a home for me,
How He longs to receive me!

*Chorus:
So let us sing! Hallelujah!
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!*

4. He’s coming! He’s coming!
He promised to come soon.
To meet me in the clouds,
Ever to be with Him.
He has kept rewards for me,
And prepared a wedding feast!

*Chorus:
So let us sing! Hallelujah!
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!*

5. Dear Lord of my heart!
May You come soon, come soon!
Then I’ll stay by Your side,
O how happy and sweet!
In the City stroll with You,
By the River walk with You.

*Chorus:
So let us sing! Hallelujah!
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!*
GFH2_37.name: Risen! Ascended! Coming!

GFH1_37.content:
1. Jesus, keep me near the cross,
There a precious fountain
Free to all, a healing stream,
Flows from Calv’ry’s mountain.

*Refrain:
In the cross, in the cross,
Be my glory ever;
Till my raptured soul shall find
Rest beyond the river.*

2. Near the cross, a trembling soul,
Love and mercy found me;
There the Bright and Morning Star
Sheds its beams around me.

*Refrain:
In the cross, in the cross,
Be my glory ever;
Till my raptured soul shall find
Rest beyond the river.*

3. Near the cross! O Lamb of God,
Bring its scenes before me;
Help me walk from day to day
With its shadows o’er me.

*Refrain:
In the cross, in the cross,
Be my glory ever;
Till my raptured soul shall find
Rest beyond the river.*

4. Near the cross I’ll watch and wait,
Hoping, trusting ever,
Till I reach the golden strand
Just beyond the river.

*Refrain:
In the cross, in the cross,
Be my glory ever;
Till my raptured soul shall find
Rest beyond the river.*
GFH1_37.name: Near The Cross

HC1_37.content:
My Abba, not only did You give me a playground
That is full of fun and wonder,
But You play with me. We’re so happy.
We are happy together.
My Abba, not only did You plan for my life -
It’s such a unique story,
But You’re committed. You walk with me every step.
You’re always guiding me.
You give me light, a helping hand.
We walk through every valley and climb every mountain.
You won’t go away or leave me
After providing for all my needs.
You treasure to be my eternal Abba,
To live with me now and forever.
You long for the fam’ly joy, and we can be heart to heart.
Your commitment has made
This deepest affection come true.
HC1_37.name: Abba, You are Committed to My Life

referenceSongs.name: Aba, Você é comprometido com minha vida

HC2_37.content:
What shall I render to the Lord
For His love and commission for me?
All my life I will love Him only,
Give Him my love in the vineyards.
I'll worship, give thanks, sing and dance for Him,
I'll follow my dear Lord by His side.
I will strive for Him all my life.
(Follow Him till I see His face.)
HC2_37.name: What Shall I Render to the Lord's Love

GBH_38.content:
O Lord Beloved, I long to see You!
Dearest Lord, O may You come soon!
Now on the Earth I live for You,
Your commission to fulfill,
Strive for Your purpose, Your love dream.

2. O Lord Beloved, I long to see You!
Dearest Lord, O may You come soon!
Now on the Earth I live for You,
To bring millions to You,
And build the church after Your heart.
GBH_38.name: Live for Him and His Purpose

HC2_38.content:
You and I have one precious message.
You and I have one everlasting way.
You and I have one glorious goal.
Let's share with all brethren.
(Let's share with all churches.)
O' come Let us walk the everlasting way.
Let us follow the trail of the flock -
With the same heart and same footsteps.
Press on toward the goal!
(Finish the Lord's commission!)
(Wait for our dear Lord with joy!)
HC2_38.name: Walk with the Same Heart and Same Footsteps
tags: Cowork with the Lord, Finish His Commission

SOL1_39.content:
Lord, You loved me and died for me!
You drank the bitter cup;
On the cruel cross, You shed Your blood,
Brought me to be Your own.
My heart gives thanks, I yearn to praise,
Praise You forevermore.
Till all perish, I'll love You still.
Belong to You only.
SOL1_39.name: You Gave Yourself for Me
tags: The Lord Died on the Cross

GBH_39.content:
To run His course, for His purpose and dream I strive.
Never turn back! Come the cross, come what may!
I can't deny His commission, His high calling,
The glorious vision of the church in God's plan.
*(The church vision He gave me on the hill.)*
Forward I go, with passion for His purpose;
Never turn back! He will carry me through.
He is the First; He is the Last. He'll be with me,
Till I with joy finish my course in His embrace!
O I'll see His loving face, receive His sweet praise!
GBH_39.name: Never Turn Back!!!

SOL2_39.content:
Jesus Christ as the High Priest
Had offered one sacrifice
For sins forever and He sat down
At the right hand of God, at His right.
From that time He's waiting, He's waiting
Until His enemies are made His footstool.

2. For by one offering,
For by one offering,
He has perfected forever, forever
All those who are being sanctified.
The Spirit also testifies to us,
"I'll remember no more their sins and lawless deeds."
SOL2_39.name: One Sacrifice for Sin Forever
tags: Fruit of the Cross. Glorious Salvation

referenceSongs.name: 一次永遠的贖罪祭（來十12-15, 17）

GFH1_39.content:
1. When I survey the wondrous cross
On which the Prince of glory died,
My richest gain I count but loss,
And pour contempt on all my pride.

2. Forbid it, Lord, that I should boast,
Save in the cross of Christ my God;
All the vain things that charm me most,
I sacrifice them to His blood.

3. See from His head, His hands, His feet,
Sorrow and love flow mingled down;
Did e’er such love and sorrow meet,
Or thorns compose so rich a crown?

4. His dying crimson like a robe,
Spreads o’er His body on the tree,
Then am I dead to all the globe,
And all the globe is dead to me.

5. Were the whole realm of nature mine,
That were an offering far too small;
Love so amazing, so divine,
Demands my soul, my life, my all!
GFH1_39.name: When I Survey The Wondrous Cross

SOL3_39.content:
In the scarred hands of my loving Lord,
I'm embraced, protected by Him.
I shall lie in His once wounded side.
In my Lord's bosom I shall rest.
You bear and carry me all my life,
Leading me till I reach Your throne.
You'll love me through eternity.
I have been Your love dream from long ago!
I'm forever Your darling love.
The eternal love co'vnant in Your blood
Stands firm ever to the end!
SOL3_39.name: In the Scarred Hands of My Loving Lord

referenceSongs.name: 愛主要肩負保抱我一生直到祂的寶座 與祂同度⋯⋯！！！！！！

HC1_39.content:
1. What a joy it is to walk
On the way of godliness,
Abiding within boundaries.
It's delightful and free.

2. I don't feel that I'm constrained
'Cause I'm walking in the truth.
It's not about regulations,
But arrangements that are good.

3. At the right time, in the right place,
I can do what I need to do.
I can do what I want to do.

4. Every step easy and light,
You and I live this sweet life.
Living to You, living with You,
I feel easy and light.

5. I am willing, more than willing.
Your will is what I have chosen.
Your way is my every decision.
HC1_39.name: A Blissful Life

HC2_39.content:
Lord, You loved me, and gave Yourself.
For me, You were crucified.
The Father crushed and chastised You,
And left You there to die
The Father, the Son, and the Spirit
Performed this awesome deed!
You all desire for me to join
In Your love fellowship!
*(To live in Your heart!)*

2. Lord, You loved me, and gave Yourself.
You were despised as a worm:
Reproached by men, and struck by God.
You were poured out for me.
Now Your Father is my Father.
His bosom I will stay!
We taste Father and son affection.
May You be satisfied!

3. Lord, I treasure Your blood sealed love.
You tasted death for me.
To show Your love, You suffered much
Your steadfast flaming love.
The wondrous cross, the bleeding heart
Capture and melt my heart.
Lord, You betrothed me by Your blood.
I'll embrace You fore'er.

4. Now and forever I'm Your darling,
You are my true Beloved.
We are deeply unit'd; we'll share
The sweet eternity!
The royal family in New Jerusalem
Overflows riches and love,
Enjoys endless love forever!
HC2_39.name: The Awesome Deed of the Trinity

referenceSongs.name: 三一神中不可思議的事

SOL1_40.content:
The dark night is gone and the dawn has come!
The Lord left His tomb, leaving the linen wrapping.
He thought of Peter and the disciples.
He saw their sorrow, their disappointment.
He saw all their tears and their wounds.
He'll take away shadows.
He'll wipe away all tears.
He'll destroy all darkness, despair.
He'll cover them with gladness.
He will give them the glorious hope.
And now they know His love stronger than death,
Always the same, never sep'rate from His love.
The Lord will be with them always
Until the end of the age,
Un- til the end of the age.
SOL1_40.name: The Dawn has Come

GFH2_40.content:
1. It’s so precious! I have the risen Lord.
Throughout my life, daily He walks with me.
He had passed through the darkest night!
He'd overcome Satan and death!
He holds my hand and walks with me through life,
Leads me through storms and fires -
And I shout, "Vict’ry!"

2. The risen Lord is my fountain of joy.
This joy no one can snatch away from me.
He fills my heart with faith and hope.
I joy in Him, while onward go.
He holds my hand and walks with me through life,
Leads me towards the peak -
And I shout, "Vict’ry!"

3. I’d tasted death, but now I am living.
I’d conquered death, and I’ll live forever.
I’ve the keys of Hades and Death.
My hand hold all authority.
Fear not, My love, I am with you always,
To the end of the age.
Oh, let us rejoice!
GFH2_40.name: The Risen Lord

GBH_40.content:
1. One day the Lord will come,
take me to the bright clouds!
That day He'll wipe away my tears,
make me exult in dance!

*O Lord, I love You.
My heart longs for You.
Gladly waiting for that day
to see Your glorious face!*

2. One day the Lord will come,
my body to transform
To be like His glorious body;
how free and bright I'll be.

*O Lord, I love You.
My heart longs for You.
Gladly waiting for that day
to see Your glorious face!*

3. One day the Lord will come,
fill me with rapturous joy.
I'll behold His glorious loving face.
'Tis my exceeding joy.

*O Lord, I love You.
My heart longs for You.
Gladly waiting for that day
to see Your glorious face!*

4. One day the Lord will come,
take us to our new home.
The palace He's prepared for us
is filled with His love design.

*O Lord, I love You.
My heart longs for You.
Gladly waiting for that day
to see Your glorious face!*

5. One day the Lord will come.
Pain, tears all pass away.
I'll drink full from the spring of joy,
enthrall in His embrace.

*Dear Lord, I love You.
O may You come soon.
Dancing, waiting for that day,
I'll see Your loving face!*

6. One day the Lord will come,
how sweet will be His praise.
Eternal reward I'll receive,
inherit all with Him.

*Dear Lord, I love You.
O may You come soon.
Dancing, waiting for that day,
I'll see Your loving face!*

7. One day the Lord will come,
give me the King's reward.
Forever I'll reign with my Beloved.
His domain will ever expand.

*Dear Lord, I love You.
O may You come soon.
Dancing, waiting for that day,
I'll see Your loving face!*

8. One day the Lord will come.
O love's eternity!
We'll dwell in New Jerusalem
amidst New Heaven and Earth.

*Dear Lord, I love You.
O may You come soon.
Dancing, waiting for that day,
I'll see Your loving face!*

9. How blessed! We are the core
of God's most glorious plan.
Forever we'll joy in His love plan.
How sweet His endless dream!

*Dear Lord, I love You.
O may You come soon.
Dancing, waiting for that day,
I'll see Your loving face!*
GBH_40.name: One Day the Lord Will Come

SOL2_40.content:
1. Abba, Father is rich in mercy.
Because of His great love for me,
When I was dead in my transgressions,
He made me live with Christ my Lord,
And raised me up together with Him,
Seat'd me in heaven with Him;
And raised me up together with Him,
Seat'd me in heaven with Him.

2. Abba, Father's boundless love for me
Forever is my rest and peace.
He loves the Lord, the same He loves me,
Without reserve, wholeheartedly.
Abba Father, open my eyes,
And let me see Your true heart.
I'll be carefree; I'll live joyfully,
Rest in Your bosom of love.
SOL2_40.name: The Great Love of the Father

SOL2_41.content:
Lord, Your grace makes me strong and brave,
Helps me walk on and be steadfast.
Thinking of Your love, bountiful grace,
How can my heart turn back?

*Chorus:
Arise now, O' my spirit!
Fear no giants nor mountains!
Arise now, O' my spirit!
Heed the voice of the Lord.*

 2. Lord, Your grace makes me strong and brave.
You can turn weakness into strength,
You change dry bones into a great army.
You give life to the dead.

*Chorus:
Arise now, O' my spirit!
Fear no giants nor mountains!
Arise now, O' my spirit!
Heed the voice of the Lord.*

3. Lord, Your grace makes me strong and brave,
I despise all trials and pain.
I can sing in dark night, full of great hope.
By You I can do all things.

*Chorus:
Arise now, O' my spirit!
Fear no giants nor mountains!
Arise now, O' my spirit!
Heed the voice of the Lord.*
SOL2_41.name: Your Grace Makes Me Strong and Brave

GFH1_41.content:
1. Low in the grave He lay,
Jesus, my Saviour!
Waiting the coming day,
Jesus, my Lord!

*Refrain:
Up from the grave He arose,
With a mighty triumph o’er His foes;
He arose a Victor from the dark domain,
And He lives forever with His saints to reign;
He arose! He arose!
Hallelujah! Christ arose.*

2. Vainly they watch His tomb
Jesus, my Saviour!
Vainly they seal the stone
Jesus, my Lord!

*Refrain:
Up from the grave He arose,
With a mighty triumph o’er His foes;
He arose a Victor from the dark domain,
And He lives forever with His saints to reign;
He arose! He arose!
Hallelujah! Christ arose.*

3. Death cannot keep his prey –
Jesus, my Saviour!
He tore the bars away –
Jesus, my Lord!

*Refrain:
Up from the grave He arose,
With a mighty triumph o’er His foes;
He arose a Victor from the dark domain,
And He lives forever with His saints to reign;
He arose! He arose!
Hallelujah! Christ arose.*
GFH1_41.name: Christ Arose

SOL3_41.content:
1. Most Precious, Lord, Your love of the cross,
And Your scar of love on Your side,
Reveal stunningly that I'm on Your heart -
I'm Your bone of bones, dearest to Your heart!
Your love's fairer than the rainbow;
You're the perfect ladder, rainbow bridge.
You have perfectly bridged heaven and earth,
Now You and I are closely tied as one!
O the rainbow arches over the land -
Your love covers me, surrounds me all my life.

2. The perfect seven hues of the bow -
Lord, You are the First and the Last;
From red to purple You're responsible,
Until I sit on the throne with You!
I will reign with You forever!
We'll enjoy our rainbow-like love path.
Such an endless spring, fair eternity!
I'll enjoy Your dream fore'er realized on me!
Lord, You and Your love are ever mine!

3. The rainbow is the sign of Your pledge -
No flood will destroy the Earth again.
The rainbow declares Your affections deep,
And more bountiful, vibrant is Your love!
'Round the throne today is a rainbow!
O it welcomes me to the throne of grace!
You're my precious Lord, Beloved of manifold love!
O Your love is fair! It can't fully be expressed!
Yet You, Your whole self, and Your love
Are ever mine!
SOL3_41.name: Your Perfect Rainbow-Like Love

HC1_41.content:
1. The dark night is gone; the dawn has come.
Shadows flee away; a new day comes.
Tears are wiped away; now I can smile.
Lord Jesus has ransomed me.
Lord Jesus loves me. He has made all things new.
Lord Jesus loves me.
He leads me towards eternal bliss.

2. Remember no more sorrows and pains.
Now I'm set free from loads of sin!
My path is bright. I'll fly on high.
Lord Jesus leads me the way.
I love Lord Jesus. He has made all things new.
I love Lord Jesus.
I'll love Him forever and ever,
Forever.
HC1_41.name: A New Day

SOL1_42.content:
1. O' Lord, I love Your appearing.
You'll meet me face to face!
In love for years, no words can tell
Such deep love and friendship.
Seeing Your face, I will love You even more,
The clouds'll be brighter than before.
E'er to abide with You and know Your wonder,
'Tis bliss beyond compare!

2. O' Lord, I love Your appearing.
The world I lay aside!
This world, its lusts will pass away,
The toil in God e'er abides.
Not far from me I see the coming glory,
You'll praise me at the stage of Christ!
How You cherish all that I have done for You!
All these You bear in mind.

3. O' Lord, I love Your appearing.
I don't mind suffering!
The glory's of exceeding weight.
You have laid up crowns for me!
You hold my hand through floods
and flames and trials.
Soon You'll bring me into glory!
Then I will sit with You fore'er on Your throne.
With You hold sovereignty.
SOL1_42.name: I Love Your Appearing

GFH2_42.content:
1. My Beloved longs that I
behold Him now in glory.
He who lives, once was dead,
is alive forevermore.
He’s ascend’d to the Father’s right hand,
Given glory and authority.
May my eyes fix on Him,
let His glory transform me.

2. He longs that I see Him
seated at the Father’s right.
How glorious! He appears
before the Father for me.
The Father loves me as He loves Him.
He is pleased with me; I am His dear.
May my eyes fix above -
Changes not the Father’s love!
GFH2_42.name: Fix My Eyes Above

GBH_42.content:
One day there will be
no more foes and fears.
One day there will be
no more cries and tears.
One day there will be
no more sickness, hunger, and war,
No more bleak cold winter.
There will be only bright cloudless dawn,
beautiful eternal spring.
One day there will be
no more heartbreak and death.
There will be only sweetness eternally.

Everywhere's full of life, full of warmth,
flooding with light, love, joy, and songs!
One day I shall see You face to face!
Forever I will live in the depth of Your heart,
Ever drinking, enjoying, Your endless love,
Enjoying with You love's sweet eternity.
O sweetness, sweetness, sweetness!
O, love's eternity!
O glory, glory, glory, for all eternity!
GBH_42.name: A Day of Glory and Sweetness

HC2_42.content:
The Heav'nly gate is now open.
His love pours down, my cup runs over with joy.
From my heart flows rivers of living water.
He gives me life; endless joy fills my heart.
The Heav'nly gate is forever open.
Abba's bosom my warm dwelling fore'er.
Abba, the Lord long to embrace me
In love eternally.
God's dream of love has now come true.
Face to face we will meet in the clouds.
Enjoy eternally in sweet love.
HC2_42.name: Heavenly Gate is Open

GFH2_43.content:
1. Love, boundless love! To the Lord ever I’m joined!
One in spirit, ever closest to Him.
Entered into the untold riches of Christ.
Exalt Him high; He is my all, my life.

2. The glorious Lord in my heart ever abides.
‘Living union’, I am His. He is mine.
Never alone, live in sweetness He and I.
As close as one, split not we for a while!

3. Deeper union than the branches with the vine.
Deepest union, beyond head-body tie.
One in spirit, no hindrance as we draw nigh.
He ‘nd I as one, what precious bliss of mine!

4. He’s now in me to be my glorious life.
Day ‘nd night supplies my every need inside.
He is my drive, nourishes, transforms and guides.
Through me His light, glory and love to shine.
GFH2_43.name: One Spirit With The Lord

SOL2_43.content:
Whatever things were gain to me,
For Christ I have counted as loss,
For the surpassing value of knowing Christ.
To gain Christ I count all as dross.
Not that I have laid hold of it.
There's only one thing in my heart 
Forget what's behind, 
reach forward to what's ahead,
I press on toward the goal.

*Chorus:
Yet, I am continually with You;
You hold me by my right hand.
With Your counsel You'll guide me.
Then receive me to glory.
Besides You there's nothing I desire.*

Now, I press on toward the goal,
For the prize of the upward call,
For the prize of the upward call of God in Christ,
I mind not things of this world.
SOL2_43.name: Press on Towards the Goal

GFH1_43.content:
1. He lives – the great Redeemer lives;
What joy the blest assurance gives!
And now before His Father, God,
Pleads the full merit of His blood.

2. Great Advocate, Almighty Friend!
On Thee do all our hopes depend:
Our cause can never, never fail,
For Thou dost plead, and must prevail.

3. In every dark, distressing hour,
When sin and Satan join their power,
Let this blest truth repel each dart,
That Thou dost bear us on Thy heart.
GFH1_43.name: He Lives – The Great Redeemer Lives

SOL3_43.content:
Let not your heart be troubled,
Neither let it be afraid.
Do not fear, just believe;
Those who trust won't be in haste.
O do not fret, the Lord is with you.
Do not be troubled by stress or anything.
By Him we step back to see all things through His eyes.
Look to Him, and smile, rest assured,
And know His guidance through and through.
SOL3_43.name: Let Not Your Heart Be Troubled

referenceSongs.name: Veja Tudo do Ponto de Vista do Senhor

HC1_43.content:
The years have past. As I look back,
This child has grown, able to carry his very own,
Or so he thinks. He's still so small,
Needs to be carried by the Father of all.
Abba Father, You've always been here.
Though at times, I wasn't aware.
You treasure my smiles; You collect all my tears.
Never have You missed a single day,
Anytime, anywhere.
Hold me in Your arms. Draw me ever near.
Press me to Your heart. I need Your tender care.
You treasure my smiles;
You collect all my tears.
Never do I want to miss any days,
Anytime, anywhere.
HC1_43.name: Anytime, Anywhere

HC2_43.content:
1. When your hair has turned grey,
When you're no longer strong,
I will never forsake you;
I will not depart from you.
I live for you, always by your side.
Till the end, I will love you.
My love shall follow you.

2. When you're tired and without strength,
I sympathize with you.
When you lie on your sickbed,
I sustain you, restore you.
Each step of the way shows my tender love.
Till the end I'll be with you;
sufficient is My grace.
My dear child, as your days,
so shall your strength be.

3. When you walk through dark valleys,
I'm with you, hold you tight.
I've triumphed Satan and death;
Fear not, My darling.
I died for you, bought you to be mine.
When you're awake or asleep,
I'm with you always.
To be with Me far better than all.
I am your eternal joy;
Your Beloved and best Friend.
HC2_43.name: Love Till the End

referenceSongs.name: 到老不離、知心良人的保抱
Meu Amado Íntimo me carrega até a velhice, sem nunca me deixar

SOL1_44.content:
1. You should rest your hope fully on
The grace brought by His coming
And heed to the prophetic word,
Heed to the prophetic word,
Till the day dawns, the morn star
Rises in your heart.
You are drawn by the Lord's coming,
Longing for future glory.

2. I don't mind the things which are seen,
But the things which are not seen.
For the things seen are but temporal,
Those not seen are eternal.
Light affliction for a while,
Works for us lasting glory
That's of far more exceeding weight.
What a bliss to be with Him!

3. The grace brought by the Lord’s coming
Surpasses all human dreams.
I shall be taken to the clouds,
And be face to face with Him.
My body will be transformed
To be like His of glory,
He'll bring me to the Father's home,
Stroll in the holy city.

4. When I see His face of glory,
And realize His love so deep,
I'll be drawn by His majesty,
Changed into marv'llous glory!
Love response flows from my heart,
Like a spring that ever swells.
God's household is full of sweetness.
We'll dwell in "the worlds of love"!

5. Thrilling prize-giving at Christ's stage!
The toil in Him not in vain.
Giving water to little ones,
A reward from Him I'll gain.
He'll remember all my days,
All sweet memories display.
So precious He appreciates me.
He cherishes my love.

6. The beauty of the Father's home
Excels all men's fantasies;
Gates of pearl and walls of jasper,
Gems as base and gold as street,
The river and trees of life,
The Lamb as the city's light!
The city's filled with warmth and love,
Full of life and glory bright.

7. The crowns He gives me won't perish.
I will be more glorious.
Government and peace of the Lord
Shall forevermore increase.
I'll sit with Him on the throne,
Reign with Him eternally.
Soon the glorious "worlds of love"
Will spread o'er the universe.
SOL1_44.name: Hope in the Grace Brought by the Lord's Coming

metaToDisplay.value: Note the change in Stanza 1 and 3

referenceSongs.name: 專心盼望主再來帶來的恩
專心盼望主再來帶來的恩
Esperança na Graça da volta do Senhor

GBH_44.content:
1. One day from Heaven He'll come; 
He'll come to carry me home.
To the New Jerusalem, 
He'll come to carry me home.
In the clouds, His radiant chariot, 
I'll see His glorious face.
He'll take me to His warm fairest home, 
He'll come to carry me home.

2. One day from Heaven He'll come; 
He'll come to carry us home.
To the New Jerusalem, 
He'll come to carry us home.
In the clouds, His radiant chariot, 
we'll see His glorious face.
*rit*
He'll take us to His warm fairest home, 
He'll come to carry us home.
GBH_44.name: Carry Me Home

GFH1_44.content:
1. O Jesus, Lord! ‘tis joy to know,
Thy path is o’er of shame and woe,
For us so meekly trod;
All finished is Thy work of toil,
Thou reapest now the fruit and spoil,
Exalted by our God.

2. Thy holy head, once bound with thorns,
The crown of glory now adorns,
Thy seat, the Father’s throne.
Or Lord! E’en now we sing Thy praise,
Ours the eternal song to raise,
Worthy the Lord alone!

3. As Head for us Thou sittest there,
Until Thy members too shall share
In all Thou dost receive;
They glory and Thy royal throne
Thy boundless love has made our own
Who in Thy name believe.

4. We triumph in Thy triumphs, Lord,
Thy joys our deepest joys afford,
The fruit of love divine.
While sorrowing, suffering, toiling here,
How does the thought our spirits cheer,
The throne of glory’s Thine.
GFH1_44.name: O Jesus, Lord! ‘Tis Joy To Know

SOL3_44.content:
We are one in God's warmest family.
We are one in God's warmest family.
O.... God is my true Abba.
And the Lord's my true Beloved.
We are one in God's warmest family.
SOL3_44.name: We are One in God's Warmest Family

referenceSongs.name: We are One in God’s Warmest Family

GFH2_45.content:
1. You came as Son of Man, triumphed for me,
Conquering ev’rything, all to inherit.
You share the promise of the Spirit with me.
One spirit I’m with You, my life You have been.

2. You became Son of Man, to give me warmth.
As flashes came Your love, from high You brought forth.
How gloriously You lived, God’s heart to men unsealed,
Taught me to live by You, reveal Your glory.

3. Son of God, Son of Man, fore’er You’ll be!
You’re my elder Brother; You are my Beloved.
One in spirit with You, a living union,
I am drawn after You by Your love so deep.

4. Now I’m never alone, ev’r knit to You.
When I think of myself, rightly think of You.
To fight battles with You, earth’s journey walk with You,
Face everything with You, my heart rests in You.

5. At times it’s so lonely, cheerless it seems,
Yet You dwell in my heart, give a melody.
As in heaven I feel, enjoy Your love and warmth.
My heart’s can leap and shine; flames of love grow strong.

6. Though now I live on earth, my heart‘s on high.
Always I think of You living in glory.
Each other we possess, closer than all on earth.
Falling in love with You - my greatest treasure.
GFH2_45.name: The Son Of Man United With Me

GBH_45.content:
1. When God's kingdom comes, 
our Lord Jesus will reign.
He brings healing and peace, 
He restores all things.
The blind see, the deaf hear, 
the lame dance, the mute sing!
Deserts blossom as the rose, 
thirsty lands gush with springs.
We will reign with the Lord, 
Earth and nature sing;
We'll toast and drink to our King of kings!
On Earth He reigns! With Him we'll reign!

2. When God's kingdom comes, 
the Prince of Peace reigns!
Swords hammered into ploughshares 
when peace comes on Earth.
Wolves are lambs' guests and friends, 
calves and lions feed on grass,
While a little child will feed 
and lead them with fun.
Groaning, sadness flee, 
Earth and nature sing!
Peace on Earth, joy fills the world
When Jesus reigns! O comes our King!

3. When God's kingdom comes, 
God's Spirit's poured out.
All the Earth sees 
His glory and learns His ways.
The knowledge of our Lord 
will fill the Earth,
As waters fill the ocean and sea.
All the Earth remembers Him, 
serves and worships Him.
He'll spread a rich feast 
for all people on His mount.
We'll drink in joy to our King of kings!
On Earth He reigns! With Him we'll reign!
GBH_45.name: God’s Kingdom Comes

SOL2_45.content:
I treasure You are my best friend.
You have searched me and known me.
You know my thoughts from afar off.
All my desires are before You.

2. O' my dear Lord, You know all things.
You are mindful of my thoughts.
Let me open my heart to You.
You know my thoughts before they're told.

3. You have known me inside out, Lord,
You perfectly understand me.
Teach me how to live with You 
To be set free and without fears.
SOL2_45.name: My All-knowing Friend

SOL3_45.content:
1. Precious blood perfected me!
I'm the precious jewel of God!
Father gave me to His Son
As a seal set on His heart.
I'm all fair and beautiful!
They delight in me the most!
God's great glory is revealed!

2. Precious blood perfected me!
I've been made a precious stone!
There's no flaw, no spot in me -
I'm compatible with God!
I'm the Father's dearest child!
I'm the Lord's dear darling love!

3. Precious blood perfected me!
I've been made a precious stone!
Accusations overcome,
A victor'ous one am I!
I can lift my head up high,
Overcome the foes, the world!

4. Precious blood perfected me!
I approach the throne of grace!
I behold His glory bright -
I'm transformed with face unveiled!
Glor'ous vict'ry of the cross -
Now a conqueror am I!
His love dream let us fulfill!
SOL3_45.name: Precious Blood!!!

HC1_45.content:
Now I am here with You,
You've always been with me.
Each day, each minute, each second,
You will keep for all eternity.
More than beautiful words.
In silence there are sounds.
It's the experience of You and me,
The bliss that You and I have found.
All the lovers of this world
Will come to an end one day,
But the union between You and me
Will continue through endless days.
We'll love each other through endless days.

One day I'll see Your face
And hear that familiar voice.
The meeting of lovers in the air,
A new beginning of our joy.
I want to be closer to You.
It's the cry in my heart
Until the day You come.
I'll love You more than from the start.
All the lovers of this world
Will come to an end one day,
But the union between You and me
Will continue through endless days.
We'll love each other through endless days.
HC1_45.name: Endless Days

HC2_45.content:
I am Your longing of love.
Since eternity
You have desired me.You laid down Your life,
Shed Your precious blood to make this dream come true.
You live in me and I live in You.
Deepest union, we are heart to heart.
Living union overflows with life and love.
We're one spirit, closest, dearest!
I'm Your deepest longing, content, and joy.
You're my greatest treasure, true joy, perfect rest!

2. You are mine, boundless Lord.
You are mine forever.
I am Your love dream, eternal lover,
I am Your darling, compatible with You.
Your love for me is everlasting.
Path of love is paved with pink petals.
River of love ever springing with bliss and love.
I'm blessed! In this union I'm blessed!
Enthralled by Your abundance forever,
We'll live in this sweet eternal love dream!
HC2_45.name: The Lord's Love Dream

SOL2_46.content:
What would be heaven's beauty
If You were not there?
No longer would it be
My heart's desire.

2. Fairer is our heav'nly home,
Which You have prepared.
One day You and I'll
Dwell in this new place.
SOL2_46.name: The Beauty of Heaven

GFH1_46.content:
1. Lord Jesus are we one with Thee?
O height, O depth of love!
Once slain for us upon the tree,
We’re one with Thee above.

2. Our sins, our guilt, in love divine,
All! All were borne by Thee;
The gall, the curse, the wrath were Thine,
To set Thy members free.

3. Ascended now in glory bright,
Still one with us Thou art;
Nor life, nor death, nor depth, nor height
Thy saints and Thee can part!

4. O teach us, Lord, to know and own
This wondrous mystery,
That Thou with us art truly one,
And we are one with Thee.

5. Soon, soon shall come that glorious day,
When, seated on Thy throne,
Thou shalt to wond’ring worlds display
That Thou with us art one.
GFH1_46.name: Joined To The Lord

SOL1_47.content:
In the Lord and the cross, I rejoice and glory!
For He gave Himself for me,
Bought me to Him by His blood.
This strongest love changes my life,
Constrains me, gives me faith.
O' this greatest, most precious deed
Is stronger than the rock,
As stable as the throne!
The fruits of the cross, sweeter than honey,
Give me faith, peace and victory.
O' how pre-cious! Thick clouds 
and mist van-ished,
No more hindrance or shadow!
In His presence I rejoice!
Now I can bathe in His warm glorious light,
It's so sweet and lifegiving! O' what a joy
To enter deep into His fairest heart,
Drink fully of my Beloved's love,
Enjoy His all-knowing friendship.
O' what a joy to live with Him!
Makes me feel His affection
Filling the whole universe,
Filling heaven and the earth.
Who knows in this dark and suffering world,
There is heaven on the earth!
Who knows in this dark and suffering world
Is hidden the deepest love between He and I!
It makes me feel His affection
Filling the whole universe,
Filling heaven and the earth.
SOL1_47.name: Enjoy the Fruits of the Cross and Deeply Enter into His Beautiful Heart of Love
tags: Fruit of the Cross. Glorious Salvation

referenceSongs.name: 享受成了和祂美麗的心
享受「成了！」和祂美麗的心

GFH2_47.content:
1. O Father on Your right there’s the Son of Man!
He’s my Brother, my Beloved, my best Friend.
I even can become fellow-heir with Christ!
Who can comprehend my riches and joy?

2. Union with Him is my greatest blessing;
Freed from the sphere and yoke of slavery!
Before God, I am a new creation in Christ,
In His glory and light ever abide.

3. Union with Him is my greatest blessing;
I now belong to my Beloved alone.
All thru’ this life, I enjoy His company;
In love live with Him through eternity.
GFH2_47.name: Union With The Lord

referenceSongs.name: Que Bênção ser Unido com o Senhor

SOL2_47.content:
When I see all the stars,
I think of Your glory.
You're the endless fountain,
Overflowing with love.
May Your glory ever capture my heart.
I desire nothing besides You.
Let me behold Your beauty
And I will be drawn away.

You are the boundless One,
Greater than the universe.
All things in this world
Have become minor to me.
Your vast bosom of love is my rest.
Let me always stay in Your embrace.
O' how precious I am Your dearest child,
O' how sweet!

Father, my heart loves You!
I long to know You more,
Fully drink of Your love,
Daily rejoice before You.
SOL2_47.name: My Father is Infinitely Great

SOL3_47.content:
1. I treasure most You died for me,
Redeemed me to be Yours fore'er.
O the love scar of Your pierced side, You kept -
Your love pledge ever engraved.
Between us, Lord, there's no more sin,
Only You covenant of love!
You'll forever abide in my heart -
The deepest union of love!

In heaven, I sit with You - most accepted by God!
You dwell in my heart to be my glorious hope!
No more condemnation! No more separation!
We're ever joined as one.

2. Cov'nant of love, eternal love,
Binds us as one forevermore.
O the love scar of Your pierced side, You kept -
Your love pledge ever engraved.
Between us, Lord there's no more sin,
Only Your covenant of love!
Love and life are ever between us -
The deepest union forever!

In heaven, I sit with You - most accepted by God!
You dwell in my heart to be my glorious hope!
No more condemnation! No more separation!
We're ever joined as one.

3. With joy, I'll live with You Lord, in the endless spring,
Enjoy eternity and Your boundless love.
The Trinity embraces all His precious loved ones
In New Jerusalem -
God's boundlessness we'll enjoy!
SOL3_47.name: No More Condemnation! No More Separation!

referenceSongs.name: 神、我中間永遠再無罪，只有祢愛約
Entre Deus e eu, não há mais Pecado, somente Seu Concerto de Amor

HC2_47.content:
Before all creation,
You are my true Beloved.
The rainbow-like love
Has been hidden in Your heart.
Lord, You set Your colourful,
Romantic love on me.
Without me, You are in want.
Lord, I am Your bone of bones, flesh of flesh.
Your love stirs up my love.
Your affection kindles mine.
Filling with echoes of love,
As the deep calls unto deep!

2. Fearfully, wonderfully,
I was created.
Lord, Your love will transform me,
Uplift me unceasingly.
You made me in Your image
To be Your dearest darling,
Heart to heart, in harmony.
O' Lord, I'm Your greatest delight, contentment.
My glory will forever increase
Ravish Your heart.
Our sweetness will ever grow. We live in
The endless river of love!
HC2_47.name: The Manifold Love of the True Beloved

referenceSongs.name: Amor Multiforme de Todo o Coração

GFH2_48.content:
1. Glorious, glorious -
The hour I first believed.
I have been joined to the Lord,
In one spirit.

2. Wonderful! wonderful!
Now I am in Christ.
It’s no longer I who live,
But a new man.

Chorus:
The precious Lord lives in me.
Co-heir with Him of all things,
I partake His glory,
Father’s love and the Spirit.

4. Love that’s true, love that’s true,
What a love it is!
I want You to be my Lord,
Live in love with You eternally.
GFH2_48.name: Glorious

GBH_48.content:
1. New Jerusalem! This most glorious vision
Captures my heart, 'tis my dream, drive and joy.
Sweetest union, He's the Lover of my soul;
His love fully satisfies my heart.
I'm God's dearest, born of Him. 
He's my dearest Abba;
His highest love satisfies my heart.

2. New Jerusalem is God's tabernacle,
And our fairest eternal sweet home.
It has jasper walls, 
adorned with precious stones;
The gates are pearls, the street is gold.
There the river of life flows, 
pure and clear as crystal;
On the riversides are the trees of life.

3. New Jerusalem is God's tabernacle,
His eternal sweetest resting place,
And our fairest, warmest heavenly home.
God, and man dwell in love, satisfied!
Live in oneness with our God 
and with one another;
We share the sweetest eternity!

4. New Jerusalem is the Bride of the Lamb,
His love's masterpiece 
shines forth evermore.
The deep union of love 
between Christ and His church
Is most moving! All will call us blessed!
On the throne we'll reign with Christ, 
glory ever increasing.
O most colourful eternity!

5. Abba yearns for me 
to be His most glorious child,
To inherit all with His beloved Son.
I'm His darling child, 
His dream, glory and joy;
His infinite love's my sweet rest.
Father and son's mutual love 
satisfies His heart and mine.
Forever we will wonder at His love plan!
GBH_48.name: The Vision of New Jerusalem

GFH1_48.content:
1. Hark! Ten thousand voices crying
“Lamb of God!” with one accord;
Thousand thousand saints replying
Wake at once the echoing chord.

2. “Praise the Lamb,” the chorus waking,
all in heav’n together throng;
Loud and far each tongue partaking
Rolls around the endless song.

3. Grateful incense this, ascending
Ever to the Father’s throne;
Every knee to Jesus bending,
All the mind in heav’n is one.

4. All the Father’s counsels claiming
Equal honors to the Son,
All the Son’s effulgence beaming,
Makes the Father’s glory known.

5. By the Spirit all pervading,
Hosts unnumbered round the Lamb,
