Crowned with light and joy unfading,
Hail Him as the great “I AM.”

6. Joyful now the new creation
Rests in undisturbed repose,
Blest in Jesus’ full salvation,
sorrow now nor thralldom knows.

7. Hark! The heavenly notes again!
Loudly swells the song of praise;
Through creation’s vault, Amen!
Amen! responsive joy doth raise.
GFH1_48.name: Hark! Ten Thousand Voices Crying

HC1_48.content:
I walk on the waves and see the storm.
The moon's hidden and the stars do not shine,
The howling wind overwhelms the song in the night.
And the waves crash against my stride.
I'm about to fall.
But I sing in my heart.
The light shines brighter within me.
I'm peaceful and calm, steadfast and firm.
From my past experience,
I know You have planned for this very moment.
O' Lord, let me hold You tight.
Let You lay a rich feast for me.
I've gained more of Your blessings and You build me up.
We won't forget all this experience.
I fly into the storm with a smile,
Over the waves.
HC1_48.name: Fly Above the Storm

GFH2_49.content:
1. If anyone is in Christ,
He is a new creation.
Old things have passed away;
All things have become new.

2. I am no longer the thorn,
But lily of the valley.
I belong to my Beloved;
His desire is toward me.
GFH2_49.name: A New Creation

SOL2_49.content:
Father, I'll lean on Your bosom,
In Your love, I'm fully healed.
Rest in Your bosom of love,
Enjoy Your sweet kisses.

2. Father, I'll lean on Your bosom.
I'll feel Your beautiful heart,
Where Your endless love flows
As a spring quenching my thirst.

3. Father, I'll lean on Your bosom.
Let me hear Your words of love.
Your love and Your bosom
Forever capture my heart.
SOL2_49.name: Lean on the Father’s Bosom

HC2_49.content:
Even until today, Lord, You're pursuing me.
The love of my youth You never forget.
Now You still appear to me, kiss me.
Your love to me always the same.
Your love, Your grace is for a lifetime.
Every morning they're new and fresh.
Your love ever fervent;
Your flaming love will never die.
You and I embrace eternity
Filled with endless discoveries,
Beyond all sweet dreams and love stories.
Our journey of love will have no end.
We'll live in the ever
Flowing river of love!
HC2_49.name: Until Today You're Pursuing Me

referenceSongs.name: 直到今天，祢仍在追求我

SOL1_50.content:
Enthralled in His matchless love,
Like living in a love dream!
His love fairer than flowers,
Tastes sweeter than honey,
No dream can compare,
Beyond the thoughts of man,
wonder of wonders!
But His love is true! His love is true!
O' His love fills the whole universe,
Heav'n and the earth,
And my heart which He desires.
SOL1_50.name: Enthralled in His Matchless Love
tags: Draw Close to God and Experience Him

referenceSongs.name: Encantado no Seu rio de amor

GFH2_50.content:
1. Now that I have been crucified with Christ,
It is no longer I who live,
But it’s Jesus Christ who lives in me,
Jesus Christ who lives in me.
The life which I now live in the flesh,
I live by faith in the Son of God,
Who loved me and gave Himself for me,
Loved me and gave Himself for me.

2. How great is the riches of the glory
of the Mystery of “Christ in me”.
My Lord Jesus Christ is mighty in me.
He’s greater than all in the world.
Christ dwells in my heart through faith,
I am rooted and grounded in love.
I abide in Him and thus bear much fruit.
Living water flows from my heart.
GFH2_50.name: Jesus Christ In My Heart

GBH_50.content:
1. And I saw a new heaven, a new earth:
For the first heaven 
and the first earth passed away;
And the sea is no more. 
And I saw the Holy City,
New Jerusalem, New Jerusalem,
Coming down out of heaven from God, 
made ready as a bride
Adorned, adorned for her husband.

2. And I heard a great voice 
out of the throne saying,
Behold, the tabernacle of God is with men.
And He shall dwell with them, 
and they shall be His peoples,
And God Himself shall be with them,
And God Himself shall be with them, 
God Himself shall be with them,
And be their God, and be their God:

3. And He shall wipe away 
every tear from their eyes,
And death shall be no more;
And death shall be no more; 
neither, neither shall there be
Mourning, nor crying, 
nor pain anymore:
The first things passed away. 
And He that sits on the throne said,
Behold, I make all things new.
GBH_50.name: The New Heaven, the New Earth and the Holy City

SOL2_50.content:
The Comforter has come. 
It's the Father's promise.
O' how precious it is, 
fore'er He lives in me,
Like a well of water, 
ever overflowing,
And I will never thirst.

2. The Comforter has come. 
Fore'er He lives in me.
He never leaves me, 
helps me in time of need.
O' how gentle He is. 
His love is long and deep.
He'll bring me to glory.

3. He's always by my side. 
We go through floods and fires.
He speaks comfort to me. 
He makes me full of hope.
He gives me my vineyard, 
and I'll sing to the Lord.
I'm in love with the Lord.

4. The Comforter's with me. 
He is always my Guide.
All things He teaches me, 
so I can please the Lord.
When I'm sad and weary, 
He comforts me deeply
And gives me joy and peace.

5. When I draw near to God, 
He teaches me the truth,
Makes my heart live again. 
I'm captured by the Lord.
His love draws me away. 
The world I lay aside,
Yearn for His love only.
SOL2_50.name: The Comforter has Come

GFH1_50.content:
1. “A little while” the Lord shall come,
And we shall wander here no more;
He’ll take us to His Father’s home,
Where He for us is gone before
To dwell with Him, to see His face,
And sing the glories of His grace.

2. “A little while” – He’ll come again;
Let us the precious hours redeem;
Our only grief to give Him pain,
Our joy to serve and follow Him.
Watching and ready may we be,
As those that wait their Lord to see.

3. “A little while” – ‘twill soon be past,
Why should we shun the promised cross!
O let us in His footsteps haste,
Counting for Him all else but loss;
For how will recompense His smile
The suff’rings of this “little while.”

4. “A little while” – come, Saviour, come!
For Thee Thy bride has tarried long;
Take They poor waiting pilgrims home
To sing the new eternal song,
To see Thy glory, and to be
In ev’rything conformed to Thee!
GFH1_50.name: A Little While

HC1_50.content:
1. O' My Lord, I live to You.
In this busy and troubled world,
I don't want anything to distract me.
I fully live to You -
My heart's desire, my affection,
All my longing, my thoughts, my mind,
My eyes, my lips and my ears.
I turn my face to Your countenance.
All of me - my inside and out,
My whole person, my two hands,
My whole body -
I give to You all my love,
All my attention. All that I offer,
I dedicate them to You.
All for You.

2. O' My Lord, let your presence
Surround me, fill me, affect me.
Lord, You surround me. We are the closest.
We're deeply connected
We're united; You're in me. We are one!
All pass away, all fade out,
All diminish, become dim,
And fade away.
At this moment, it's only You and me.
I draw near to You; You draw near to me.
It's the sweet fellowship
Between You and me.
This is the life I love to live,
The blessings and joy of heaven,
The resting place of my heart.
HC1_50.name: I Completely Live to You

SOL1_51.content:
Let us dance and celebrate.
For we are God's dear children!
And we are the lovers of the Lord!
The jewels of the Spirit!
Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha!
We're His royal family!
Let's live out the love of our hearts,
And build His church together.
And reign one day with Him!
SOL1_51.name: Let’s Celebrate

HC2_51.content:
1. Lord, Your scar of love fore'er riven deep,
Tells me tenderly You adore me deeply.
Stuns my heart, reveals Your heart:
You want me as Your bone of bones.
Lord, Your scar of love fore'er riven deep,
Tells me tenderly how deep You desire me.
Deep in Your heart, ever engraved in You:
I'm Your darling, compatible with You.
Dearest to Your heart, 
I quench Your thirst of love.
I am Your one and only bone of bones.
Besides me, no one can 
fill Your heart's empty space.
Your ever riven scar of love
Forever declares to me:
Your flaming love, Your love of the cross
Will always surround me. You tell me Your pain.
Truly I know You love me most.
Lord, Your scar of love fore'er riven deep,
Lets me, anchor, rest in Your bosom.
Enthralled by Your love, I nest in Your heart,
Your darling, closest to You.
All Your proofs of love, stun my heart,
I'm Your ultimate sweet dream of love.
O my Lord, I'm Your beloved darling.

2. Lord, Your scar of love ever riven deep,
Ever declares You love me deeply.
I'm Your sweetheart, longing of love,
I am Your ultimate desire.
You committ'd Yourself for Your love dream.
You have bridged the gap,
made Your love dream come true.
You will share with me Your eternity!
Lord, I am Yours; You are forever mine!
I'm the endless love gift the Father gave to You.
In one spirit forever You and I!
Our story of love, which has no end,
Comprises countless enchanting chapters.
Everflowing river of love,
Everlasting path of love
Better than all dreams,
we live in endless spring.
We'll have ceaseless discoveries,
Live in eternal contentment.
Together we'll sit on the throne.
We'll be enthralled by the river of love.
This is the fairest love dream of all.
I'm Your compatible lover.
Flies over me Your banner of love.
Forever I'm Your only love dream!
O Lord, I am Your eternal love!
Forever, You are my true Beloved.
HC2_51.name: Your Scar of Love, Forever Riven Deep For Me

SOL1_52.content:
In this whole universe,
There's no deeper affection,
No higher father's love,
Your bosom is my sweet rest.
Father, daily You long to see my face,
Love to hear my sweet voice call-ing to You;
Daily You long to kiss me with kisses,
Embrace me.

Abba, Your matchless plan,
Full of wisdom and love!
As Your child, born of You,
I'm carefree and drawn by You.
You desire to bring me to great glory,
Sit with You on the throne, to inherit all;
You ev'n prepare a wedding feast for Your Son,
O' how sweet!
Abba, my heart loves You;
I long to know You more,
Fully drink of Your love,
Daily re-joice before You.
SOL1_52.name: The Deepest Affection! The Highest Father’s Love!

referenceSongs.name: A Mais Profunda Relação, o Mais Alto Amor do Pai

GFH2_52.content:
1. Though I had not followed Jesus in Galilee,
Yet now His presence is closer to me.
It’s for my good that He goes to the Father,
For when He goes, the Helper’s sent to me.
Forever more, the Spirit will dwell in my heart.
In storms or waves, His company is with me.
He is my gain, my portion, my fountain of strength!
With love for love I’ll yield myself to Him.

2. Though I had not leaned on the bosom of my Lord,
Yet in my heart forever He will stay.
I do believe He loves me with the highest love.
He loves me just as the Father loves Him!
Oh such great love is the foundation of my faith;
Oh such great love is the drive all thru’ my life;
Oh such great love draws me away from worldly cares;
Oh such great love binds my heart to His as one!

3. Though I had not offered perfume for His death,
Yet my spirit and body are all His.
Now I am a holy and living sacrifice,
I’ll pour myself at the feet of my Lord.
Devoted to His glorious plan I’ll strive for Him.
His way I’ll go forward with no returning
With the best gift, I’ll seek the favour of my Love.
I’ll watch and wait to see my Beloved in the clouds!

4. Though I had not followed Jesus in Galilee,
Yet now I have a glorious, boastful hope.
Soon comes the Day, that I’ll meet the Lord in the clouds,
And thus I shall be with Him forever.
He’ll share with me His everlasting glory.
He’ll sit with me on His throne of sovereignty.
He’ll walk with me in the Holy City of Life
He’ll live with me in love through all eternity.
GFH2_52.name: Now Is Even Better

SOL2_52.content:
Slapping, scourging, 
purple robe, crowns of thorns!
The Lord bore the anguish alone.
On Calvary, He was nailed on the cross,
Suffered willingly for us all.
The Saviour poured out Himself,
His life, His love for me;
He was earnest to gain my heart,
Even died for me on the cross.

2. Huge tides of love 
shattered the wall of sin,
A guilt purging fountain opened.
"It is finished!" 
He declared on the cross,
Perfect salvation accomplished!
When I consider His heart,
I'm moved by this great love.
For His salvation grace and love,
Fore'er I'll love Him with my all.
SOL2_52.name: Bitter Love Journey
tags: The Lord Died on the Cross

GFH1_52.content:
1. The sands of time are sinking,
The dawn of heaven breaks;
The summer morn I’ve sighed for,
The fair, sweet morn awakes;
Dark, dark hath been the midnight,
But dayspring is at hand,
And glory, glory dwelleth
In Immanuel’s land.

2. O Christ! He is the fountain,
The deep sweet well of love!
The streams on earth I’ve tasted,
More deep I’ll drink above;
There, to an ocean fullness,
His mercy doth expand,
And glory, glory dwelleth
In Immanuel’s land.

3. With mercy and with judgment
My web of time He wove,
And aye the dews of sorrow
Were lustred with His love;
I’ll bless the hand that guided,
I’ll bless the ehart that planned,
When throned where glory dwelleth
In Immanuel’s land.

4. Oh, I am my Beloved’s,
And my Beloved’s mine!
He brings a poor vile sinner
Into His “house of wine.”
I stand upon His merit,
I know no other stand,
Not e’en where glory dwelleth
In Immanuel’s land.

5. The Bride eyes not her garment,
But her dear Bridegroom’s face;
I will not gaze at glory,
But on my King of grace.
Not at the crown He giveth,
But on His pierced hand,
The Lamb is all the glory
Of Immanuel’s land.
GFH1_52.name: The Sands Of Time

HC1_53.content:
1. I want You to love me only.
This is the longing of my heart.
This is the desire of love.
This is the need in my spirit.
May You kiss me with kisses,
Look at me and talk to me,
Kiss me, embrace me, come close to me.
May You lay down the universe,
And leave Your glorious throne.
O' Lord, please come to my place.
Let us enjoy the time of You and me.

2. "I want you to love Me only."
This is the calling of Your heart.
This is the longing of love.
Now I know I affect You the most.
Your love has captured my heart.
I have no other desires.
My heart and my all belong to You.
O' Lord, my gaze of love
Is set on You fore'er.
Let me go to Your bosom.
We will enjoy the love of You and me.
HC1_53.name: I Want You to Love Me Only

referenceSongs.name: Eu quero que só me ame

SOL1_54.content:
1. God's beloved Son died for me
the veil was torn fore'er.
Abba ran out to embrace me,
covered me with kisses.
A robe and a ring He gave me.
A feast He prepared for me.
He celebrated. He sang and danced
I've returned home.

2. My Abba is self-existing,
wonderful, glorious.
He is all-wise, all-knowing,
almighty, all-loving.
He is the perfect Creator.
His goodness man can't comprehend.
He's my Father, my dear Abba,
my true Abba.

3. The Lord's Father is my Father;
I'm truly born of Him.
His seed fore'er abides in me.
I can be most like Him.
The Lord and I are of one.
I am Abba's dearest child,
Joint heir with Christ,
inherit all forever.

4. I'm the dearest child of Abba.
His Spirit dwells in me.
I am born of the Spirit;
I know I'm Abba's true child.
In Abba's love, my heart is free,
I know He sings, dances for me.
Let me enjoy the Father's love
throughout my life.

5. Abba spared not His only Son,
for me He gave Him up.
How shall He not freely give me
all things along with the Lord?!
He loves me as He loves the Lord;
He welcomes me, delights in me.
He wants me to sit at His right, to be glorious.
SOL1_54.name: My Dear Abba

GFH2_54.content:
In glory the Son of Man
Always thinks of me.
For me, He was born,
and Died, and rose to heaven.
One day He’ll come back,
To take me to be with Him ever.
He loves me and longs for me.
His love, His pow’r are mine.
I’ll lean on His bosom, Take Him to be my all.
GFH2_54.name: In Glory The Son Of Man

SOL2_54.content:
Love! Love has no end, it never fails
'Tis my spirit's experience.
Sometimes, I even find myself ordinary.
Yet, beyond the sky, in this universe,
There is a gaze of tender love on me.
Each time when I lift up my head,
The moment we meet,
I know that I am not ordinary,
Because I have ravished His heart.
(For He is a man forever.)
SOL2_54.name: Love Never Fails

GFH2_55.content:
1. Lo, the winter is past; the rain is gone
Trials ended, flowers bloom on the earth.
The time of the singing of birds has come.
The turtledove’s voice has been heard!
The fig tree has ripened its figs;
Vines in blossom give forth fragrance.
O My darling, beautiful one,
Arise! arise! and come along,
And come along!

2. On Mountains of Bether I wait for You
Sojourn on earth, I long for Your return.
I lay aside all things to see Your face.
Apart from You, I’ve no desire.
Steadfast I’ll be, love You only.
Wait for You on Mountain “Cloven”.
Lord, I am Yours, and You are mine.
O Lord Jesus, I long for You! 
I long for You! I long for You!

*(Bether means cleaving or separation.)*
GFH2_55.name: On Mountains Of Bether

referenceSongs.name: Aguardo Sua Volta nos Montes de Beter

SOL2_55.content:
You and I far apart, 
but our hearts are closest.
We can not meet face to face.
We may not say too many words.
Yet I know Your heart 
and You know me well.
We're heart to heart.
Though You're in heaven I'm on earth.
You poured out Your all for my blessing.
I offer myself to strive for You.
You watch me from above, 
I'll fix my eyes on You.
For a while, we're apart, 
but we are one forever.
One day we'll meet face to face.
I'll be overwhelmed with joy 
beyond compare!
SOL2_55.name: Two Places Far Apart

GFH1_55.content:
1. I have a home above,
From sin and sorrow free;
A mansion which eternal love,
Designed and formed for me,
My Father’s gracious hand,
Has built this blest abode;
From everlasting, it was planned,
My dwelling place with God.

2. My Saviour’s precious blood
Has made my title sure:
He passed through death’s dark raging flood
To make my rest secure.
The Comforter is come,
The earnest bas been given;
He leads me onward to the home
Reserved for me in heaven.

3. Loved ones are gone before
Whose pilgrim days are done;
I soon shall greet them on that shore
Where partings are unknown.
But more than all, I long
His glories to behold,
Whose smile fills all the radiant throng
With ecstasy untold.

4. That bright, yet tender smile,
My sweetest welcome there,
Shall cheer me through the “little while”
I tarry for Him here.
That bright, yet tender smile,
My sweetest welcome there,
Shall cheer me through the “little while”
I tarry for Him here.

5. Thy love, most gracious Lord,
My joy and strength shall be,
Till Thou shalt speak the gladd’ning word
That bids me rise to Thee.
And then, through endless days
Where all Thy glories shine,
In happier, holier strains I’ll praise
The grace that made me Thine.
GFH1_55.name: I Have A Home Above

HC1_55.content:
Let the flowers speak. Let the grass whisper.
Let mountains echo, let the sea sing songs of love.
From the beginning, from days of old to now,
Day to day utters speech;
Every creature tells a message throughout the earth.
There is no speech nor are there words.
With romance, with passion,
Tenderly, truthfully,
They proclaim God's infinite beauty;
Reveal God's love dream, His longing, His will.
They declare the desire
And love of God.

Flowers bloom, birds sing in the green pastures;
On the mountain top, in fleeting colours of the dusk;
In the night sky lit by the silv'ry moon;
In light breeze and drizzle;
In the snow-flutt'ring morning; By the seashore
The rolling waves dashing against the rocks;
By the cliff with gushing waterfalls
Tenderly You whisper
Many words of love and show me Your wonders.
Now I have heard them all, and I turn to You.
I run to You, I embrace Your
Dream of love.
HC1_55.name: Let the Flowers Speak

SOL1_56.name: Who Affect the Father the Most

SOL2_56.content:
My eyes of faith behold the Father's heart;
I fully trust in the pow'r of the blood!
Boldly by faith, come to the throne of grace,
See with my eyes the Father's sweet welcome;
Enjoy the bliss of sitting in heaven with Christ,
I fully taste the sweet perfect fruit of the cross.

2. May I behold the worth of Jesus' blood,
Gladly be drawn by Abba's sweet welcome;
My spirit's free. I dwell in His love.
My eyes of faith fore'er capture His heart.
Let me always look upon Jesus and His cross,
Compelled by love, 
moved by His grace, I'll march forward.

3. How warm and sweet is the fruit of the cross,
Sets free my soul to sing and dance with joy!
The Father's heart, His smiling face how warm!
The Lord's embrace, His tender words - how sweet!
In God's circle of love and fellowship I live.
Heaven on earth, I foretaste heavenly bliss.
SOL2_56.name: Taste the Perfect Fruit of the Cross
tags: Fruit of the Cross. Glorious Salvation

HC2_56.content:
The Father loves the Son; 
He brought forth a stunning plan:
From God the Eternal to God the Eternal
I'm His never-ending love gift!
He who gave and He who received,
Poured out all and suffered the most.
Father's love dream for His Son 
has been gloriously fulfilled!
O' expression of boundless love!

2. I am Your sweet love dream, 
Your first love, eternal love,
From everlasting to everlasting,
I satisfy Your heart the most.
Lord, I was made for You.
I belong to You alone;
I'm the bone of Your bones, 
the love secret of Your heart;
Your ultimate, eternal choice!
My Lord, You will never
Have another secret of love!

O, nothing beyond!
O, nothing beyond! *(Final!! Final!!)*
I'm His ultimate love secret.
O, nothing beyond! *(Final!! Final!!)*
I'm Your eternal, ultimate love dream!
This endless path of love sweet and fairest,
Like a poem, like a dream!

3. From the Light, Lord, You came,
To declare God's love secret.
The Trinity made the impossible possible.
God's flaming love has been revealed.
O' Lord, You became a Man,
Bore the cross, and kept the scars.
The love dream of the Father 
and the Son and the Spirit
Has come true! I'm in His heart!
I am God's ultimate dream of love,
His only love, dearest treasure.

O, nothing beyond!
O, nothing beyond! *(Final!! Final!!)*
I'm His ultimate love secret.
O, nothing beyond! *(Final!! Final!!)*
He will embrace all His beloved ones
To His fairest heav'nly home
In New Jerusalem,
To eternal glory!
HC2_56.name: I'm His Ultimate Love Secret

referenceSongs.name: 從亙古到永遠，我是祢甜美愛夢
De Eternidade a Eternidade, Sou Seu Doce Sonho de Amor

GFH2_57.content:
I know for sure where I will go one day -
A place where carols ring, where no sorrows remain,
A city of glitt’ring gold, walls of lovable jasper.
I know for sure where I will go one day -
A home of scenic land, where love fills every place,
With my Lord ever to dwell, His countless riches to taste.
This is the home that You prepare for me -
A hea’enly home above I’ll see.
Now and fore’er, my heart is glad and sure.
Joined to Your heart, we shall never part!
GFH2_57.name: I Know For Sure

HC1_57.content:
O' my Lord, my Beloved, may You return.
May You come and receive me.
In the clouds, see Your face. In Your arms, we celebrate!
O' come, let us celebrate!
O' brothers and sisters, let us rejoice,
Let's dance and celebrate!
Let us join hand in hand. Let us sing new songs
To welcome this new stage!
La La La La La La La La La La La
La La La La La La La
HC1_57.name: Lord, May You Come

SOL1_58.content:
1. I've captured my Father's heart,
Day and night He thinks of me;
His thoughts of love toward me
Outnumber the sands or stars.

2. I've captured my Father's heart,
He'll gaze on me forever.
His eternal love and care
Draw me close to His bosom.

3. Abba, Father's heart is mine,
He leaps for joy over me;
His smile is so bright and warm,
In His bosom I rejoice.
SOL1_58.name: I have Captured My Father’s Heart

referenceSongs.name: Eu Cativei o Coração de Meu Pai

GFH2_58.content:
1. My Lord Jesus was resurrected,
He has overcome Satan.
Seated at the right of the Father,
He is the victorious King!
He is the Lord of lords, He is the King of kings,
The ever-living God! *(Hallelujah!)*
He’s enthroned eternally, And reigns forevermore,
He is the glorious King! *(Hallelujah!)*

2. Soon He’ll come back, The church to receive,
To His home in heaven so fair.
In the City, New Jerusalem,
Taste the wedding feast of the Lamb,
What a joy that overflows! No tears and no sorrows,
To enter sweet eternity! *(Hallelujah!)*
Reign in the Millennium, Over the universe,
Fore’er the Lord and we! *(Hallelujah!)*

3. Brothers, sisters, how happy we are,
In heaven with God e’er to live!
Partake His joy, His glory and bliss,
Live with Him the eternal spring!
It’s so bright beyond compare,
God’s kingdom is righteous,
Unshakeable, full of peace. *(Hallelujah!)*
Let us join to sing and praise
The ever-living God
To Him be all glory! *(Hallelujah!)*
GFH2_58.name: The Glorious Hope

SOL2_58.content:
All the trees raise their hands.
All the flow'rs lift up their heads.
O' my soul, Behold the Lord. 
He's now in glory!

2. All the trees make melody
And the birds sing along.
O' my soul, Rejoice! Rejoice! 
Rejoice in the Lord!

3. "Vict'ry leaves" say, "It's finished!"
Heartshaped leaves speak of His love.
O' my soul, Enjoy God's love, 
the fruit of the cross!
SOL2_58.name: Lift up Your Head and Rejoice
tags: Victoriously Overcome Satan. Spirit Set Free

GFH1_58.name: Hallelujah! What A Saviour

HC1_58.content:
Every day I'll ask, "Lord, what do You want?"
Do You want me to provide for Your Holy Place?
At this moment, how do You feel?
What are You longing for?
Not only do I pour out
My heart before You,
O' Lord, but I want to know
What You are thinking now.
I don't want to just live for myself.
I don't want to just think of my needs.
I don't want to just think of the work
That I've been doing for You.
O' Lord, what do You want today?
Please tell me! Please tell me!
O' Lord, what do You want today?
I desire to know.
HC1_58.name: O' Lord, What do You Want Today?

SOL1_59.content:
1. My dear child, do you know
How joyous I'm for you?!
Your countenance and your every move
Shines like a precious stone,
Dazzling, lovely.

*Chorus:
I love to embrace you,
'Tis My pleasure and joy,
For you I dance and sing
The love song of My heart.*

2. My dear child, do you know
How content I'm with you?
Now and fore'er nothing in this world
Can ever replace you in My heart.

*Chorus:
I love to embrace you,
'Tis My pleasure and joy,
For you I dance and sing
The love song of My heart.*

3. The days ahead are joyous,
Come, fully enjoy My all.
You can freely lean on My bosom.
I'll give you eternal, greatest blessings.
SOL1_59.name: The Love Song of the Father’s Heart

referenceSongs.name: The Love song of the Father's Heart
The Love song of the Fathers Heart

SOL2_59.content:
May I oft' consider
With me forever You abide.
My heart is forever Your desire.
Day and night You are here by my side.

2. May I oft' gaze at You,
Set You always before my eyes.
My heart's glad and peaceful in Your presence.
My faith has captured Your heart.

3. May I have eyes like dove's
To see You living in heav'n for me,
Consider that You live in my heart.
I set my love and my thoughts on You.

4. May You gain every day
My mind, my love and my will.
You are the glorious vision of my heart.
In Your love, I rest in great delight.

5. When I awake from sleep,
Let me first behold You in heaven.
Consider that You are with me always,
Walking with me toward each new day.
SOL2_59.name: Resting Place of My Heart
tags: Draw Close to God and Experience Him

referenceSongs.name: Lugar de Repouso dos Meus Pensamentos

GFH2_60.content:
1. In the clouds comes the time we meet
Face to face our dear Lord we see.
Parted many years, now at last we meet,
Starts the sweet eternity.

2. Hold my hand to the heav’nly home,
Then the Father gladly we see.
Take a City walk, of the past we talk.
What a sweet eternity!
GFH2_60.name: In The Clouds

GFH1_60.content:
1. Crown Him with many crowns,
The Lamb upon His throne;
Hark! how the heav’nly anthem drowns
All music but its own!
Awake, my soul, and sing
Of Him who died for thee;
And hail Him as thy matchless King
Thro’ all eternity.

2. Crown Him the Lord of love!
Behold His hands and side,
Rich wounds, yet visible above,
In beauty glorified;
No angel in the sky
Can fully bear that sight,
But downward bends his wond’ring eye
At mysteries so bright.

3. Crown Him the Lord of life!
Who triumphed o’er the grave;
Who rose victorious in the strife
For those He came to save;
His glories now we sing,
Who died and rose on high;
Who died eternal life to bring,
And lives that death may die.

4. Crown Him the Lord of Heav’n!
One with the Father known,
One with the Spirit through Him giv’n
From yonder glorious throne!
To Thee be endless praise,
For Thou for us hast died;
Be Thou, O Lord, thro endless days
Adored and magnified.
GFH1_60.name: Crown Him With Many Crowns

HC1_60.content:
Let us take a photo shoot.
Many many of Your sons
Hold hands and stand side by side with smiles so bright!
Some sit in front; some stand behind.
What fantastic scene it is!
Each one enhances one another,
Making all shine even brighter!
Behold, many sons of God
Follow His only begotten,
Flying to the glorious home together.
Round and round, all surround
The Father's glorious throne.
La la la la la la, our happy reunion!
The beauty of heaven
Excels all but we can reach and obtain,
The true affection of the father and son,
A life of a happy family.
The fulfillment of God's will
Is a happy God's family,
A perfect family,
A happy perfect family!
HC1_60.name: Our Family Photo

HC2_60.content:
He walked with Adam and Eve.*(Gen. 3:1-11)*
He ate the meal prepared by Abraham.*(Gen. 18:1-8)*
The Lord wrestled with Jacob!*(Gen. 3:22-32)*
The Lord buried Moses!*(Deut. 34)*
He made a pledge with David! *(2 Sam.7; Ps. 89:3, 34, 39; Jer. 33:19-21)*
He became a nursing child! *(Luke 2:25-35)*
Joseph and Mary, He obeyed, *(Luke 2:25-35; Mark 6:16)*
The carpenter's son He was. *(Matt. 13:53-58)*
The same with me in all things.*(Heb. 2:16-18)*
He sat by the well, asked for a drink.*(John 4:1-42)*
He gave sight to the blind, *(John 9:1-41)*
He opened His heart to Mary;
He wept before the tomb.*(Luke 10:18-42; John 11:33-40)*
The disciples' feet He washed!*(John 13:1-17)*
He bled for me *(Matt. 26:26-30; 1 Pet. 1:18-21)*
To ever live in me,*(John 14:16-24, 17:26)*
To unite with me.*(Gal. 2:20; 1 Cor. 6:17)*
He said, "Reach out your hand,
And place it in My side!"*(John 20:24-29)*
He asked, "Do you love Me?
Feed My lambs; tend My sheep.
Come along, follow Me!*(John 21:15-22)*
One day I'll come to take you.
You'll always be with Me!"*(1 Thess. 4:16-18)*
HC2_60.name: The Infinite Love Enters Into Our Life

referenceSongs.name: 無限主進入我們人生種種

SOL1_61.content:
1. I am born of God.
I am His dear child.
We are closely united.
The highest Father's love
Is the same forever and ever.

2. He holds me in His arms,
He smiles with great content,
Kissing me with kisses.
His delight towards me
Is the same forever and ever.

3. He gazes upon me.
His desire is for me.
From eternity,
His thoughts of love for me
Are the same forever and ever.

4. He gave His Son for me.
He gives me all freely.
He cares for my whole life,
gives me endless glory.
Father, O' Father, I love You.
SOL1_61.name: The Father’s Love

GFH2_61.content:
1. My heav’nly home, full of warmth and restful peace,
Pearls as the gates, wall of jasper, street of gold,
Precious stones laid, and the Lamb as lamp shining.
There’s no longer night; River of life flows forever.
See His face, taste His love, My heart overflows with joy.
With all the saints I’ll gladly sing and reign together!

2. ‘The First’, ‘the Last’ - my Lord is ever-living.
‘Alpha’, ‘Omega’ - He will bring me to glory;
The good Shepherd’ll guide me to the River of Life.
In rest eternal, we shall taste the sweet fruit of life.
In the bright morning light, know His love in depth and height,
Hear echoes of love ringing in the City of Life.

Come, O Lord! Come, O Lord!
Take the church into the clouds.
Dark is the night,
May Your light shine forth upon all land.
GFH2_61.name: My Heavenly Home

SOL2_61.content:
Every stage of my life 
let me give my love response
To my dear Lord in different times.
In my youth, I loved You; 
enjoyed heaven on earth.
My vision was clear and bright,
I strived for You in my twenties.
In my prime, I built the church 
through all the trials.
I treasure to strive for You!
From now on to the day we meet,
May I give You my love more and more.
I will go from peak to peak.
Thank you, my dear Lord, 
You take care of my life.
Your love and grace fill all my life journey.
You make my path shine 
until the perfect day,
Ever brighter!
Seeing Your face, I'll love You more,
More than all words can tell.
SOL2_61.name: My Life Response

SOL1_62.content:
O' the Life in the beginning,
Is so boundless, glorious!
O' the love in the beginning,
Colorful, like a rainbow!
O' Creator, You're self-exist,
An everflowing fountain!
From eternity, Your heart is sweet
With a secret of love.
You long that I, Your created one,
May unite with You as one
In love's deepest union.
With Your infinite love,
Wisdom and power,
You create me for Yourself
To be Your most compatible, dearest lover,
To fully enjoy Your glorious life,
Drink fully of Your passionate,
Romantic, rainbow-like love!

Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
Your fantastic dream of stunning love
From eternity has now come true!
O' the upward journey
Of this love life with You
Is so charming, scenic, like a dream!
O' how sweet to walk with You in deep love!
This carpet of love, paved with pink petals,
And the river of love that You drink with me,
Will have no end, increasing in glory,
Bliss and sweetness forever!
SOL1_62.name: The Love in the Beginning

GFH1_62.content:
1. Fairest Lord Jesus! Ruler of all nature,
O Thou of God and man the Son!
Thee will I cherish, Thee will I honor,
Thou, my soul’s glory, joy, and crown!

2. Fair are the meadows,
Fair are the woodlands,
Robed in the blooming garb of spring:
Jesus is fairer,
Jesus is purer,
Who makes the woeful heart to sing.

3. Fair is the sunshine,
Fair is the moonlight,
And all the twinkling starry host:
Jesus shines brighter,
Jesus shines purer,
Than all the angels heav’n can boast.
GFH1_62.name: Fairest Lord Jesus

HC1_62.content:
O' youthful one, do you have dreams?
Am I part of your dreams?
You let your heart cheer you.
Is your pleasure like bubbles?
It bursts out before reaching into your hands.
O' youthful one, will you wake up
You will come to realize
This world defiles your heart, consumes your time and strength,
Hurts you deeply. It's not worthy of you.
O' youthful one, your days will soon fly away.
You'll grow old and weary, and you will slow down.
You'll run no more. By then you'll think of Me.
Would it be a bit late?
I'm calling you today!
Be awakened, and see what I have planned for your life,
How much I treasure you,
How much I miss you!
I once gave you My youthful days.
I sanctified Myself.
I gave up all for you.
O' youthful one, can you be Mine today?
HC1_62.name: O' Youthful One

GFH2_63.content:
1. And I behold new heaven, new earth
And I behold new heaven, new earth
Ah...... Ah......
I behold new Jerusalem,
Out of heav’n coming down.
Things of sorrows have passed away,
Have all passed away.
No more death on earth thus shall be found,
No more mourning on earth shall remain.
Christ our Lord will forever reign,
New heaven, new earth He brings!
Ah...... Jesus Christ,
You’re the City’s glorious light;
You are the King of kings.

2. O King of kings, O King of kings,
You are worthy to reign.
For great is Your salvation pow’r!
Your loving-kindness is vast.
E’en a sinner You change to a prince;
In the desert, You make rivers.
What a glory - Love of the cross
Set all the captives free!
Ah...... Jesus Christ,
Heaven and earth moved by Your grace,
Give forth their songs of praise.

3. O our dear King, O our dear Lord,
You are the King of peace.
As the mountain is Your justice,
Your love is like the deep sea.
All the nations will be blessed by You.
All peoples will yield their hearts to You.
To us You are ever-loving.
In wonder angels sing!
Ah...... Jesus Christ,
*May You come soon, May You come soon,
We long to see You reign.*
GFH2_63.name: Come to Reign, Lord

SOL2_63.content:
The stage of Christ, 
feast of the Lamb I see!
Afflictions of this world 
brief and light.
With joy, I fight, 
by faith I march on.
Let's kindle the revival fire,
And press toward the goal.
Let's run the race,
And build His church
To the end of the earth!
SOL2_63.name: Press on to the Finish Line

GFH1_63.content:
1. Whom have I, Lord, in heav’n but Thee?
None but Thee! None but Thee!
And this my song thro’ life shall be:
Christ for me! Christ for me!
He hath for me the Devil trod,
He hath redeemed me “by His blood,”
And reconciled my soul to God:
Christ for me! Christ for me!

2. I envy not the rich their joys:
Christ for me! Christ for me!
I covet not earth’s glitt’ring toys:
Christ for me! Christ for me!
Earth can no lasting bliss bestow,
“Fading” is stamped on all below;
Mine is a joy no end can know:
Christ for me! Christ for me!

3. Though with the poor be cast my lot:
Christ for me! Christ for me!
“He knoweth best,” I murmur not:
Christ for me! Christ for me!
Though “vine” and “fig-tree” blight assail,
The “labor of the olive fail,”
And death o’er flock and herd prevail:
Christ for me! Christ for me!

4. Though I am now on hostile ground,
Christ for me! Christ for me!
And sin beset me all around,
Christ for me! Christ for me!
Let earth her fiercest battles wage,
And foes against my soul engage,
Strong in His strength I scorn their rage:
Christ for me! Christ for me!

5. And when my life draws to its close,
Christ for me! Christ for me!
Safe in His arms I shall repose.
Christ for me! Christ for me!
When sharpest pains my frame pervade,
And all the powers of nature fade,
Still will I sing through death’s cold shade:
Christ for me! Christ for me!
GFH1_63.name: “Whom Have I, Lord, In Heaven But Thee?”

HC2_63.content:
O' how different - I'm a man; You're God.
Out of Your beautiful, steadfast love
You came from heaven to pursue me.
I have long been Your love dream!
You desired to be a Man fore'er
To be closest, to unite with me.
You were steadfast in Your whole life journey.
You came for me; You died for me!
You took the cup, reserved Your scar of love.
This forever declares Your steadfast love!
I'm ever Your bone of bones, Your compatible one,
Besides me, who could fill Your longing heart?
You cried aloud "It is finished!"
Dark nights have past; eternal spring has arrived.
Achieved the impossible, Your love overcame all.
Your sweet dream of love has come true!

Your creation all comes to celebrate
You are risen forever for me,
On earth, You once lived and gave Your life.
Your sweet love dream came true!
Sweet eternity, endless discov'ries,
Flowers blooming with sweet fragrance,
You hold my hand on this endless path of love.
Birds are singing; butterflies are dancing!
We're forever deeply united.
Your love dream will go beyond all forever!
O' Our brightest future
Hope of glory!
The Lamb's glorious wedding feast in heaven,
Eternal New Jerusalem!
The infinite, most high Lord declares:
Behold! I make all things new!
Heaven and earth are made anew!
HC2_63.name: The Most Stunning Love Union

referenceSongs.name: 無限懸殊的愛倆，最震撼動人，最完美的結連
A Infinita Diferença entre os Amados,a mais Chocante e Perfeita União

SOL2_64.content:
To glorify the Lord, 
revive the church,
And bring many to the Father,
Deny myself, by faith, live for Him 
Heav'nly vision compels my heart.
Bravely I'll march forward.
One day He'll come!
I'll see His face.
O' let us rejoice!
SOL2_64.name: The Lord’s Commission in 1964

HC1_64.content:
No phones, no video games,
No screen, no wasting time.
I don't want to get distracted.
I don't want to be addicted.
Though there may be struggles,
Challenges and failures,
I want to endure and overcome.
Fix my eyes on the Lord,
Draw close to Him.
Redeem my time; my faith is strengthened.
Let us fight this battle together!
Drawn by You, my heart is kindled!
Full of passion, I am satisfied.
I have strength to face every day!
HC1_64.name: Redeem My Time! Draw Near to God!

SOL1_65.content:
Dearest Lord, my Beloved,
You have left heav'n's glories;
For me You came from heav'n to the earth;
For love, You longed to be a Man;
Fully committed Yourself!
Your love warms and heals my heart.

2. God's beloved Son, O' my Beloved,
You came down from heav'n high;
O' Godhood united with manhood!
Born in manger; died on the cross!
Love that dared death gains my heart!
How sweet to live in Your love.

3. Dearest Lord, my Beloved,
Your love dream has come true!
Now I am Your love forever!
Forever You dwell in my heart!
I am Yours and You are mine!
O' sweet love's eternity!
SOL1_65.name: Eternal Commitment

SOL2_65.content:
I have beheld "the worlds of love"
Shining throughout the universe;
The Lord and I shall ever reign.
We'll fly with joy in "worlds of love."

2. I have beheld "the worlds of love" 
More than the sand and the stars.
There'll be no end to the increase
Of His peace and government.
SOL2_65.name: The Worlds of Love

GFH2_66.content:
1. Lord, Your body is given for me.
The veil is rent, was torn in two.
Now there is no more hindrance of sin.
With my face unveiled I see Your glory.
Hallelujah! How You long that I am Yours!
You desire to draw near to me,
And I treasure to draw near to You.
“Close to Him!” How precious ‘tis to me!
My good part and my eternal bliss.
When I rise up early ev’ry day.
I long to draw near to Him.

2. Father, how broad and loving is Your heart!
You gave Your Son to ransom me,
That I may fore’er know and follow You.
And you bring me into Your household, too.
Hallelujah! The Father’s house has appeared!
‘Tis my family, and your family.
Let’s together love and care for it.
Father, help us to love even more,
To accomplish Your beautiful will,
Ever to be rooted in this house.
Heart to heart we journey home.
GFH2_66.name: The Will Of The Father And The Son

referenceSongs.name: O desejo do Pai e do Filho

SOL2_66.content:
My dear Lord faced the power of darkness,
He alone foretast'd the cup.
In the garden so grieved, He prayed in tears.
His sweats were like drops of blood.

2. The Lord found His disciples asleep.
They could not watch for a while.
"The spirit is willing; the flesh is weak,"
He said with sympathy.

3. The Lord found His disciples asleep.
He did not blame nor complain.
With love, He urged them to watch and pray,
Lest they enter temptations.

4. He found them weary and asleep again.
He was driven to die for them.
He looked upon them with compassion.
His heart was deeply moved.

5. He longed for them to be with Him fore'er,
Sit on the throne with them.
He treasured their friendship in those three years,
The days of laughter and tears.

6. How could He not give Himself for them?
How could He not drink the cup?
He's willing. Eagerly He prayed in tears,
"Father, may Your will be done!"

7. O Lord, I am amazed at Your love.
I'm Your drive to go to the cross.
I'll always think of Your lifeyielding love.
May I love You only.

8. All the days of my life I'll consider
My favoured position in You.
May I be mindful of Your gaze of love,
Feel deeply Your love for me.
SOL2_66.name: The Lord’s Sorrow and His Beloved in the Garden
tags: The Lord Came From Heaven to Earth

GFH1_66.content:
1. Join all the glorious names
Of wisdom, love, and power,
That ever mortals knew,
That angels ever bore:
All are too poor to speak His worth,
Too poor to set my Saviour forth.

2. Great Prophet of my God,
My tongue would bless Your name:
By Thee the joyful news
Of our salvation came:
The joyful news of sins forgiv’n,
Of hell subdued and peace with heav’n

3. Jesus, my great High Priest,
Offered His blood, and died;
My guilty conscience seeks
No sacrifice beside:
His powerful blood did once atone,
And now it pleads before the throne.

4. My Almighty Lord,
My Conqu’ror and my King,
Thy matchless power and love,
Thy saving grace, I sing;
Thine is the power – Oh, may I sit
In willing bonds beneath Your feet.

5. Now let my soul arise,
And tread the tempter down,
My Captain leads me forth
To conquest and crown:
The feeblest Saint shall win the day,
Though death and hell obstruct the way.

6. Should all the hosts of death,
And powers of hell unknown,
Put their most dreadful forms
Of rage and malice on,
I shall be safe; for Christ displays
Superior power and guardian grace.
GFH1_66.name: Join All The Glorious Names

HC1_66.content:
I don't just want to live and pass away.
I will rise and remain on high,
For this world is in deep darkness.
I will shine and light up the sky!
I don't just want to live from day to day.
I will rise; God's dream I'll embrace,
Think what He thinks; love what He loves,
Follow Him today,
Follow Him always.

Fear not the long, the long dark night.
Let me shine, shine forth this brilliant light,
Light up the way for the lost to come home.
The Father and son celebrate!
The Father and son embrace!
HC1_66.name: Rising Star

HC2_66.content:
Infinite One, You love me.
I am Your love dream!
Infinite One, I love You.
I love You most!
You and I, though so distant,
You have bridged the gap.
You raise me to be Your
Most compatible beloved.
Compatible beloved.
HC2_66.name: The Infinite One Loves Me; I am His Love Dream

referenceSongs.name: The Infinite One Loves Me; I am His Love Dream

SOL1_67.content:
In the glory my Lover,
My best Friend holds all authority!
He's the beloved Son of God,
My glorious Savior.
For me, He came down to the earth
As a man forever.
He loved me so much that He gave Himself

On the cruel cross for me,
But He has risen from the dead
And ascended to heaven!
Wow! One day, from the glory, He will come back
To take me to His most wonderful home.
Now in heav'n, He lives for me;
From morning to night He's thinking of me;
I belong to Him; His desire is toward me!
His fairest heart and strong arms all are mine!
O' I love Him! He's my treasure and port-ion
Incomparable!
SOL1_67.name: My Lover in the Glory

HC2_67.content:
Set me as a seal on Your heart!
As a seal on Your arm, on Your arm!:
For love is strong as death;
Jealousy is cruel as Sheol;
The flashes thereof are flashes of fire,
A very flame of Yahweh.
Many waters cannot quench love,
Neither can floods drown it:
If a man would give all the substance
Of his house for love,
He would utterly be contemned.
Hallelujah! O, Your love!
Hallelujah! O, Your love!
HC2_67.name: A Very Flame of Yahweh

GFH2_68.content:
In God’s household lived many saints. 
How excellent they are!
United in love and honesty,
Never split. (never split)
For the love of Christ has melted me,
That I know what love should be,
Lost in brothers’ and sisters’
Loving streams. (loving streams)
Let’s join hands to walk the journey,
Building up ourselves in love;
Stand up in unity, satisfy Him.
GFH2_68.name: In God's Household

SOL2_68.content:
They overcame Satan 
by the blood of the Lamb
And by their testimonies.
They did not love their lives 
even when faced with death,
Even when faced with death.
May glory and praises
Be to the Lamb of God who was slain,
To the Lamb forever and ever.
SOL2_68.name: The Blood of the Lamb—Foundation of Victory
tags: Fruit of the Cross. Glorious Salvation

referenceSongs.name: 羔羊的血──勝仇敵的根基
羔羊的血——勝仇敵的根基

GFH1_68.name: The Lord's My Shepherd

HC1_68.content:
Won, won, You've won the vict'ry
Too, too, it's too good to be free!
Free from bondage I go forth.
For Your heart and will I strive.
Fire, fire, deep inside,
Give me five then I will fly.
Fly, fly, flying on high,
Run to Thee for fire.
(Revival fire! Give me five!)
HC1_68.name: Run to Thee for Fire, Revival Fire

SOL1_69.content:
In this whole universe,
There is no higher love,
There's no deeper union,
Now I'm joined to You as one!
I am amazed at Your desire and love,
From eternity, forever outflows.
It is Your heart's deepest hidden secret,
Thrilled am I!
Lord, Your sweet dream of love
Has gloriously fulfilled,
I'm joined with You in love;
Forev'r You dwell in my heart!
Daily let me live close to You in love,
Fore'er live in the bright beautiful spring!
It's most precious I am Your dearest lover,
O' how sweet!
Your desire is for me,
And I love You dearly;
I long to know You more;
Daily live in Your rich love!
SOL1_69.name: The Union of Love

GFH2_69.content:
1. This is my Father’s world.
See the wonder of His works!
All show His love and tender care,
Give grace and joy to man.
He made birds of fine tunes,
“Alarm-cocks” that crow at dawn;
He made insects play the symphony,
He clothes the night with peace.

2. He made the sun that shines,
The moon that glows at night;
He made clouds to shower and cleanse,
And as sun-shade so nice.
He made mountains and seas,
For my delight in the scenes,
Lovely and thoughtful are His designs,
Showing His love tender and real.

3. He made the galaxies,
To widen my eyesight,
My Father’s greatness I may perceive,
That draws my heart to worship.
Your love is high and deep,
Thoughts of love as sand at sea.
I praise Your love; I admire Your grace;
Echoes of love I give.
GFH2_69.name: The Love Of Creation

SOL2_69.content:
My Lord Jesus when will You return?
How much longer we still have to wait?
The night is far spent. The dawn is at hand.
We know You will soon return!

*Chorus:
May be by today,
I'll see my Lord face to face!
May be by next day!
Let's adorn ourselves to watch and wait.*

2. 'Tis our only want for many years,
The hope of the saints who fell asleep,
And the one same cry through all the ages,
"Come quickly, O' Lord Jesus!"

*Chorus:
May be by today,
I'll see my Lord face to face!
May be by next day!
Let's adorn ourselves to watch and wait.*

3. Soon our home above will be ready.
The Son of Man will come in glory!
Let us build God's household after His heart,
Bearing love and unity!

*Chorus:
May be by today,
I'll see my Lord face to face!
May be by next day!
Let's adorn ourselves to watch and wait.*
SOL2_69.name: If the Lord Comes Today

HC1_69.content:
I have the same mind with You,
And You are with me.
As we walk, we get closer.
Think of what You think. Love what You love.
We feel the same. We think the same.
It is not moving mountains,
Crossing the Red Sea every day;
But I walk steadfastly on the way,
Do the work of my hand.
All these days in my life enrich
Our experience. Our friendship grows.
All these I won't forget. Not being aware,
I love You more and more.
You and I live better days.
You'll treasure even more.
Our yesterday, today, tomorrow -
All are steadfast and colourful.
HC1_69.name: Steadfast and Colourful

HC2_69.content:
Abba and me, I feel so sweet
When I call You again and again.
The past experiences tell me how good You are.
Don't need to search anymore.
In this moment I know I am before You
And that You are before me.
Now I don't need to recall past memories.
I deeply believe You are my Abba.
Now my Abba, I come near to You.
HC2_69.name: Abba and Me

GFH1_70.name: Jesus Is All The World To Me

HC2_70.content:
God, You gladly pours down all to me,
Every blessing, every treasure.
Nothing held back, You are so passionate to me.
From heaven You freely pour down all to me.
What a beautiful loving heart,
Unlimited blessings outflow.
I am happy to receive,
Yet You are even happier for me.
My joy is Your greatest joy.
So I open my arms
And gladly receive.
HC2_70.name: Abba Gives All to Me

SOL1_71.content:
From eternity past
You thought of me;
Your precious thoughts of love
Outnumber the sands.
You have designed my life
Up to eternity.
O' Your desire of love is toward me!

2. You knew Your life's journey
paved with much suffering,
From manger to the cross,
full of trials and pain;
But You longed to come down
and love to be a Man,
To ever be like me and close to me.

3. When You faced the cruel cross,
You thought of me;
After You have risen,
You thought of me;
Now in glorious heaven,
all day You think of me;
You really long for me!
Your heart is mine!

4. One day You come for me!
My joy overflows!
The wedding feast of love
dissolves my heart.
In the presence of all
You show Your love for me,
O' Your desire of love is toward me!
SOL1_71.name: The Lord’s Secret: His Desire is toward Me

referenceSongs.name: Segredo do Senhor: Seu desejo é por mim

GFH2_71.content:
1. The Lord’s Father - my Father,
The Lord’s God - my God as well;
Now I am my Father’s dear child.
His bosom - my resting place.
Manifold afflictions I’ve passed,
But His plan must be the best.
He has planned all my life’s journey -
“Through suff’rings enter glory”.

2. Father, my time‘s in Your hand.
Everything‘s good in its time.
I don’t fear the long dark valley.
Dawn of hope will come at last.
Your thoughts plentiful and precious.
Rainbow ‘s bright when rain is past.
Your way is higher than man’s way,
Your love is higher than sky.

3. I am well loved as Your Son,
Father, I’m in Your best care.
You know well all my afflictions,
You have numbered all my hair.
Oft’ You uphold me on my right,
Not be shaken will my feet;
My heart‘s glad and free of worries,
Finishes the course in peace.

4. On earth, Father, You’re with me;
Before You I boast and leap.
With a heart sincere and set free,
Talk closely with You, how sweet.
Comes the day the Lord receives me,
See Your face my joy is full.
Fellow-heir with Christ in heaven,
Sharing all eternally.
GFH2_71.name: The Father’s Name

SOL2_71.content:
When I think of the day You will crown me,
Which is the day You come to take me,
I can't imagine how I'll be
Overwhelmed with joy.
In the presence of all, 
You'll show Your love for me.
Your deep love for me 
thrills heavens and earth.
All tears and sorrows will pass away.
You know well all my labor.
The wounds on me will change to be
Prints and marks of love.
O' my love for You,
No words can tell but You know well 
My heart feels sweet.
My dear Lord, for Your love,
I'll cast my crowns before You on that day.
SOL2_71.name: The Day That You Will Crown Me

HC1_71.content:
I could hear, I could hear the voice of My Son.
I knew His voice, His plea, His cry.
And I saw He was covered with wounds,
His hands, His feet were pierced.
I could feel, I could feel the stress in His heart -
The injustice, tortures and pains.
I kept silent. I walked away from Him.
I covered My face.
I did not save, did not bind up His wounds,
Nor defend Him. My face was against Him.
I struck Him as if He were my enemy.
I crushed Him, caused Him to suffer
without mercy.
For many sons, and to finish, to finish
The eternal salvation,
I put Him to be cursed, to be cursed.
He was hung on the tree,
And I endured the pains of the cross.
My heart was pierced. My heart was broken.
Would I had died instead of You!
O' My son, My son, do you know My heart?
Do you know My love for you?
HC1_71.name: The Father's Cross
HC1_71.musicBy: Fanny Lung and Vancouver music team

HC2_71.content:
Abba, I'm Your dearest little one.
I'm lovely before You.
I am always pure and innocent.
I hold Your hand tight, Abba.
In everything I rely on You.
I look unto You.
I am boastful and I have no fears
By my Father - the giant!
We've gone through many. We have deep experience.
I know You more. I'm mindful of
My Abba's work. I give You ideas.
I tell You my thoughts, my plans.

Abba, I'm still Your little one.
I won't carry Your load.
I have perfect rest. I trust You fully.
Abba, I want Your big hand to hold my little hand.
We're always hand in hand.
I rely on You.
I fully trust You.
HC2_71.name: Abba, I am Your Little One

GFH1_72.content:
1. Take the world, but give me Jesus,
All its joys are but a name;
But His love abideth ever,
Through eternal years the same.

*Refrain:
O the height and depth of mercy!
O the length and breadth of love!
O the fullness of redemption,
Pledge of endless life above.*

2. Take the world, but give me Jesus,
Sweetest comfort of my soul;
With my Saviour watching o’er me
I can sing, though billows roll.

*Refrain:
O the height and depth of mercy!
O the length and breadth of love!
O the fullness of redemption,
Pledge of endless life above.*

3. Take the world, but give me Jesus,
Let me see His constant smile;
Then throughout my pilgrim journey
Light will cheer me all the while.

*Refrain:
O the height and depth of mercy!
O the length and breadth of love!
O the fullness of redemption,
Pledge of endless life above.*

4. Take the world, but give me Jesus,
In His Cross my trust shall be,
Till, with clearer, brighter vision,
Face to face my Lord I see.

*Refrain:
O the height and depth of mercy!
O the length and breadth of love!
O the fullness of redemption,
Pledge of endless life above.*
GFH1_72.name: Take The World, But Give Me Jesus

SOL1_73.content:
I have stolen my Lord's heart,
Day and night He thinks of me;
His thoughts of love toward me
Outnumber the sands or stars.

2. I have stolen my Lord's heart,
He'll gaze on me forever;
He sets His love forev'r on me,
His love draws me close to Him.

3. I have stolen my Lord's heart,
He shouts for joy over me,
His smile is so bright and warm,
His love captures my heart.
SOL1_73.name: I have Stolen My Lord’s Heart

GFH2_73.content:
1. My Father who loves me ever,
Holds me with His loving hand;
With His highest love that knows no end,
Paves my journey of glory.
In afflictions, through dark valley,
My heart can rejoice in You;
“Through suff’ring to glory” - t’is my way,
Too beautiful is my gain.

2. My Father who loves me ever,
You've listened to all my pray’rs;
All Your promises will never fail,
And Your time must be the best.
Mid the trials You open a way,
Perfect me through sufferings;
What You’ve planned for Your beloved ones
Must surpass what I can think
GFH2_73.name: My Father Who Loves Me Ever

referenceSongs.name: Meu Pai que me ama sempre

SOL2_73.content:
Though the Morning Star has not appeared,
The world's signs, Bible prophecies
Make it clear the dawn is near;
Let me fight battles daily!
In my heart is the hope of glory.
Be steadfast till the task's achieved.
Today and tomorrow march on still,
For the toil in God is not in vain.
Be faithful till death the crown to gain.
When the last trumpet we'll hear that day,
Lift our eyes, and see His glorious face.
Endless jubilation!
Our body will be changed!
We'll exult and glory.
We'll be filled with overwhelming joy,
Winging to the air with all the saints.
O' what a glorious moment!
I long to meet the Lord in the clouds.
SOL2_73.name: Wing to the Air

HC1_73.content:
1. Lord I enjoy every day You're my life.
In all circumstances I enjoy Your supply,
And my heart is quiet, peaceful, strengthened, steadfast.
I'm not troubled, nor anxious.

2. I've never thought that it is so easy,
Free and light hearted to live a life of victory.
I don't need to frown, struggle, nor feel distressed.
Under Your wings, I shout for joy. I rejoice in
All the days You've made.
There was a time when I felt
I was rushing day after day.
Now I can walk in a wide place,
Rejoice in Him, happy and free -
Walk with the Lord in a wide place,
Rejoice in Him, happy and free.
HC1_73.name: The Lord is My Life

HC2_73.content:
Abba, since ages ago, You have designed
And have built a city for us.
You have many beautiful thoughts and plans
to bring Your family together.
For the unique design for everyone,
For the arrangements for the whole,
You have the longest consideration,
The perfect planning, the complete blueprint.
You've fortast'd the joy of the very moment
When Your plan is done. You wait with gladness
To see how excited we are
When we enter the eternal home.
You'll see us flying around, here and there.
We'll touch and look around with amazement.
You'll see our eyes sparkling and shining
With exceeding joy!
We'll be in awe. We'll praise You of Your wonders.
We'll be happy. We'll sing and dance, praise more and more.
We'll all celebrate. Forever we'll celebrate.
Forever we'll celebrate.
HC2_73.name: Abba Welcomes Us to the Heavenly Home

SOL1_74.content:
It's so precious! You are my Beloved!
You have fully committed Yourself;
You confirm it with Your precious blood,
It really deeply touches my heart.
Your love is stronger than death,
And forever the same.
Now You and I are most deeply united.
The love's covenant is forever sure.
Your love is like a rainbow!
Colorful, beautiful,
So tender, so bountiful,
So unique and personal; from morn to dusk,
You're gazing on me, thinking of me,
Longing for me, embracing me!
Help me to have the bravest faith,
And a dancing spirit,
To echo Your matchless touching love,
And set my love on You!
SOL1_74.name: Love like a Rainbow

referenceSongs.name: 彩虹般的情愛‧完美的委身

GFH2_74.content:
1. In my Father’s bosom I’m loved,
I am His delightful hymn.
All my hair with care is numbered,
He treasures me more than birds.
Precious thoughts He does bear for me
More than the sands of the sea.
My sitting down or rising up,
Ever in His loving sight.

2. From young to old, He fosters me.
All my life is in His hand.
Fellow-heir with Christ now I am,
Enjoy His abundant plan.
Though on earth there are vales of tears,
He’s the God of all comfort.
He holds my hand through the journey,
Till in heaven I see Him.
GFH2_74.name: Love Of The Father

referenceSongs.name: Vivendo no abraço do Aba, Senhor e Espírito Santo

GFH1_74.content:
1. Jesus the very thought of Thee,
With sweetness fills my breast;
But sweeter far Thy face to see,
And in Thy presence rest.

2. Nor voice can sing, nor heart can frame,
Nor can the mem’ry find
A sweeter sound than Thy blest Name,
O Savior of mankind!

3. O Hope of every contrite heart,
O Joy of all the meek,
To those who fall, how kind Thou art!
How good to those who seek!

4. And those who find Thee, find a bliss
Nor tongue nor pen can show;
The love of Jesus, what it is
None but His loved ones know.

5. O Jesus, light of all below!
Thou fount of life and fire!
Surpassing all the joys we know,
And all we can desire.

6. No other source have we but Thee,
Soul-thirst to satisfy.
Exhaustless spring! The waters free!
All other streams are dry.

7. Jesus, our only Joy be Thou,
As Thou our Prize wilt be;
Jesus, be Thou our Glory now,
And through eternity.
GFH1_74.name: Jesus, The Very Thought Of Thee

SOL2_75.content:
God who did not spare 
His only beloved Son
But for us He gave Him up,
How will He not also with the Lord
Freely give us all, give us all, give us all?
How will He not also with the Lord
Freely give us all,
Freely give us all?
SOL2_75.name: Unreserved Love

HC1_75.content:
The song of songs which is Solomon's.
Kiss me with kisses of your mouth
Better than wine is your love;
Your ointments are pleasant.
Your name is oil poured forth, oil poured forth.
Therefore the young women love you.
Draw me after you! Let us run together.
The kings brought me into his chambers.
We will exult and rejoice in you.
We'll remember your love,
Praise your love more than wine,
And rightly do they love you, they love you.
HC1_75.name: Song 1:1-4 Draw Me Away

referenceSongs.name: 雅歌一1-4 內室與吸引

HC2_75.content:
Be strong, O' My son, be strong!
Be strong and courageous, be strong!
There are no failures,
For the battle's not over.
Be strong O' My Son, be strong!
Arise, O' My love, arise!
Arise, My warrior bride!
Come now, My awesome army
With banners up high.
Arise, O' My darling, arise!
HC2_75.name: Be Strong and Arise

SOL1_76.content:
Manifold love abides in You,
How beautiful! Your heart!
Your affection so deep, so sure,
Sealed with Your precious blood!
Love's union, Love's commitment
Will endure forever.
One day with You, sit on the throne!
Fore'er I'll sing and praise.

2. Now I live in river of love;
The bliss I can't express!
I long to go to all kingdoms,
To praise Your matchless love.
My spirit, soul and body
Respond with love to You.
To wait for You, steadfast I'll be,
With faith march on with You.
SOL1_76.name: Manifold Love

GFH2_76.content:
1. This is My Father’s world!
I can be free of worries.
Dancing, singing as a bird of cheer,
praising His watching over me.
This is My Father’s world,
I can sing Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha!
My name has been set upon His heart,
I am the apple of His eye.

2. My Lord has conquered Satan,
He has overcome the world.
He is risen, taken to heaven,
As head over all things for me.
Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha!
He has won the victory!
Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha!
My Brother holds authority!
GFH2_76.name: This is My Father’s World

referenceSongs.name: Esse é o Mundo do Meu Pai

SOL2_76.content:
Like an apple tree of the woods,
So is my Beloved among the sons.
I sit down in His shade with joy;
His fruit is sweet to my taste.
He brings me to the banquet hall;
His banner over me is love.
Provide me with cakes of raisins
To sustain me, sustain me.
Give me apples to refresh me,
Because I am love sick.
His left hand is under my head;
His right hand embraces me.
O' daughters of Jerusalem,
I charge you by the gazelles,
Or by the does of the field,
Do not stir up nor awaken love.
Wait until it pleases.
SOL2_76.name: Enjoy the Lord

GFH1_76.content:
1. Lord Jesus! When we think of Thee,
Of all Thy love and grace,
Our spirits long and fain would see
Thy beauty face to face.

2. And though the wilderness we tread,
A barren, thirsty ground,
With thorns and briars overspread,
Where foes and snares abound.

3. Yet in Thy love such depths we see,
Our souls o’erflow with praise –
Content ourselves, while, Lord to Thee
A joyful song we raise.

4. Our Lord, our Life, our Rest, our Shield,
Our Rock, our Food, our Light –
Each thought of Thee doth constant yield
Unchanging, fresh delight.

5. Blest Saviour, keep our spirits stayed
Hard following after Thee,
Till we, in robes of white arrayed,
Thy face in glory see.
GFH1_76.name: Lord Jesus! When We Think Of Thee

HC2_76.content:
Long for revivals - may the Spirit
Of God be upon us
And we will bring the good news to all nations.
Long for revivals - we won't be silent.
We've set the watchmen to pray
Day and night,
Until her righteousness
Goes forth as brightness,
Her salvation as a burning light.
The church is a praise in the earth;
Until we can see the beauty -
Liberty, comfort,
The year of the Lord's favour,
The oil of gladness,
The cloak of praise, trees of righteousness,
The robe of righteousness, the royal crown
Adorned with jewels, what is sown
Bringing forth its sprouts, goodness upon goodness,
Double portion, everlasting joy.
Long for revivals! Long for revivals!
HC2_76.name: Long for Revival

GFH2_77.content:
1. Jesus gives me living water,
He’s my dew and my joy.
He is the bread of life that fills my hunger;
Jesus is my rock, my fortress,
my refuge and my shield.
He is my inner strength, my ready Helper.
He’s my life, transforms me
from glory to glory.
He’s my glorious boastful hope of this last age.

*Chorus:
Jesus is the Bright Morning Star,
the henna in the yard;
I am His, He is mine, I love Him ever.*

2. Jesus is my Mediator,
who pleads and intercedes.
He’s my High Priest who can sympathize and bless;
Jesus is my King who subdues
my heart’s adversaries.
He is the King of kings. His foes will perish.
All will be put under Him;
All knees’ll bow to Him.
The universe will be filled with His vict’ry.
GFH2_77.name: Jesus Is My Portion

HC1_77.content:
I am very dark but I am lovely,
O' daughters of Jerusalem.
I am like the tents of Kedar. I'm like
The curtains of Solomon.
Do not gaze at me because I am dark,
For the sun has tanned me.
My mother’s sons were angry with me;
They made me keeper of the vineyards,
But my own vineyard I have not kept
Tell me, you whom my soul loves,
Where do you feed your flock? Tell me, tell me, my love,
Where do you make it rest at noon? Why should I
Be like one who veils herself beside the flocks
Of your companions, O’ my love?
HC1_77.name: Song 1:5-7 Long to be By Your Side

referenceSongs.name: 雅歌一5-7 渴望隨主左右

SOL1_78.content:
I am amazed! I affect You so much!
For me, You came from heaven to the earth;
You love to be a Man forever,
Gladly gave Yourself for me on the cross!
Your love is overwhelming!
Melts and captures my heart.
You want to have the deepest union with me,
And live with me forevermore.
You are self sufficient, infinite, ov'rflowing,
Because of love You need me most!
You long to see my face and hear my voice;
You lead me to Your fair inner chambers,
To enjoy love's interflow.
May I live in freedom and joy
As Your darling and friend!
Daily lean on Your bosom of love,
My heart ever close to You!
SOL1_78.name: Who Affect the Lord the Most

GFH2_78.content:
1. He’s so fair! He’s so good!
My abundant love feast!
He’s so fair! He’s so good!
More than tongue or pen can tell.
Close to Him, close to Him;
I foretaste heavenly joy.
Close to Him, close to Him;
Is my portion on earth.

2. He’s so fair! He’s so good!
My Friend faithful and true;
He’s so fair! He’s so good!
My Beloved, sweet and dear.
He’s with me, He’s with me,
Nothing on earth shall I fear!
He’s with me, He’s with me,
My heart’s gladdened and cheered.

3. He’s so fair! He’s so good!
Spurs me on all my life.
He’s so fair! He’s so good!
Gives me joy and comfort.
For the Lord, for the Lord,
I will bravely go forth.
For the Lord, for the Lord,
I will strive through my course.
GFH2_78.name: The Lord Is Fair And Good

SOL2_78.content:
My eyes of faith see the Lord's heart
Engraved with my glorious name,
See His precious thoughts and longing toward me.
His countenance and His bosom
Are my joy, my satisfaction, perfect rest.

2. My eyes of faith see the Lord's arm
Sealed with my lovely name,
See His mighty and gracious hand uphold me.
His arms of love tightly hold me.
I feel so warm His embrace heals my heart.

3. My eyes of faith see the Father's
Smiling face, love and welcome.
He's waiting to embrace me with sweet kisses.
My Abba's love satisfies me.
His affection and love fill the universe.
SOL2_78.name: My Eyes of Faith See His Heart
tags: Victoriously Overcome Satan. Spirit Set Free

GFH1_78.content:
1. How sweet the name of Jesus sounds
In a believer’s ear!
It soothes his sorrows, heals his wounds,
And drives away his fear.

2. It makes the wounded spirit whole,
And calms the troubled breast;
‘Tis manna to the hungry soul
And to the weary rest.

3. Dear Name! the Rock on which I build,
My shield and hiding place,
My never-failing treasury, filled
With boundless stores of grace!

4. Jesus! My Shepherd, Lover, Friend,
My Prophet, Priest, and King;
My Lord, my Life, my Way, my End,
Enjoy the praise I bring.

5. Weak is the effort of my heart,
And cold my warmest thought;
But when I see Thee as Thou art,
I’ll praise Thee as I ought.

6. Till then I would Thy love proclaim
With every fleeting breath;
And may the music of Thy Name
Refresh my soul in death!
GFH1_78.name: How Sweet The Name Of Jesus Sounds

HC2_78.content:
If I were the mouth,
I would preach and sing out loud.
I'd let everyone
Know that the Lord is good.

2. If I were the hand,
I would serve and I would work hard.
O' let me be
Helpful to everyone.

3. If I were the foot,
I would run to places in need.
O' let me follow
The footsteps of the Lord.

4. Each one of us is precious
Each one of us is important.
Let us come together, be united as one.
We stand as one man - a giant.
Let us arise and shine forth
To light up the world
And let many see the way of the Lord.
HC2_78.name: May Everyone be Useful

GFH2_79.content:
1. No longer I, but Jesus Christ,
Becomes the centre of my life;
Ever I’m His, forever He is mine.
Christ is the Lover of my heart.

2. Not on myself, look upon Christ,
He’s my heart’s vision of glory.
The Lord draws me fore’er to follow Him.
I belong to Him, O how sweet
GFH2_79.name: Christ Is The Centre Of My Life
tags: Victoriously Overcome Satan. Spirit Set Free

referenceSongs.name: Cristo é o centro da minha vida

SOL2_79.content:
The road of faith gets brighter as I walk on.
The road of faith gets more joyous and glorious.
The road of faith reveals the Lord's preciousness.
The road of faith draws me closer to the Lord.

*Chorus:
Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha!
By faith I overcome the world.
By faith I never thirst.
Living water flows from my heart.*

2. Shall I be afraid of tribulations?
He has overcome the world, Satan, and death.
He has promised to be with me always
Till the day when I shall see His glorious face.

*Chorus:
Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha!
By faith I overcome the world.
By faith I never thirst.
Living water flows from my heart.*

3. The Lord's risen and ascended to heaven.
For me He lives and holds all authority.
He makes use of the enemies and problems.
He makes all things work together for my good.

*Chorus:
Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha!
By faith I overcome the world.
By faith I never thirst.
Living water flows from my heart.*
SOL2_79.name: The Road of Faith
tags: Victoriously Overcome Satan. Spirit Set Free

HC1_79.content:
1. If you do not know, most beautiful one,
Follow the trail of the flock, of the flock,
And feed your young goats, feed your little ones,
Beside the tents of the shepherds.
O’ my darling, you are like my mare
Among the chariots of Pharaoh.
Your cheeks are lovely with ornaments,
Your neck with strings of jewels.
We’ll make you jewe’ry of gold, with silver.

2. My perfume gave forth, gave forth its fragrance
While the king was at his table.
A poach of myrrh is my beloved to me
That lies all night between my breasts.
My beloved is a cluster of henna
In the vineyards of Engedi.
How beautiful You are, my darling!
Your eyes are doves, O’ my sister!
Your eyes are doves, O’ my sister!
How handsome you are,
My beloved! You're truly pleasant!
And our bed is green, it is green;
The beams of our house are cedar;
The rafters are pine, they are pine.
HC1_79.name: Song 1:8-17 In Love

SOL1_80.content:
It's so precious! I am Your perfect one;
I'm Your treasure, Your dearest only one.
You love me with Your whole heart and mind;
You have set Your love on me for-ever!
In Your admiring eyes,
I'm fair, without a flaw.
I have captured Your heart;
You love to think of me,
You leap for joy and sing ov'r me.
I am Your living spring,
A garden fountain,
Gladden Your heart, give You great joy.
O north wind, o south wind, blows on my heart,
Spreads its fragrance of love to delight You.
In love with You, like a sweet dream!
May my whole life and eternity
Live with You in deep love,
Living out the 'Love Song' with You,
Enthralled in the joy of our love!
SOL1_80.name: Wholehearted Love

GFH2_80.content:
In You I’ve confidence.
No more in haste I run.
My perfect Providence,
Your grace is sufficient.
You are waiting to bless.
In You dwells all the fullness.
Gladly shall I return
To Your bosom and rest.
Drink from the salvation fount,
Enjoy Your bountiful blessings.
And lift my head above the foes,
Rejoice beneath Your wings.
GFH2_80.name: Return To The Fountain
tags: Draw Close to God and Experience Him

GFH1_80.content:
1. Jesus, Thy name I love, Jesus, my Lord!
All other names above, Jesus my Lord!
Oh, Thou art all to me! Nothing to please I see,
Nothing apart from Thee, Jesus my Lord!

2. Thou, blessed Son of God,
Jesus, my Lord!
Hast bought me with Thy blood,
Jesus, my Lord!
Oh, how great is Thy love,
All other loves above,
Love that I daily prove,
Jesus, my Lord!

3. When unto Thee I flee,
Jesus, my Lord!
Thou wilt my refuge be,
Jesus, my Lord!
What need I now to fear?
What earthly grief or care,
Since Thou art ever near?
Jesus, my Lord!

4. Soon Thou wilt come again,
Jesus, my Lord!
I shall be happy the,
Jesus, my Lord!
The Thine own face I’ll see,
Then I shall like Thee be,
Then evermore with Thee,
Jesus, my Lord!
GFH1_80.name: Jesus, Thy Name I Love

HC2_80.content:
Not even once do You reject me
When I return to You.
As long as I'm willing to return,
Flee from my sin; turn to the light.
You will run to me, embrace me,
And kiss me with kisses.
Quickly You take out the best for me to enjoy.
You hold me, treasure me;
Carry me and dance with joy.
This is the heart of the heav'nly Father,
The bosom of God,
The loving kindness of God
It's beyond all man's dreams!
HC2_80.name: The Heart of the Loving Father

GFH2_81.content:
1. Such love as Yours, makes me know the true worth in me;
Such love as Yours, makes me see the beauty of all things.
Life is full of meaning, worth well to live.
Then I understand why there’s eternity,
And I know why, Your desire is to abide in me.

2. Such love as Yours, gives me rest in days dim or bright;
Such love as Yours, makes me live in tender morning light,
Gives me hope to run my course with delight.
Thorns and swords I conquer overwhelmingly.
Lord, in Your love, there is never fear but sweetness only.

3. Such love as Yours, teaches me what beauty really means;
Such love as Yours, teaches me to praise and to give thanks.
Turns me into a poet, a morning bird;
Melts me into a river, vast and flood’d with love,
Ever flowing, toward the earth’s end, till eternity.

4. Such love as Yours, abounds in deeds, warmth and thoughts so deep;
Such love as Yours, keeps my spirit alive, ever-fresh,
Cheering me to climb up the highest peak,
Blowing me to sail towards the boundless sea,
Ever love You, follow You to the corners of the world.

5. Such love as Yours, makes me long for the heavenly home;
Such love as Yours, makes me long to see Your glorious face;
O Lord Jesus, may You come, may You come!
In the Holy City of light and love we live,
Sharing with You, endless songs and mornings eternally.
GFH2_81.name: Such Love As Yours

SOL2_81.content:
I'm a stranger and pilgrim on earth.
I long for a better home above.
Gladly would I sojourn all my life.
Fight the good fight as He sends me.
I would rather live just like the Lord
Who had no place to lay His head.
By faith reach to the end of the earth,
Be one whom the world's not worthy.

2. Let's take the commission of the Lord,
Build the church according to His will.
Spread the truth to all nations and lands.
The church we'll revive and rebuild.
By faith, climb mountains and cross the Red Sea.
By faith, I boast and shout for joy.
By faith, I satisfy His heart.
By faith, I praise His name!

3. For the Lord, I count all things as loss.
O' Lord, keep my heart to the end.
Ever be faithful and pure to Him,
Love Him more than I first began.
By faith I feed on His faithfulness,
Fortress and giants are my food.
By faith march on with joy always.
By faith I live for Him.
SOL2_81.name: Take up the Task and Sojourn for the Lord

referenceSongs.name: 肩負託付為主環遊（飄流 / 周遊 / 巡迴）

HC1_81.content:
Hark! This is the voice of my beloved!
O' He comes leaping over the hills.
My beloved's like a young stag, like a gazelle.
There he stands behind our wall.
He's gazing through the windows.
He's looking through the lattice.
My beloved says to me,
"Arise, my beautiful one, my love;
Come along with me and behold,

Lo, the winter is past; the rain is gone.
Trials ended, flowers bloom on the earth.
The time of the singing of birds has come.
The turtle-dove's voice has been heard!
The fig tree has ripened its figs;
Vines in blossom give forth fragrance.
O' My darling beautiful one,
Arise! Arise! And come along, and come along!"
HC1_81.name: Song 2:8-13

SOL1_82.content:
In this world, none can compare;
Forever, none can exchange.
The Lord's my Beloved; I am His darling.
This love song
shall be sung fore'er.
Before time, He thought of me.
Full of hope, He created me
To be most like Him, be closest to Him.
Be in love with Him and share His all.

2. Who knows how high heaven is?
He loves me high'r than the sky!
From heaven to earth,
From His birth to death,
He loved me, gave Himself for me.
To seek me, He suffered much.
To save me, He passed through death.
The Lord has opened His bleeding heart to me,
His infinite love towards me.
SOL1_82.name: The Bleeding Heart

GFH1_82.content:
1. Oh, for a thousand tongues to sing
My great Redeemer’s praise;
The glories of my God and King,
The triumphs of His grace!

2. Jesus, the Name that charms our fears,
That bids our sorrows cease!
‘Tis music in the sinner’s ears,
‘Tis life, and health, and peace.

3. He breaks the power of cancelled sin,
He sets the prisoner free;
His blood can make the foulest clean,
His blood avails for me.

4. My gracious Master and my God,
Assist me to proclaim,
To spread through all the earth abroad
The honours of Thy Name.

5. His love my heart has captive made,
His captive would I be,
