For He was bound, and scourged and died,
My captive soul to free.

6. So now Thy blessed Name I love,
Thy will would e’er be mine,
Had I a thousand hearts to give,
My Lord, they all were Thine!
GFH1_82.name: Oh, For A Thousand Tongues To Sing

HC2_82.content:
The enemies seem to be winning.
They are walking around like roaring lions.
They lead many into sins by temptations.
Behold, the Lord's salvation's powerful.
He saves us from sins,
And we walk on the path of light.

2. The enemies make a final struggle.
They make up accusations and shadows.
They suppress us. They work willfully.
Behold, the truth from the Lord gives forth light.
He has set us free.
We shout for vict'ry every day.

3. Don't be afraid. In a little while,
The war of ages will be done!
The Lord's glorious victory
Will be proclaimed to all corners of the world.
Satan's power will be shattered
The darkness wil flee away.
The truth will shine.
The Lord will reign forever.
HC2_82.name: The Power of Darkness Will Vanish

GFH2_83.content:
1. My darling, my dove, I long for you;
Let Me hear your voice, see your face,
For your voice is sweet, and your face is lovely.
Let’s meet in the clefts of the rock.
My darling, my dove, I’ll share with you your joy and tears.
Walk with you heavenward, E’er be your company,
Until we meet in eternity.

2. My Saviour, my Beloved, I long to draw near!
For Your love to me is high and deep!
Down from heaven You came, paid the ransom for me.
Such great love forever constrains me!
My Saviour, my Beloved, I am wholly drawn after You.
None in heaven I love, none on earth I desire,
None else I will seek besides You.
GFH2_83.name: The Song Of Solomon

SOL2_83.content:
I love to be alone with You.
Freely I talk to You.
Every morning Your love is new.
May You renew my heart.

2. Alone with You in our secret place 
This is our sweet moment.
O' Father of almighty pow'r,
My heart is unveiled to You.

3. Father, nothing I hide from You,
Open my heart to You.
You're full of mercies and comfort.
I pour out my heart to You.

4. As Your dear child, peacefully I rest
In Your bosom of love.
Fatherly love fills all my heart,
My sorrow, troubles are gone.

5. Alone with You, I am most set free,
In laughter or in tears.
Gladly I'll be away from friends,
To be with You only.

6. The Groom will soon gloriously appear,
Take me to Father's home.
With endless joy, I'll see Your face
In heaven, our eternal home.
SOL2_83.name: Alone with the Father

HC1_83.content:
1. O’ my dove, in the clefts of the rock,
In the secret places of the cliff,
Let me see your face and hear your voice;
Let me see your face, let me hear your voice,
For your voice is sweet to me
And your face is lovely.
Catch the foxes for us, for us,
The little foxes that spoil the vineyards,
For our vineyards are in blossom, in blossom

2. My beloved is mine and I am his.
My beloved pastures his flock;
He feeds his flock among the lilies.
My beloved, until the cool of the day,
When the shadows flee away,
Turn my beloved, turn my beloved,
Like a gazelle, like a young stag,
On the mountains, the mountains of Bether,
A young stag on the mountains of Bether.
HC1_83.name: Song 2:14-17

SOL1_84.content:
The heavens and earth tell me Your love.
Your letter of love shows me Your love.
Your journey on earth proves me Your love.
Your precious blood is the proof
that shakes the world.
Now and ever You live in me,
Commit Yourself to affirm Your love to me.
My past journey full of Your grace.
All show Your love so tender, steadfast to me.
O' my Beloved, forever I'm Yours.
Truly, Your heart, Your arms,
Your love, Your strength, Your life
Forever belong to me.
SOL1_84.name: Manifold Evidence

GFH1_84.content:
Yesterday, today, forever,
Jesus is the same;
all may change, but Jesus never!
Glory to His name!
Glory to His name!
Glory to His name!
All may change, but Jesus never!
Glory to His name!
GFH1_84.name: Yesterday, Today, Forever

HC2_84.content:
In my life journey,
You are here, always here.
I have no fear of
The long, dark valley.
I am not afraid of
Rugged roads, cold stormy night.

2. In my every day,
You are here, always here.
Maybe I'm occupied,
Maybe I'm heavy laden.
May be I am troubled,
Maybe I'm sleepless and restless.

3. At this moment
You are here, always here.
I'm alone by myself,
No one can understand.
I have Your company,
I have You, the One who knows me.

4. You are here, always here.
You've promised to be with me.
Your gentle countenance,
Your heart warming words,
You come close and embrace me.
I have no more fears.
You come close and embrace me.
I'm able to face all.
HC2_84.name: You are Here, Always Here

GFH2_85.content:
1. Lord, Your ever precious purpose
Is for me to dwell in You.
Lord, You suffered and gave Your life;
That we may meet face to face.
Through disciplines, trials, enemies,
You urge me to come to You.
With bands of love, cords of kindness,
You have bound me close to You.

2. You give me the Holy Spirit
That I’m ever joined to You.
In close friendship we’re heart to heart,
Forever in company.
You do love me; I do love You;
Nothing can make us apart,
One day You’ll come to take me up,
To share Your endless glory.
GFH2_85.name: His Desire Is For Me

SOL2_85.content:
With Your infinite love,
Wisdom, and pow'r,
You made me to be
Your best creation:
Compatible with You,
In harmony with You.
Each other we delight,
I'm in love with You.

2. My Lord, for Yourself, 
You creat'd me
Compatible with You, 
I'm Your closest one.
One spirit I'm with You, 
most deeply united,
Heart to heart we belong, 
I'm Yours, You are mine.

3. My Lord, for Yourself, 
You creat'd me
To enjoy Your great love, 
satisfy Your heart.
Day and night I'm with You, 
in love with You fore'er,
Hold sovereignty with You till eternity.
SOL2_85.name: I was Created for the Lord

GFH1_85.content:
1. Jesus, Thou alone art worthy
Ceaseless praises to receive;
For Thy love, and grace, and goodness
Rise o’er all our thoughts conceive.

2. With adoring hearts, we render
Honour to Thy precious Name,
Overflowing with Thy mercies,
Far and wide Thy worth proclaim.

3. How good is the God we adore,
Our faithful unchanging Friend;
Whose love is as great as His power,
Knows neither measure nor end.

4. ‘Tis Jesus, the First and the Last
Whose Spirit shall guide us home;
We’ll praise Him for all that is past,
Trust Him for all that’s to come.

5. Praise Him! praise Him! praise the Saviour!
Saints aloud your voices raise!
Praise Him! praise Him! Till in heaven
Perfected we sing His praise.
GFH1_85.name: Jesus, Thou Alone Art Worthy

HC1_85.content:
On my bed by night I sought him whom my soul loves;
I sought him, but found him not.
I will rise now and go around the city — in the streets,
And in the squares, I’ll seek my love.
I sought him, but found him not.
The guards who go about the city found me.
And I asked, “Have you seen him whom my soul loves?”
Hardly had I left them when I found him whom my soul loves.
I held on to him, would not let him go.
Till I’d brought him to my mother’s house,
The chamber of her who conceived me.
Now I adjure you, daughters of Jerusalem,
By the gazelles or by the does
Of the field, that you will not
Stir up or awaken my love
Until she pleases, O' my love!
HC1_85.name: Song 3:1-5

SOL1_86.content:
What I have gained is so beautiful,
More than I can ever dream of,
More than I can obtain in this world;
I cannot exchange it with anything.
Your affection has shown.
You have gladly bestowed
So that I may know -

What I have gained is so beautiful,
More than all the things You have made.
The sky is clear and blue.
The clouds tell your message,
Much more is Your personal love.
You partake in my life,
Light up all my days.

What I have gained is so beautiful.
I am no longer a slave to sin,
But my heavenly Father's dear child,
And you walk with me in this life journey
Through suff'ring to glory.
Understand Your heart, Your desire for me,
Enjoy the abode with You and the Father,
All these make me dance with cheer.

What I have gained is so beautiful.
One day I'll live in the heav'nly place;
All tears, sorrows will pass away.
Every day I can see You face to face,
Live in eternal sweetness and grace.
O' Lord, having You, all are so beautiful!
SOL1_86.name: What I have Gained is so Beautiful

referenceSongs.name: Que Belo é o que Tu me deste

GFH2_86.content:
1. My darling among the maidens
Is like a lily among the thorns.
My darling, beautiful one,
May you arise and come along.
Let me hear your voice,
Let me see your face.
For your voice is sweet, your voice is sweet,
And lovely is your face.
My sister, My bride,
A glance of your eyes steals My heart.
My sister, My bride,
A strand of your necklace steals My heart.
My darling is charming as Tirzah,
Lovely as Jerusalem,
Awesome as an army with banners.
You are all together lovely!

2. My Beloved among the young men,
‘s like an apple tree in the forest.
His banner over me is love,
His love has captured my heart.
My Beloved is dazzling and ruddy,
Outstanding among ten thousand.
I am my beloved’s, My beloved is mine,
And His desire is for me.
Set me as a seal,
Set me as a seal upon Your heart.
Set me as a seal,
Set me as a seal upon Your arm.
Until the cool of the day
When the shadows flee away,
Make haste, my Beloved, be like a gazelle,
On the mountains of Spices.
GFH2_86.name: Echoes Of Love

GFH2_87.content:
1. The Lord’s personal love to me,
Is pure, undying to the end.
Waters, great waters cannot quench it;
Time, even years, can’t make it fade.
Withstanding various trials and tests,
It never fails my heart to gain.
The Lord’s personal love to me,
Encourages me all my life.
When I’m despaired, His love comforts me,
Great and steadfast above all things.
Rich and abundant, tender and soft,
I will boast of forevermore.

2. The Lord’s personal love to me,
Is sweet and warm and full of hope,
Shares in my life all sorrows and joy,
Gives me courage and gives me faith,
Fills my heart like a living spring,
His bosom may I ever stay!
The Lord’s personal love to me,
Makes the angels admire, amaze.
Deeper than the sea, high’r than the sky,
His love paves all my paths of life.
Grace upon grace, ‘tis uncountable,
Beyond compare, no else to find.
GFH2_87.name: The Lord’s Personal Love To Me

referenceSongs.name: O coração do meu querido Aba

SOL2_87.content:
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
He led captive a host of captives.
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
He won the vict'ry and gave gifts to men.
God has exalted my Lord,
Crowned Him with glory and honour.
He's waiting His foes to be His footstool.
Hallelujah!

2. Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
Sitting at the right of the Highest.
Christ my Lord ascended to heaven,
As head over all things to the church.
My Lord has been glorified,
And the Spirit lives in me forever.
In one spirit I am with the Lord.
Hallelujah!

3. Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
He's my Advocate with the Father.
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
He is my High Priestalways blesses me.
He will save me to the end;
He lives to make intercession for me.
He presents me perfect before God.
Hallelujah!

4. Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
He's in heaven but He's thinking of me.
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
He is my High Priest full of sympathy.
I am set free before God,
Now I come boldly to the throne of grace.
All my prayers Christ offers to God.
Hallelujah!

5. Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
It tells me all my sins are washed away.
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
It tells me Abba fully accepts me.
I am perfect before God.
I am His delight as the Lord is His.
Abba loves me as He loves the Lord.
Hallelujah!

6. Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
For me He prepares a heavenly home.
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
But He longs to take me into glory
To be His darling fore'er.
I will inherit all with the Lord.
I'll know His glory in eternity.
Hallelujah!
SOL2_87.name: My Lord in Heaven

GFH1_87.content:
1. Marvel not that Christ in glory
All my inmost heart hath won;
Not a star to cheer my darkness,
But a light beyond the sun.
All below lies dark and shadowed,
Nothing here to claim my heart,
Save the lonely track of sorrow
Where of old He walked apart.

2. Others in the earthly sunshine
Wearily may journey on,
I have seen a light from heaven
Past the brightness of the sun –
Light that knows no cloud, no waning,
Light wherin I see His face,
All His love’s uncounted treasures,
All the riches of His grace.

3. All the wonders of His glory,
Deeper wonders of His love –
How for me He won, He keepeth
That high standing all above;
Not a glimpse – the veil uplifted –
But within the veil to dwell,
Gazing on His face forever;
Hearing words unspeakable.

4. I have seen the face of Jesus –
Tell me not of aught beside;
I have heard the voice of Jesus –
All my soul is satisfied.
In the radiance of the glory
First I saw His blessed face,
And forever shall that glory
Be my home, my dwelling-place.
GFH1_87.name: Marvel Not That Christ In Glory

HC1_87.content:
O My darling, you are so beautiful!
There is no blemish in you!
May you come along with Me, My bride,
Come with Me from Lebanon.
May you come with Me from Lebanon;
From the dens of lions, and mountains of leopards;
Journey down from the peak. My sister, My bride,
You've made My heart beat fast with a glance of your eyes;
A strand of your necklace steals My heart.

O My darling, My sister, My bride,
How beautiful is your love!
How much better is your love than wine;
And the fragrance of your oils
Is better than all kinds of spices.
My sister, My bride, you are a garden locked
A rock garden locked, a spring sealed up.
You are a garden spring, a well of fresh water,
And streams flowing from Lebanon.

Awake, north wind, and come, wind of the south,
Blow into my garden!
Make my garden breathe out fragrance;
May my Beloved come and eat
All kinds of choice fruits in His garden.
HC1_87.name: Song 4:7-16 (Come Along With Me, Darling)

GFH2_88.content:
1. Full acceptance, love forever!
Ocean of love, O how vast!
Deeply I taste, fully I drink
God’s great love with no ending!

2. Full acceptance, love forever!
All my doubts and fears are gone.
In Your love there’s sweetness only.
With You I can smile and leap.

3. Full acceptance, love forever!
I can rejoice all my life.
South wind, north wind, spring or winter,
We embrace, love each other.

4. Full acceptance, love forever!
How beautiful is Your heart!
Who can sep’rate me from Your love?
We’re united, heart to heart!

5. Full acceptance, love forever!
My heart is drawn after You.
Nothing can be compared to You,
Can I not desire You?

6. Full acceptance, love forever!
My soul is healed and compelled.
I lift my head, my heart’s set free!
With You gladly onward go.

7. Full acceptance, love forever!
Your yoke is easy and light.
You walk with me, hold my hand tight.
We leap over depths and heights.
GFH2_88.name: Full Acceptance, Love Forever
tags: Victoriously Overcome Satan. Spirit Set Free

SOL1_89.content:
In the universe, my heart finds no resting place-
Only You are my eternal rest.
In the universe, to whom can I give my love?
Only You're my secure resting place.
You are my warm dwelling place.
How blessed! We are united!
Fore'er we're in the river of love.

2. Apart from You whom do I have in heaven?
Only You worth my heart and worship.
Apart from You I have no desire on earth.
Only Your love captures my heart.
You are my warm dwelling place,
My eternal resting place,
You are my glorious Beloved.
SOL1_89.name: My Warm Dwelling Place

GFH1_89.content:
1. I hear the words of love,
I gaze upon the blood,
I see the mighty sacrifice,
And I have peace with God.

2. ‘Tis everlasting peace!
Sure as Jehova’s Name,
‘Tis stable as His steadfast throne,
For evermore the same.

3. The clouds may go and come,
And storms may sweep my sky;
This blood-sealed friendship changes not,
The Cross is ever nigh.

4. My love may sometimes below,
My joy may ebb and flow,
But peace with Him remains the same,
No change Jehovah knows.

5. I change, He changes not;
He will never leave me!
His love, not mine, the resting-place,
His truth, not mine, The tie.

6. The Cross still stands unchanged,
Though heaven is now His home;
The mighty stone is rolled away,
But yonder is His tomb!

7. And yonder is my peace,
The grave of all my woes!
I know the Son of God has come,
I know He died and rose.

8. I know He liveth now
At God’s right hand above;
I know the throne on which He sits,
I know His truth and love.
GFH1_89.name: I Hear The Words Of Love

HC1_89.content:
O' most beautiful among women,
What is your beloved more than other beloved,
What is your beloved more than other beloved,
O' fairest one, that you so charge us?

My beloved's dazzling and ruddy,
Outstanding among ten thousand.
His head is the finest gold, pure gold;
His locks are wavy, his locks are wavy,
Black as a raven.
His eyes as doves by the rivers,
With milk they're washed and fitly set.
A bed of spices, banks of scented herbs are his cheeks.
His lips are like lilies, dripping liquid myrrh.
His hands are like the rods of gold
And set with beryl.
His body is as carved ivory,
Inlad with sapphires.
His legs, pillars of marble, set on bases of fine gold.
His bearing as Lebanon, excellent as the cedars.
His mouth is full of sweetness, he's altogether lovely.
O' daughters of Jerusalem,
This is my beloved and this is my friend.

O' most beautiful among women,
Where about has your beloved gone?
Where has your beloved turned aside?
We will seek him together with you,
We will seek him together with you.
HC1_89.name: Song 5:9-6:1

SOL1_90.content:
I enjoyed Your love from my youth
And now what shall I fear?
Our friendship is long and deep.
You know how to treat Your friend.
When You kiss me
I forget the world.
Enjoy in Your bosom of love,
Embrace in river of love.

2. Day by day our friendship grows deep.
Now is even better.
Your love paved my past journey.
All suff'ring is sweet to me.
Your love is the same.
Now I know it more.
Your love and desire ever fresh.
Union with You is so sweet.
SOL1_90.name: Love Getting Deeper and Deeper

referenceSongs.name: Quanto mais Tempo Passa mais se Aprofunda Nosso Amor

GFH2_90.content:
1. Twenty-four hours’ presence with me!
What a sweet and precious blessing!
Who is so close to me but You?
You’re my present help in time of need.

*Chorus:
Presence day and night, how warm and sweet!
With You by my side I’m not alone.
Presence day and night, joined heart to heart!
Living with You, I taste heav’nly bliss.*

2. Twenty-four hours’ presence with me!
You are my support and comfort.
With You, I’ll not fear nor worry.
You are always glad to stay with me.

3. Twenty-four hours’ presence with me!
I count on You, pour out my heart.
You are my Beloved and best Friend,
Carry me ahead, and hold my hand.

4. Twenty-four hours’ presence with me!
Lord, Your love can endure all tests!
Your friendship is warm and precious.
All the world can’t be compared to it

5. Twenty-four hours’ presence with me!
You have filled my life with Your grace;
Having lived with You for these years,
Can I live in heaven without You?
GFH2_90.name: 24 Hours' Presence
tags: Draw Close to God and Experience Him

SOL2_90.content:
You are self-existing, self-sufficient,
Yet, I'm the bone of Your bones.
This is Your desire to closely join with me
In one spirit, heart to heart.

2. Lord, You created me for Yourself.
Gladly You became a Man.
You suffered much and were nailed on the cross,
For You want to gain my heart.

3. For me You came from heaven to the earth.
Your love journey moves my heart.
You passed through all pain and poured out Your life
To seal this love covenant.

4. For love You went to the mount of myrrh.
Lord, You saw the joy ahead.
You're willing to endure the bitter cross
To be in love with me.

5. For love You passed through all pain and suff'ring.
Lord, I have captured Your heart.
You rejoice for me, quiet me with Your love.
O' I affect You so much!

6. In Your love I have found my resting place.
Lord, I know You need me most;
I'm fore'er amazed I affect You so much!
I have captured Your heart.

7. For love You're deeply in need of me.
Without me You are in want.
Throughout the ages, across the universe,
Who could satisfy Your want?

8. You are thinking of me day and night.
Your love thoughts are more than stars.
Lord, Your fervent love draws my heart away.
Sweetly I live in Your love.
SOL2_90.name: I Affect You Most. You Need Me Most

referenceSongs.name: 我影響你至深！你多需要我！
我影響祢至深！祢多需要我!

GFH1_91.content:
1. Rise, my soul! Behold ‘tis Jesus,
Jesus fills thy wondering eyes;
See Him now in glory seated,
Where thy sins no more can rise.

2. There in righteousness transcendent,
Lo! He doth in heaven appear,
And the blood of His atonement
Is thy title to be there.

3. All thy sins were laid upon Him,
Jesus bore them on the tree;
God, who knew them, laid them on Him,
And, believing, thou art free.

4. God now brings thee to His dwelling,
Spreads for thee His feast divine,
Bids thee welcome, ever telling,
What a portion there is thine.

5. In that circle of God’s favour,
Circle of the Father’s love,
All is rest, and rest forever,
All is perfectness above.

6. Blessed, glorious word, “forever!”
Yea, “forever” is the word;
Nothing can the ransomed sever,
Nought divide them from the Lord.
GFH1_91.name: Rise, My Soul! Behold, ‘Tis Jesus

SOL1_92.content:
Before I realized it, You had prepared all,
Such as the heavens and the earth
And the fullness of them all,
Such as Your love journey and salvation.
Never knew I could ask for Your help,
Lord, You have come.
My daily bread; clothes for all seasons.
In the days I faced endless toils 
and ceaseless waves,
By the Sea of Tiberias,
Labouring all night, being hungry and weary,
When I was pondering under the fig tree
You have come.
When I fail and lose hope, surely You and Your help
Will come faster to me.
O' Lord, You're my Brother. You will take care of me,
You will defeat my enemies,
You will ease my troubles, lead me in this life journey.
O' Lord, I count on You.
SOL1_92.name: You have Prepared

GFH2_92.content:
1. O God, Your name how sweet and how fragrant!
In Your bosom, how peaceful and pleasant!
In love with You, at night I still can sing.
In love with You, I fear not long dark night.

2. With Your presence, alone yet not lonely.
With Your presence, I own heavenly bliss.
Walking with You, the dark vale seems so bright.
Nearness to You, my heart’s and Yours delight.

3. You in my life, what warmth and goodness give!
You in my life, make me fervently live.
Eternally, with You there’s endless spring.
Eternally, with You there’s love so sweet.
GFH2_92.name: In The River Of Love
tags: Draw Close to God and Experience Him

referenceSongs.name: A Vida no Rio de Amor

SOL2_92.content:
Never shaken, fore'er the same:
It's God who justifies me.
In Christ, I will never be condemned.
I am God's righteousness.

2. Never shaken, fore'er the same:
Abba loves me as the Lord;
The Lord loves me as Abba loves Him 
Eternal highest love.

3. Never shaken, fore'er the same:
In heav'n I sit with the Lord 
Enjoy Abba's welcome and delight.
I am Abba's dear child.
SOL2_92.name: Unshakable Foundation
tags: Salvation of the Cross, Spirit Set Free

referenceSongs.name: 永不動搖的根基：義、愛、悅納
永不動搖的根基：義、愛、悅納

HC1_92.content:
Who is she who looks forth as the morning,
Fair as the moon, clear as the sun,
Awesome as an army with banners?
Oh! He has changed me like that! Thank You, Lord!
HC1_92.name: Song 6:10 Wonderful Change

referenceSongs.name: 雅歌六10 榮耀的改變

GFH2_93.content:
1. My past journey You’ve cared continually.
My course ahead, Lord, You will surely lead.
In storms or waves, You are the First, the Last.
Oh my Beloved, You’ll uphold all my paths.

2. My God Your name is “I am who I am”,
The First, the Last, with all love and fullness.
You can supply my needs and my desires.
Now and ever, in You I’m satisfied
GFH2_93.name: The Lord Who Cares

SOL2_93.content:
My darling, my beautiful one,
Arise and come along with me.
The winter's past, the rain's over and gone,
Flowers appear, the time of singing has come.
The voice of turtle dove is heard.
The fig tree puts forth her green figs.
And the vines with the tender grapes.
My love, my fair one, arise and come away.

2. My Beloved's mine and I am His,
He feeds His flock among the lilies.
Turn, my Beloved, until the day breaks
And the shadows flee away, flee away.
Turn, my Beloved, be like a gazelle,
Like a young stag on the mountains of Bether.
Turn, my Beloved, be like a gazelle,
Like a young stag on the mountains of Bether.
SOL2_93.name: The Longing of Love

GFH1_93.content:
1. The veil is rent: Lo! Jesus stands
Before the throne of grace;
And clouds of incense from His hands
Fill all that glorious place.

2. His precious blood is sprinkled there,
Before and on the throne;
And His own wounds in heav’n declare
That atonement is done.

3. “‘Tis finished!” on the cross He said,
In agonies and blood;
‘Tis finished! Now He lives to plead
Before the face of God.

4. ‘Tis finished! Here our souls can rest,
His work can never fail;
By Him, our Sacrifice and Priest,
We enter through the veil.

5. Within the holiest of all,
Cleansed by His precious blood,
Before His throne we gladly fall,
And worship Him, our God.

6. Boldly our heart and voice we raise,
His name, His blood, our plea;
Assured our prayers and songs of praise
Ascend, by Him, to Thee.
GFH1_93.name: The Veil Is Rent

HC1_93.content:
1. I’m my beloved’s, his desire’s for me.
Come, my beloved! Come, my beloved!
Let’s go out to the field; in the villages
Let us spend the night.
Early let us go
To the vineyard and see
Whether the vine has bud'd and bloomed,
The pomegranates have blossomed.

2. There I will give my love to you.
The mandrakes give off a fragrance.
At our gates, at our gates are all pleasant fruits,
All manner new and old.
My beloved, my beloved,
O' you whom my soul loves,
All these I have laid up for you,
I have laid up for you.
O' my beloved, all of these
I have laid up for you
HC1_93.name: Song 7:10-13

SOL1_94.content:
Do you know where I can find true smiles?
Where does true love hide?
Come and go, we live and die,
Wand'ring for a thousand miles.
Who is willing to share with a true heart
My laughter and tears?
Who can lead me to the right path,
That I may not spoil my years?

*Chorus:
Only Jesus! Only Jesus!
He is the light of man.
He lights up my life journey,
Gives me warmth and glorious hope.
He walks with me, He dries my tears,
Gives me abundant life;
Brilliant forever!
Brilliant forever!*
SOL1_94.name: Only Jesus

GFH2_94.content:
My Elder Brother, My dear Friend is the Lord,
Our friendship endures, our affection grows deep;
He paved my past journey with His grace and His love,
For my days ahead, I walked by my Beloved.
Though my future is yet to be known,
The Lord has promised to be with me always;
He has promised to be my Shepherd,
To guide me each step, until I see His face.
The path of the just is as the shining light,
That shines more and more till the perfect day.
GFH2_94.name: The Deep Affection

GFH2_95.content:
1. All the journey when I retrace,
thankful tears oft fill my eyes;
Once was lonely, vile and worthless,
now I shine forth as the light.
Ne’ er forget the Lord’s appearing,
and His love as honey sweet,
Drawing me from worldly follies,
all my heart belongs to Him.
Drawing me from worldly follies,
all my heart belongs to Him.

2. All my life in trials abounding,
suffer wounds so long and deep.
Yet His love spurs and comforts me;
by His words my wounds are healed.
With His presence I am sustained,
my soul wings to higher place!
Strength upon strength as I walk on,
smile across all storms and waves!
Strength upon strength as I walk on,
smile across all storms and waves!

3. O dear Lord, can I not love You?
May my life be love response!
Pour out all my heart before You,
share my daily life with You.
Think of You, call upon Your name,
closely follow all the way.
Talk and smile to You every hour,
deeper friendship grows each day.
Talk and smile to You every hour,
deeper friendship grows each day.
GFH2_95.name: All The Way He's With Me

SOL2_95.content:
May my love be fervent to You.
May I pour out my love to You.
I will lift up my hands.
I will sing and I will dance.
I'll joyfully proclaim: He is risen!
No more hiding, no more fear,
I don't mind how people feel.
Leap with joy, I feel so free.
Over and over I'll say it again:
I love You! I love You!
I will love You with my all, not be shy.
And with all my strength,
I'll tell everyone
You're wonderful. You're living with me.
I taste Your love; You're pleased with me 
What a happy life of love with my dear Lord!
SOL2_95.name: I Will Love You, Not be Shy

referenceSongs.name: Eu te Amarei sem ser Tímido

GFH1_95.content:
1. No blood no altar now;
The sacrifice is o’er!
No flame, no smoke ascends on high,
The lamb is slain no more,
But richer blood has flow’d from nobler veins,
To purge the soul from guilt,
And cleanse the reddest stains.

2. We thank Thee for the blood,
The blood of Christ, Thy Son:
The blood by which our peace is made,
Our victory is won:
Great victory o’er hell, and sin, and woe,
That needs no second fight, 
and leaves no second foe.

3. We thank Thee for the grace,
Descending from above,
That overflows our widest guilt,
Th’ eternal Father’s love,
Love of the Father’s everlasting Son,
Love of the Spirit, Jehovah, Three in One.

4. We thank Thee for the hope,
So glad, and sure, and clear;
It holds the drooping spirit up
Till the long dawn appear;
Fair hope! With what a sunshine does it cheer
Our roughest path on earth, 
our dreariest desert here.

5. We thank Thee for the crown
Of glory and of life;
‘Tis no poor with’ring wreath of earth,
Man’s prize in mortal strife;
‘Tis incorruptible as is the throne,
The kingdom of our God and His incarnate Son.
GFH1_95.name: No Blood, No Altar Now

HC1_95.content:
Set me as a seal upon your heart
And as a seal upon your arm,
For jealousy is fierce as the grave,
And love is strong as death.
Its flashes are the flashes of fire,
The very flame of Jehovah.
Many waters cannot, cannot quench love,
Neither can floods drown it.
If a man were to give all his wealth for love,
It would be utterly despised.
HC1_95.name: Song 8:6-7

SOL1_96.content:
My Lord is risen! He has conquered all.
He's overcome pain and death,
Overcome the world, defeated Satan;
Destroyed the power of sin.
Ha! Ha! Ha! He's risen.
He lives forevermore.
Ha! Ha! Ha! My Lord
Has gained vict'ry forever!

2. Who shall sep'rate us from the love of Christ?
Shall tribulation, distress,
Or persecution? Or nakedness,
Or famine, peril or sword?
Neither death, nor life, angels, principalities,
Can ever sep'rate us from the love of God?

3. Whether gain or loss, whether right or wrong,
Whether abound or in want,
Whether height or depth, in strength or weakness,
Whatever I encounter,
I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
I firmly believe His grace sufficient for me!

4. O' brothers, arise!
O' sisters, be strong!
Never mind all the scars.
Forget things behind and march forward.
Triumph o'er trials of life.
"He who overcomes, I will make him a pillar
In My God's temple, enthrone with Me forever!"
SOL1_96.name: The Faith of a Conqueror
tags: Salvation of the Cross, Spirit Set Free

GFH2_96.content:
My darling, My bride, My dove,
You are altogether beautiful.
Your form is lovely and your voice is sweet.
My darling, there’s no blemish in you.
You have ravished My heart with a glance of your eyes,
And your eyes have overcome Me.
You are like a lily growing mid the thorns.
O the fairest one among all,
You are the dearest of My heart.

2. My Beloved and my precious Lord,
Your love moves my heart so deeply.
It’s unique, greater than the sky and the sea.
All things cannot be compared to it.
May You set me as a seal on Your heart
Set me as a seal on Your arm.
My Beloved, may You return and take me up
To the home above You’ve prepared.
Ever to dwell in love with You.
My Beloved, may You come soon!
GFH2_96.name: The Lord and I In Love Forever

referenceSongs.name: Amado e Amada, Apaixonados para Sempre

SOL2_97.content:
"My dear Lord, You'll give me the best!"
I said it not when my days 
were easy and light;
I said it not at the time when I gained
What I had ever dreamed of.
When I'm in loss, when I'm in lack,
When I suffer, when I am troubled,
I can't understand why; under pressure,
I am filled with worries.
Yet I must get over all feelings.
I trust Your eternal love 
Surely You will give me the best.
I know You will never miss a single detail 
All my hair You've numbered with care.

"My dear Lord, You'll give me the best!"
I said it not 
when my days were easy and light.
I said it not at the time when I gained
What I had ever dreamed of.
When I'm in loss, when I'm in lack,
When I suffer, when I am troubled,
I can't understand why; under pressure,
I am filled with worries.
Yet I must get over all feelings.
You make all things work for me,
Though now I may not understand.
It never stops me running to Your bosom.
Your love for me is proven.
I praise and give thanks to You.
I lift my hand and shout for joy.
There is nothing better You can give me,
For I've gained all Your heart, Your love
From everlasting to everlasting.
SOL2_97.name: You Will Surely Give Me the Best

referenceSongs.name: Você com Certeza me dará o Melhor

GFH1_97.content:
1. Sovereign grace! o’er sin abounding,
Ransomed souls, the tidings swell;
‘Tis a deep that knows, no sounding;
Who its breadth or length can tell?
On its glories
Let my soul for ever dwell.

2. What from Christ the soul can sever,
Bound by everlasting bands?
Once in Him, in Him forever,
Thus the eternal covenant stands;
None shall pluck thee
From the Lord’s mighty hands.

3. Heirs of God, joint-heirs with Jesus
Long ere time its race began;
To His Name eternal praises,
O what wonders love hath done!
One with Jesus;
By eternal union one.

4. On such love, my soul, still ponder,
Love so great, so rich, so free!
Say, while lost in holy wonder,
Why, O Lord, such love to me?
Hallelujah!
Grace shall reign eternally.
GFH1_97.name: The Riches Of His Grace

SOL1_98.content:
Bless the Lord, O my soul, bless the Lord!
And all that's within me, bless His holy name.
Bless the Lord, O my soul, bless the Lord.
And forget none of His benefits.
He pardons all your transgressions
And heals all your diseases.
He redeems your life from death,
And crowns you with love and mercies.
He satisfies you with good things,
So that your youth is renewed like the eagle's

2. The Lord is merciful and gracious,
Slow to anger, abounding in mercy.
He won't always strive, nor be angry fore'er
He hasn't dealt with us due to our sins.
As the heavens are high above,
As the heavens are high above,
So great is His lovingkindness
To those who, those who fear Him.
As far as the east's from the west,
So far has He removed our transgressions from us.

As a father pities his children,
So the Lord pities those who fear Him.
His loving-kindness on those who fear Him.
Is from everlasting to everlasting.
SOL1_98.name: Psalm 103

GFH2_98.content:
1. Oh My darling, you are so beautiful!
There is no blemish in you!
May you come along with Me, My bride,
Come with Me from Lebanon.
May you come with Me from Lebanon;
From the dens of lions, and mountains of leopards;
Journey down from the peak. My sister, My bride,
you’ve made My heart beat fast
With a glance of your eyes;
A strand of your necklace steals My heart.

2. Oh My darling, My sister, My bride,
How beautiful is your love!
How much better is your love than wine;
And the fragrance of your oils
Is better than all kinds of spices.
My sister, My bride, you are a garden locked,
A rock garden locked, a spring sealed up.
You are a garden spring, a well of fresh water,
And streams flowing from Lebanon.

3. Awake, north wind, and come, wind of the south,
Blow into my garden!
Make my garden breathe out fragrance;
May my Beloved come and eat
All kinds of choice fruits in His garden.
GFH2_98.name: Come Along With Me, Darling

GFH1_99.content:
1. No condemnation! precious word!
Consider it, my soul!
Thy sins were all on Jesus laid,
His stripes have made thee whole

2. In heav’n the blood forever speaks
In God’s omniscient ear;
The saints, as jewels on his heart,
Jesus doth ever bear.

3. No condemnation! O my soul,
‘Tis God that speaks the word,
Perfect in comeliness art thou
In Christ, Thy glorious Lord.

4. Teach us, O God, to fix our eyes
On Christ, the spotless Lamb;
So shall we love Thy gracious will,
And glorify Thy Name.
GFH1_99.name: No Condemnation

SOL1_100.content:
One day, there's no more suffering and enemies;
One day, there's no more tears and dark valley;
One day, there's no more darkness and clouded day,
No more bleak cold winter.
There's only cloudless morning,
Eternal beautiful spring.
One day, no more sorrow, heartbreak and death,
There's only sweetness eternally.

Everywhere's full of life and warmth,
Flooding with love, joy and song.
One day I shall see You face to face;
Forever I live in the depth of Your heart,
Drinking, enjoying Your endless love.
Enjoy with You love's eternity!
Glory upon glory to all eternity!
SOL1_100.name: A Day of Glory and Sweetness

GFH2_100.content:
Grow old along with me,
The best is yet to be!
The last of life, For which the first was made.
Our times are in His hand
Who saith, “A whole I planned”;
Youth shows but half; trust God;
see all, nor be afraid!
Grow old along with me,
The best is yet to be!
The last of life, for which the first was made.
Our times are in His hand
Who saith, “A whole I planned”;
Youth shows but half; trust God;
See all, nor be afraid!
Youth shows but half; trust God;
see all, nor be afraid!
Your favour is for life;
Lord, I want to see it all!
The light that shines more and more
Unto the perfect day.
Unto the perfect day.
GFH2_100.name: Growing Young Along With Me

referenceSongs.name: 欣賞全程（與我越過年青）
欣賞全程（與我越過越年青）

SOL2_100.content:
This is the day that the Lord has made.
We will rejoice, be glad in it.
This is the day that the Lord has made.
We will rejoice, be glad in it.

2. His mercy and lovingkindness
Are new and fresh every morning.
Love and mercy will follow me today,
And my Beloved will be with me.

3. He holds authority for me.
He causes all things work for me.
No good thing will He withhold from me.
I have a good inheritance.

4. Sufficient for the day - its own trouble.
Do not worry for tomorrow.
Enjoy every day, every stage, every step.
Enjoy, admire your whole journey.
SOL2_100.name: This is the Day That the Lord Has Made

referenceSongs.name: 這是耶和華所定的日子
這是耶和華所定的日子
Este é o dia que fez o Senhor

GFH1_100.content:
1. A mind at perfect peace with God;
Oh, what a word is this!
A sinner reconciled through blood;
This, this indeed is peace!

2. Before you were dead in sins,
How very far from God;
Yet now by grace brought nigh to Him,
Through faith in Jesus’ blood.

3. So nigh, so very nigh to God,
I cannot nearer be;
For in the person of His Son,
I am as near as He.

4. So dear, so very dear to God,
More dear I cannot be;
The love wherewith He loves the Son,
Such is His love to me.

5. Why should I ever anxious be,
Since such a God is mine?
He watches o’er me night and day,
And tells me “You are Mine.”
GFH1_100.name: A Mind At Perfect Peace

SOL2_101.content:
Father, 'twas Your love that knew us,
Earth's foundation long before;
That same love to Jesus drew us,
By its sweet constraining pow'r
And will keep us, and will keep us,
Safely now, and evermore.
Safely now, and evermore.

2. Now that changeless love enfolds us,
All its wealth on us bestows,
While its pow'r unchanging holds us
In a holy calm repose.
O' dear Father, O' dear Father
Unto You our worship flows,
Unto You our worship flows.

 3. 'Tis the Father's tender mercy
That doth cause me to rejoice;
And myself am given wholly
As a son thro' God's own choice.
God so loves us! God so loves us!
That He gave us His dear Son!
That He gave us His dear Son!

4. God of love, our souls adore You!
We would still Your grace proclaim,
Till we cast our crowns before You,
And in glory praise Your name;
Praise and worship, praise and worship,
Be to God and to the Lamb!
Be to God and to the Lamb!
SOL2_101.name: Father, ‘Twas Your Love That Knew Us

SOL1_102.content:
New Jerusalem! This most glorious vision
Captures my heart, is my dream, drive, and joy!
O sweetest union! The Lord is my Beloved!
This love fully satisfies my heart.
I'm God's dearest, born of Him; He is my dearest Abba;
This highest love satisfies my heart.

2. New Jerusalem is God's tabernacle
And our fairest eternal sweet home!
Its wall is jasper, with precious stones as its base,
The gates are pearls, the street is pure gold;
There the river of life flows, pure and clear as crystal,
The banks blooming with the trees of life.

3. New Jerusalem is God's tabernacle!
'Tis His eternal, sweet resting place,
And our fairest, warmest heavenly home!
God, man in love, fully satisfied!
Enthralled in oneness with God and with one another,
Love and joy forever overflow!

4. New Jerusalem is the bride of the Lamb,
His love's masterpiece shines forth forever.
The union of love between Christ and the church
Is most moving! All will call us blessed!
Sit with the Lord on the throne, glory fore'er increasing,
O' most colorful eternity!

5. My Abba wants me to be His most glorious child,
To inherit all with His beloved Son!
I'm His dearest child, His dream, joy and glory!
His infinite love is my sweet rest.
Father and son's mutual love satisfies His heart and mine,
(The love of Father and son)
Fore'er we'll wonder at His love plan!
SOL1_102.name: The Glorious Vision of New Jerusalem

referenceSongs.name: A Gloriosa Visão da Nova Jerusalém

GFH2_102.content:
1. All that I encounter throughout my life
Are united to You and Your will;
You and I belong to each other,
Facing every thing together.
For Your will though I suffer hardship,
Persecutions, slanders and sneers,
Yet my heart can rejoice in all these,
For Your grace abounds through my journey.
Your presence, the warmth in God’s family
Moves me deeply and gives me joy and rest;
Your fervent love compels my heart,
Floods and flames to pass I’m steadfast!

2. We’ve fought many fierce battles, yet I find
Your wondrous salvation every time;
By You, I lift my head and boast,
By faith press on toward the goal!
Lord, You do appreciate my love for You,
On this suff’ring yet glorious journey;
Then one day, You’ll come to receive me
Into Your endless joy and glory!
Your presence, the warmth in God’s family
Moves me deeply and gives me joy and rest;
Your fervent love compels my heart,
Put on the armour, I march on!

May all that I decide throughout my life,
Be united to You and Your will;
You and I deeply love each other,
Walking this life journey together.
GFH2_102.name: United To The Lord

GFH1_102.content:
1. In tenderness He sought me,
Weary and sick with sin,
And on His shoulders brought me
Back to His fold again;
While angels in His presence sang
Until the courts of heaven rang.

*Refrain:
Oh, the love that sought me!
Oh, the blood that bought me!
Oh, the grace that brought me to the fold!
Wondrous grace that brought me to Himself!*

2. He found me bruised and dying,
And poured in oil and wine;
“I’ve found you, you are Mine.”
I never heard a sweeter voice,
It made my aching heart rejoice.

*Refrain:
Oh, the love that sought me!
Oh, the blood that bought me!
Oh, the grace that brought me to the fold!
Wondrous grace that brought me to Himself!*

3. He pointed to the nail-prints,
For me His blood was shed;
A mocking crown so thorny,
Was placed upon His head;
I wondered what He saw in me,
To suffer such deep agony.

*Refrain:
Oh, the love that sought me!
Oh, the blood that bought me!
Oh, the grace that brought me to the fold!
Wondrous grace that brought me to Himself!*

4. I’m sitting in His presence,
The sunshine of His face,
While with adoring wonder
His blessings I retrace,
It seems as if eternal days
Are far too short to sound His praise.

*Refrain:
Oh, the love that sought me!
Oh, the blood that bought me!
Oh, the grace that brought me to the fold!
Wondrous grace that brought me to Himself!*

5. So while the hours are passing,
All now is perfect rest;
I’m waiting for the morning,
The brightest and the best,
When He will call us to His side,
To be with Him, His spotless Bride.

*Refrain:
Oh, the love that sought me!
Oh, the blood that bought me!
Oh, the grace that brought me to the fold!
Wondrous grace that brought me to Himself!*
GFH1_102.name: In Tenderness He Sought Me

SOL2_103.content:
Abba, You're more real than all. You surpass all things.
You're sitting on the throne and surrounding me.
Abba You're closest to me. You dwell in my heart.
I treasure day and night You attend to me.
From eternity past You needed me most.
You earnestly desire me to be Your dearest child,
Joyfully share with me this deepest affection!
Your ever active love and thoughts gain my heart.
SOL2_103.name: Gaze of Love, Ever-Active Thoughts

referenceSongs.name: 奇愛的專注，恆動的思念
奇愛的專注，恆動的思念

SOL1_104.content:
Abba, You are more real than all things.
You are ever overflowing.
You and I are fore'er united.
I am Yours. You are mine.
Because of Your love,
Abba, You need me most.
Now and fore'er You hold my hand,
Enjoy the deepest love.
SOL1_104.name: My True Abba

GFH2_104.content:
I can face the world with Jesus.
I can face today and tomorrow
With the risen Lord.
Through the storms, thro’ life’s billows,
Thro’ the night, long, dark valley,
Across the sea, o’er the mountains,
He leads me to glory.
He’ll walk with me thro’ all life’s journey
Till I see His face.
GFH2_104.name: I Can Face All With Jesus

SOL2_104.content:
May I oft' meditate
You've thought of me since eternity.
Abba, You think of me; You long for me.
O' I have captured Your heart.

2. May I always realize
Your desire for me is long and deep.
Day and night I lean on Your bosom.
I enjoy this fatherly love.

3. May I enter Your love,
Talk with You face to face more and more.
This is sweet moment of father and son.
We're content in embrace of love.
SOL2_104.name: The Father’s Longing

referenceSongs.name: O desejo e pensamento do Pai desde a eternidade

GFH1_104.content:
1. And can it be that I should gain
An interest in the Saviour’s blood?
Died He for me, who caused His pain?
For me, who Him to death pursued?
Amazing love! How can it be
That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?

*Refrain:
Amazing love! How can it be
That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?*

2. He left His Father’s throne above –
So free, so infinite His grace –
Who can sound the depths of His love –
He bled for our sinful race;
‘Tis mercy all, immense and free;
For, O my God! It found out me.

*Refrain:
Amazing love! How can it be
That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?*

3. Long my imprisoned spirit lay
Fast bound in sin and hopeless night;
Thine eye diffused a quick’ning ray,
I woke, the dungeon flamed with light;
My chains fell off, my heart was free;
I rose, went forth, and followed Thee.

*Refrain:
Amazing love! How can it be
That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?*

4. No condemnation now I dread;
Jesus, and all in Him, is mine!
Alive in Him, my living Head,
And clothed in righteousness divine,
Bold I approach th’ eternal throne,
And claim the crown, thro’ Christ my own.

*Refrain:
Amazing love! How can it be
That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?*
GFH1_104.name: And Can It Be That I Should Gain

SOL1_105.content:
O' 'tis God's greatest miracle!
Almighty miracle!
I have become the true child of God;
Born of Him, He's my Abba!
Who can describe my bliss!

2. I can enjoy the Father's love
Toward His beloved Son,
And the Father's deepest affection!
Let me sing and dance with joy,
Have the heart of a child.

3. My heart is free, delight'd and sweet -
I can cry out, "Abba!"
In His bosom I'm delight'd and warm.
Joyfully I work with Him,
To build Abba's household.
(One day I'll see His face.)
SOL1_105.name: Wonderful Miracle

GFH2_105.content:
1. Lord, when the church has come up to the Red Sea,
Way blocked ahead, the foes are getting near.
Deep in my heart, I still have the surpassing peace,
Knowing Your wonderful salvation’s near!
Lord, I give thanks for You are watching from above,
Ever holding authority for the church.
I can rejoice, seeing You perform miracles!
The evidence of Your love to us You show.

2. Lord, I treasure the years of copious journey,
Walking with You through floods, flames and valleys.
Your words of grace have nourished, enlivened my soul,
Make my faith strong and boastful to the end.
Your loving hand leads me to go through each distress.
My tears and laughters in Your sight are precious.
Lord, I give thanks for Your favour and tenderness,
Your presence with me is my sweetest sweetness.

3. When I think of the task ahead yet to be done,
Lord, You know well the path I have to tread.
Thousands of souls, hopeless and lost, are waiting,
May Your great love make me firmly go forth.
Lord, hold my hand tight as I run my course ahead,
In lands of joy, o’er mountains and swift rivers.
Bright days or dark, our hearts are drawn closely as one,
Rejoice till the day I see You face to face.

4. Lord, I am Yours, and You desire and long for me.
O my Beloved, let’s go out to the field.
Early let’s rise, go out to the vineyard and see
If the vine’s budd’d, its blossoms are open.
There I will give, there I will give my love to You.
See, at our gates are pleasant fruits, new and old.
O my Beloved, I have laid up all these for You.
Lord, may Your heart be satisfied in this household.
*(Refrain)*
O Lord, do come, take me to be with You always.
Hand in hand we shall sing and dance forevermore.
GFH2_105.name: Song Of The Red Sea

SOL2_105.content:
Lord Jesus are we one with Thee?
O' height, O' depth of love!
Once slain for us upon the tree,
We're one with Thee above.

2. Our sins, our guilt, in love divine,
All! All were borne by Thee;
The gall, the curse, the wrath were Thine,
To set Thy members free.

3. Ascended now in glory bright,
Still one with us Thou art;
Nor life, nor death, nor depth, nor height
Thy saints and Thee can part!

 4. O teach us, Lord, to know and own
This wondrous mystery,
That Thou with us art truly one,
And we are one with Thee.

5. Soon, soon shall come that glorious day,
When, seated on Thy throne,
Thou shalt to wond'ring worlds display
That Thou with us art one.
SOL2_105.name: Joined to the Lord

SOL1_106.content:
The Creator of the universe,
The most high God who rules all things,
Who is and who was and who is to come,
Is my dearest Abba.
I am the jewel of His heart,
Created in His own image.
I am born of Him, I am born of Him;
I am His dearest child.
SOL1_106.name: My Wonderful Abba

GFH1_106.content:
1. Blessed assurance – Jesus is mine!
Oh, what a foretaste of glory divine!
Heir of salvation, purchase of God!
Born of His Spirit, washed in His blood.

*Refrain:
This is my story, this is my song,
Praising my Saviour all the day long.
This is my story, this is my song,
Praising my Saviour all the day long.*

2. Perfect submission – delight and rest,
I in my Saviour am happy and blest;
Watching and waiting, looking above,
Filled with His goodness, lost in His love.

*Refrain:
This is my story, this is my song,
Praising my Saviour all the day long.
This is my story, this is my song,
Praising my Saviour all the day long.*
GFH1_106.name: Blessed Assurance

SOL1_107.content:
Created in God's image,
I was born of His Spirit;
His seed abides in my heart.
He's my Abba forever!
(I am His child, His delight!)

2. You love to be on my neck!
Kissing me, You feel so sweet!
You need me on Your bosom;
Long to embrace forever.
SOL1_107.name: You Love to be on My Neck

SOL2_107.content:
My dear Lord, You're above all, more real than all things.
In heav'n You live for me and You surround me;
You even live in my heart, You're closest to me.
I treasure day and night You're gazing on me.
I'm amazed from long ago I've been Your love dream.
In the universe, You want me to be Your dearest bride!
With You, I live a life of sweetness and beauty,
Your love thoughts towards me are ever active.
SOL2_107.name: The Lord’s Love Dream; His Gaze of Love

GFH1_107.content:
1. He leadeth me! Oh, blessed thought!
Oh, words with heav’nly comfort fraught!
Whate’er I do, where’er I be,
Still ‘tis God’s hand that leadeth me.

*Refrain:
He leadeth me! He leadeth me!
By His own hand He leadeth me!
His faithful follow’r I would be,
For by His hand He leadeth me!*

2. Sometimes ‘mid scenes of deepest gloom,
Sometimes where Eden’s bowers bloom,
By waters calm, o’er troubled sea,
Still ‘tis His hand that leadeth me.

*Refrain:
He leadeth me! He leadeth me!
By His own hand He leadeth me!
His faithful follow’r I would be,
For by His hand He leadeth me!*

3. Lord, I would clasp Your hand in mine,
Nor ever murmur or repine;
Content, whatever lot I see,
Since it is You that leadest me.

*Refrain:
He leadeth me! He leadeth me!
By His own hand He leadeth me!
His faithful follow’r I would be,
For by His hand He leadeth me!*

4. And when my task on earth is done,
When, by Your grace, the vict’ry’s won,
E’en death’s shadow I will not flee,
Since You in triumph leadest me.

*Refrain:
He leadeth me! He leadeth me!
By His own hand He leadeth me!
His faithful follow’r I would be,
For by His hand He leadeth me!*
GFH1_107.name: He Leadeth Me

SOL1_108.content:
I treasure Your beautiful heart, Abba.
I am more than Your best creation;
I'm born of You! Dearest, closest to You.
I enjoy with the Lord
Deepest love, highest affection of Yours.

2. Now I can inherit all with the Lord.
He is not ashamed to call me brethren,
Because I was born of You, born of You.
I am dearest to You.
My Abba, Your work is so wonderful.
(My Abba, Your work satisfies my heart.)

3. My Abba, I treasure Your wondrous work.
Your seed forever abides in me.
So I can bear pleasant fruit for You -
Infinitely glorious!
Shining ever brighter till perfect day.

4. I treasure Your beautiful heart, Abba -
Eternal love thoughts, deepest affection,
Full attention, love from the beginning.
Your thoughts exceeding all stars,
Gaze of love and Your delight towards me.

5. Every day joyfully I go to You,
Run to Your open arms, bosom of love.
Sweetly I taste this deepest affection,
Most beautiful, highest love.
Leaping with joy, I embrace You.
SOL1_108.name: Born to be Dearest

referenceSongs.name: Nascido para ser o mais querido

GFH2_108.content:
1. My Lord came down to earth for me,
Was in a manger born,
Unique, yet He was rejected,
Repelled and misunderstood.
Lonely He walked on, Fully followed God.
No place even to lay His head,
He’s opposed, defamed and scorned.

2. What a brilliant light my Lord shone
In His short earthly span.
The Father’s glory to man showed,
He is fairer than all men.
Acquainted with grief, Tempted in all things.
He can comfort and understand.
He wipes away all my tears.

3. Oh how precious my Lord chose me
For this task of glory!
His gift and calling not revoked,
He will keep me to the end.
Thru’ the dark valley, My heart shall not fear.
His faithfulness reaches to the skies.
And He keeps truth forever.

4. He has opened His heart to me -
He has revealed His will.
Though the foes gather to storm me,
My warm dwelling place is He.
I have a sure goal; For life I’ll press on.
Faithful to the heav’nly vision,
Follow gladly, no retreat!

5. What a joy to know my Lord’s will,
And to stay close to Him.
The way may be full of hardship,
Yet I live abundantly!
Is there the ‘Red Sea’, mud land or high hills?
He is the First, He is the Last;
He will accomplish His will.

6. Deepest pain He suffered for me,
Can I be with no wounds?
Follow to the end steadfastly,
Look down on all trials and sneers.
Suff’rings brief and light, Gladly bear for Him.
Let these make up sweet memories,
And eternal glory.

7. South wind, north wind; spring or winter;
I’ll live with my Lord still.
World’s bitterness, joy in God’s house -
All are love designs of His.
Sufferings will pass, Glory yet will last!
He makes all things work together,
Moulds me into His likeness.
GFH2_108.name: Walk With The Lord The Path Of Suffering And Glory

referenceSongs.name: Andar juntos no caminho do sofrimento e glória

SOL2_108.content:
From eternity past to eternity
You desire me.
This beautiful love plan came from 
Your dream of love.
You want to live with me in love and joy.

2. Lord, You became a Man.
You died and shed Your blood
To betroth me.
Deeply we're united, one spirit, 
heart to heart.
Forever we walk on this path of love.

3. To have You I'm so blessed.
Share with You joy and tears 
All are precious.
Work in same heart with You, 
I'll accomplish Your will.
I wait for You to take me to the clouds.
SOL2_108.name: Walk in Love with the Lord

SOL2_109.content:
You are the conclusion of my dreams!
I love You! I pursue You!
In You, I have found all my dreams come true.
There's no better story.
No other endings can be as perfect.
From the beautiful heart of Yours
Comes this exquisite, perfect plan,
Your love, affection
Make up all of my days.
It makes all so fair; it makes all so sweet.
There may be tears, but joy comes at last.
What a wonderful life!
Because of You, because of Your will
I treasure my every day.
SOL2_109.name: You are the Conclusion of My Dreams

referenceSongs.name: És a conclusão dos meus sonhos

GFH1_109.content:
1. All the way my Saviour leads me;
What have I to ask beside?
Can I doubt His tender mercy,
Who thro’ life has been my guide?
Heav’nly peace, divinest comfort,
Hereby faith in Him to dwell;
For I know, whate’er befall me,
Jesus doeth all things well.
For I know, whate’er befall me,
Jesus doeth all things well.

2. All the way my Saviour leads me,
Cheers each winding path I tread,
Gives me grace for every trial,
Feeds me with the living bread;
Though my weary steps may falter,
And my soul athirst may be,
Gushing from the Rock before me,
Lo, a spring of joy I see!
Gushing from the Rock before me,
Lo, a spring of joy I see!

3. All the way my Saviour leads me;
Oh, the fullness of His love!
Perfect rest to me is promised
In my Father’s house above.
When my spirit clothed immortal,
Wings its flight to realms of day,
This my song through endless ages –
Jesus led me all the way!
This my song through endless ages –
Jesus led me all the way!
GFH1_109.name: All The Way My Saviour Leads Me

SOL1_110.content:
It's most precious I am born of You.
Your seed abides in me.
Your life and my life forever united!
I am Your bosom dear child.

2. Father, You have numbered my hair.
Your love thoughts are more than stars.
Over me, You shout for joy and dance!
O' what a father I have.

3. Father, You have committed Yourself,
Forever I affect You!
Your calling is so glorious.
Your love plan is beautiful.

4. You are the only normal Abba.
Nothing can compare Your love.
Father-son affection satisfies our hearts!
(Abba and me)
For this affection is true!!
SOL1_110.name: This Deepest Affection is True!!

GFH2_111.content:
My Lord sought me, My Lord bought me
To be His beloved,
I’m on His heart, I’m on His arm,
So warm and protected.
I’m a jewel in His heart,
Ever to Him united,
Shining before the Father,
I am His delight.
GFH2_111.name: The Jewel In His Heart

SOL2_111.content:
I treasure Your calling!
You never forget Your promise.
Walk with me throughout my journey.
You are my closest friend.
My past journey was full of Your grace.
You have carried me through
The long dark valley.
No matter in north wind
Or in the south wind,
You've always walked with me,
Never left me.
In my future journey
I want to walk with You.
Lord, You will keep my heart
Until the end.
SOL2_111.name: Walk with Me

GFH1_111.content:
1. ‘Tis so sweet to trust in Jesus,
Just to take Him at His word;
Just to rest upon His promise;
Just to know, “Thus saith the Lord.”

*Refrain:
Jesus, Jesus, how I trust Him!
How I’ve proved Him o’er and o’er!
Jesus, Jesus, precious Jesus!
O for grace to trust Him more!*

2. I’m so glad I learned to trust Thee,
Precious Jesus, Savior, Friend;
And I know that Thou art with me,
Wilt be with me to the end.

*Refrain:
Jesus, Jesus, how I trust Him!
How I’ve proved Him o’er and o’er!
Jesus, Jesus, precious Jesus!
O for grace to trust Him more!*
GFH1_111.name: ‘Tis So Sweet To Trust In Jesus

SOL1_112.content:
Abba, since eternity You have thought of me.
Your great love was fully revealed on the cross.
You indeed suffered the deepest pain for me.
On the cross, You forsook Your begotten Son.
You opened a way: I can go to Your bosom.
You love to be on my neck.
You are overjoyed for me.
Abba, I treasure so much that You need me most,
And Your passion to me, Your fatherly love.
SOL1_112.name: The Father’s Passionate Love

GFH2_112.content:
1. Christ’s fervent love does melt my heart,
Make me amazed, adore!
The thought of it thrills all my soul,
Compels me to the end.

2. Such flaming love is my drive -
I live my live for you!
Rightly I am beside myself
And strive to save the world.

*A self-denying life-
For the flaming love of Christ!*
GFH2_112.name: The Flaming Love

GFH1_112.content:
1. Once it was the blessing, 
Now it is the Lord;
Once it was the feeling, 
Now it is His word;
Once His gifts I wanted, 
Now the Giver own;
Once I sought for healing, 
Now Himself alone.

*Refrain:
All in all forever, Jesus will I sing,
Ev’rything in Jesus, And Jesus ev’rything.*

2. Once ‘twas painful trying,
Now ‘tis perfect trust,
Once a half salvation,
Now the uttermost;
Once ‘twas ceaseless holding,
Now He holds me fast;
Once ‘twas constant drifting,
Now my anchor’s cast.

*Refrain:
All in all forever, Jesus will I sing,
Ev’rything in Jesus, And Jesus ev’rything.*

3. Once ‘twas busy planning,
Now ‘tis trustful prayer;
Once ‘twas anxious caring,
Now He has the care;
Once ‘twas what I wanted,
Now what Jesus says;
Once ‘twas constant asking,
Now ‘tis ceaseless praise.

*Refrain:
All in all forever, Jesus will I sing,
Ev’rything in Jesus, And Jesus ev’rything.*

4. One it was my working,
His it hence shall be;
Once I tried to use Him,
Now He uses me;
Once the pow’r I wanted,
Now the mighty one;
Once for self I labored,
Now for Him alone.

*Refrain:
All in all forever, Jesus will I sing,
Ev’rything in Jesus, And Jesus ev’rything.*

5. Once I hoped in Jesus,
Now I know He’s mine;
Once my lamps were dying,
Now they brightly shine;
Once for death I waited,
Now His coming hail;
And my hopes are anchored
Safe within the veil.

*Refrain:
All in all forever, Jesus will I sing,
Ev’rything in Jesus, And Jesus ev’rything.*
GFH1_112.name: Himself

SOL1_113.content:
I think of the vast universe, all stars,
Your greatness, power and infinite glory,
You've named heavenly stars
many as seashore.
Heavens show Your way
and speak of Your glory.
How great and holy!
Who can compare with You?
Glorious! Beautiful!
You're the endless fountain!
Daily You light fireworks,
cause all stars to dance,
Celebrate our union,
Your love dream's come true.

2. Abba, it is precious
I see Your glory.
How blessed and glorious
to be Your dear child.
You've prepared a playground
for all of Your sons,
Reign with You fore'er,
Your sovereignty'll increase.
How great and holy!
My Abba's glorious!
Glorious! Beautiful!
My Abba's joyous heart!
Daily You light fireworks,
cause all stars to dance,
Celebrate our joy and
the deep affection.
SOL1_113.name: Daily Fireworks

SOL2_113.content:
Till the Spirit is poured on us
From on high, from on high.
The desert becomes a rich field,
Which seems like a forest.

2. May You pour the Holy Spirit
Upon us, upon us.
The desert becomes a rich field,
Which seems like a forest.

*(Ref. Isa. 32.  15)*
SOL2_113.name: The Scene of Revival

SOL2_114.content:
The Father and the Son 
and the Spirit
Live in my heart, 
embrace me day and night.
I live in this sweet fellowship fore'er.
Love, joy and life now I fully enjoy.
SOL2_114.name: My Precious Companion

GFH1_114.content:
1. Amazing grace! How sweet the sound.
That saved a wretch like me!
I once was lost, but now am found,
Was blind, but now I see.

2. ‘Twas grace that taught my heart to fear,
And grace my fears relieved;
How precious did that grace appear
The hour I first believed!

3. The Lord hath promised good to me,
His word my hope secures;
He will my shield and portion be
As long as life endures.

4. Through many dangers, toils, and snares,
I have already come;
‘Tis grace hath brought me safe thus far,
And grace will lead me home.

5. When I’ve been there ten thousand years,
Bright shining as the sun,
We’ve no less days to sing God’s praise
Than when I first begun.
GFH1_114.name: Amazing Grace

SOL1_115.content:
Abba, Your gaze of affection,
Love and joy, admiration
Has drawn my heart,
made me rejoice,
Gaze on You. (Fly to You.)
Your fervent love, passion, embrace
Are my joy, delight
and rest Forever.
SOL1_115.name: Gaze of Love and Joy

referenceSongs.name: 充滿愛、欣賞、歡愉的凝望
充滿愛、欣賞、歡愉的凝望

SOL2_115.content:
The blood of the Lamb opened a new way
To the Holy Place, Abba's bosom.
How He loves the Lord, He loves me the same.
I am His dear child; He's my rest.

2. The blood of the Lamb washed away my sins.
I have no shadows, whiter than snow.
He set free my heart, defeat'd all my foes.
I lift up my head, shout "victory"!

3. The blood of the Lamb made me righteous.
The holy city, the trees of life,
All belong to me - I'm enthroned with Him.
In His light fore'er I abide.
SOL2_115.name: The Blood of the Lamb

SOL1_116.content:
It's so precious! You are my Beloved!
Your love is so passionate, romantic!
Set me as a seal upon Your heart,
As a seal upon Your arm, O' Lord!
For love is strong as death!
For love is strong as death!
Jealousy is cruel as Sheol,
as cruel as Sheol,
The flashes there-of are flashes of fire.
A very flame of Jehovah!
A very flame of Jehovah!
Many waters cannot quench love,
Neither can floods drown it.
If a man would give all the substance
Of his house for love, it would utterly
Be contemned, be contemned.
Now You and I united forever!
Your dream of love comes true.
O' let me drink fully of Your love;
En-thralled in embrace and praise,
And set my love on You!
SOL1_116.name: The Flame of Jehovah

SOL2_116.content:
The Lamb of God bled and died;
The veil was rent fore'er!
The wall of sins was shattered.
God took away all my sins.
I am perfect, whiter than snow.
A living way He has opened
To the Father,
I'm part of God's circle of love!

2. I've entered God's circle of love:
They're always by my side
Sweet fellowship, love interflow,
Love of the Trinity God.
I enjoy most this fellowship:
The Father, the Son, the Spirit
I cherish most God's precious name.
He's my portion! (He's fore'er mine!)
SOL2_116.name: The Fruit of the Cross

GFH1_116.content:
1. When upon life’s billows
you are tempest-tossed,
When you are discouraged,
thinking all is lost,
Count your many blessings,
name them one by one,
And it will surprise you
what the Lord hath done.

*Refrain:
Count your blessings,
name them one by one,
Count your blessings,
see what God hath done;
Count your blessings,
name them one by one,
And it will surprise you
what the Lord hath done.*

2. Are you ever burdened
with a load of care,
Does the cross seem heavy 
you are called to bear?
Count your many blessings,
every doubt will fly,
And you will be singing as the days go by.

*Refrain:
Count your blessings,
name them one by one,
Count your blessings,
see what God hath done;
Count your blessings,
name them one by one,
And it will surprise you
what the Lord hath done.*

3. When you look at others with
their lands and gold,
Think that Christ has promised you
His wealth untold,
Count your many blessings 
money cannot buy,
Your reward in heaven,
and your home on high.

*Refrain:
Count your blessings,
name them one by one,
Count your blessings,
see what God hath done;
Count your blessings,
name them one by one,
And it will surprise you
what the Lord hath done.*

4. So amid the conflict
whether great or small,
Do not be discouraged, God is over all;
Count your many blessings,
your heart will be glad,
Seeing His love and care,
your faith will be strong.

*Refrain:
Count your blessings,
name them one by one,
Count your blessings,
see what God hath done;
Count your blessings,
name them one by one,
And it will surprise you
what the Lord hath done.*
GFH1_116.name: Count Your Blessings

SOL2_117.content:
The love of the Lamb has melted my heart.
He loved me and gave Himself for me.
He shed His blood to betroth me.
This lifeyielding love shakes the world!

2. To gain my heart He became the Lamb.
He passed through all suff'rings for me.
On the cruel cross He overcame death.
His banner over me is love.

3. The wedding feast, marriage of the Lamb,
Is my sweet hope, my earnest desire.
It is His love dream, eternal yearning 
Satisfies our hearts forever.

4. The Lamb's glory shines in the city.
In His love and light we're heart to heart.
The Lamb's enthroned in His kingdom of love.
We will reign with Him forever.

5. The steadfast love of the Lamb and His bride
Is full of newness, romance and warmth.
Fore'er we live in the river of joy.
Our love will increase more and more.

6. The love of the Lamb has shaken my heart.
He loved me and gave Himself for me.
He shed His blood to betroth me.
This love has stunned the Father's heart.
SOL2_117.name: The Banner of the Lamb Flies Over Me

referenceSongs.name: 羔羊的愛旗永飄揚我上
羔羊的愛旗永飄揚我上
O sangue do Cordeiro é o estandarte de amor

SOL1_118.content:
O' Lord, You are more real than all things.
You're infinite, ever o'erflowing.
You and I are deeply united.
One spirit, heart to heart.
For Your endless love,
O' Lord, You need me most.
Your dream of love - to live in my heart,
Live with me day and night.
(Live a love life with me.)

2. O' Lord, You are more real than all things.
You're infinite, overflow with life.
You and I are deeply united.
I've Your precious presence.
(It is so warm and sweet)
For Your endless love,
O' Lord, You need me most.
Hand in hand we walk this path of love.
Fore'er we fall in love.
SOL1_118.name: Your Love Dream— To Live in My Heart

referenceSongs.name: Seu Sonho de Amor é Viver no Meu Coração

SOL2_119.content:
O' Lord, I treasure You shed Your blood.
This love melts my heart, makes me amazed.
It warms my heart, draws me close to You.
I live in Your bosom of love.

2. O' Lord, I treasure You shed Your blood.
You've kept the nail prints - the wounds of love.
Your love's ever fresh, forever the same.
'Tis my eternal rest and joy.

3. O' Lord, I treasure You shed Your blood.
Your love overcame all pain and death.
We are united; I belong to You.
As a seal I am on Your heart.

4. O' Lord, I treasure You shed Your blood.
Your true love for me is proven.
This is my rest, the rock of my faith.
I freely embrace Your love.
SOL2_119.name: His Blood-sealed Love

GFH1_119.content:
1. When this passing world is done,
When has sunk yon radiant sun,
When the pearly gate I gain,
Never to go out again;
Then, Lord, shall I fully know –
Not till then – how much I owe.

2. When I stand before the throne,
Dressed in beauty not my own;
When I see Thee as Thou art,
Love Thee with unsinning heart:
Then, Lord, shall I fully know –
Not till then – how much I owe.

3. When the praise of heaven I hear,
Loud as thunder to the ear,
Loud as many water’s noise,
Sweet as harp’s melodious voice:
Then, Lord, shall I fully know –
Not till then – how much I owe.

4. Chosen, not for good in me,
Wakened up from wrath to flee,
Hidden in the Saviour’s side,
By the Spirit sanctified:
Teach me, Lord, on earth to show,
By my love, how much I owe.
GFH1_119.name: When This Passing World Is Done

SOL1_120.content:
His personal love to me
Is from eternity past.
Which made Him long to be a Man,
To be like me, closest to me,
Despise all shame, endure the cross
To unite with me forever.

2. His personal love to me
Is wholehearted, committed,
Full of passion, warmth and romance.
It's the flame of Jehovah,
It's the love from the beginning.
I'm enthralled in this great love.

3. His personal love to me
Is the secret in His heart,
His eternal sweet dream of love,
His joy ahead on the cross,
His desire and flames of love.
He embraces me to His heart.
SOL1_120.name: The Lord’s Personal Love and Affection to Me

SOL2_120.content:
And can it be that I should gain
An interest in the Saviour's blood?
Died He for me, who caused His pain?
For me, who Him to death pursued?
Amazing love! How can it be
That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?
*(Refrain)*
Amazing love! How can it be
That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?

2. He left His Father's throne above 
So free, so infinite His grace 
Who can sound the depths of His love 
He bled for our sinful race;
'Tis mercy all, immense and free;
For, O my God! It found out me.

3. Long my imprisoned spirit lay
Fast bound in sin and hopeless night;
Thine eye diffused a quick'ning ray,
I woke, the dungeon flamed with light;
My chains fell off, my heart was free;
I rose, went forth, and followed Thee.

4. No condemnation now I dread;
Jesus, and all in Him, is mine!
Alive in Him, my living Head,
And clothed in righteousness divine,
Bold I approach th'eternal throne,
And claim the crown, thro' Christ my own.
SOL2_120.name: And Can It be That I Should Gain

GFH1_121.content:
1. I gave my life for thee;
My precious blood I shed,
That thou might’st ransomed be
And quickened from the dead.
For thee, for thee, I gave my life;
What hast thou given for Me?
For thee, for thee, I gave my life;
What hast thou given for Me?

2. I spent long years for thee,
In weariness and woe,
That an eternity
Of joy thou mightest know.
For thee, for thee, I spent long years;
Hast thou spent one for Me?
For thee, for thee, I spent long years;
Hast thou spent one for Me?

3. My Father’s home of light,
My rainbow circled throne,
I left for earthly night,
For wand’rings sad and lone.
For thee, for thee, I left it all;
Hast thou left aught for Me?
For thee, for thee, I left it all;
Hast thou left aught for Me?

4. I suffer’d much for thee –
More than thy tongue can tell,
Of bitt’rest agony –
To rescue thee from hell.
For thee, for thee, I suffer’d much;
What canst thou bear for Me?
For thee, for thee, I suffer’d much;
What canst thou bear for Me?

5. And I have brought to thee,
Down from My home above,
Salvation full and free,
My pardon and My love.
To thee, to thee, great gifts I brought;
What hast thou brought to Me?
To thee, to thee, great gifts I brought;
What hast thou brought to Me?

6. Lord, let my life be given,
And every moment spent,
For God, for souls, for heav’n,
And all earth’s ties be rent.
For me, for me, Thou gavest Thyself;
Now I give all for Thee.
For me, for me, Thou gavest Thyself;
Now I give all for Thee.
GFH1_121.name: I Gave My Life For Thee

SOL1_122.content:
I have such a glorious Beloved.
He is the Son of the Most High God.
He's so gentle, humble, friendly,
Perfect, adorable.
He once calmed the raging water.
He cast away Satan's power.
He upholds all things; He raised the dead.
He healed the sick and He filled the hunger.

O' He's God and the Son of Man.
He died but He rose again.
He died for me to bear my sins,
And today He lives in my heart!
SOL1_122.name: What a Glorious Beloved

SOL2_122.content:
Crown Him with many crowns,
The Lamb upon His throne;
Hark! How the Heav'nly anthem drowns
All music but its own!
Awake, my soul, and sing
Of Him who died for thee;
And hail Him as thy matchless King
Thro' all eternity.

2. Crown Him the Lord of love!
Behold His hands and side,
Rich wounds, yet visible above,
In beauty glorified;
No angel in the sky
Can fully bear that sight,
But downward bends 
his wond'ring eye
At mysteries so bright.

3. Crown Him the Lord of life!
Who triumphed o'er the grave;
Who rose victorious in the strife
For those He came to save;
His glories now we sing,
Who died and rose on high;
Who died eternal life to bring,
And lives that death may die.

4. Crown Him the Lord of Heav'n!
One with the Father known,
One with the Spirit through Him giv'n
From yonder glorious throne!
To Thee be endless praise,
For Thou for us hast died;
Be Thou, O Lord, thro' endless days
Adored and magnified.
SOL2_122.name: Crown Him with Many Crowns

SOL1_124.content:
You in my life, I'm no longer lonely or afraid.
You in my life, I rejoice, overflow with hope.
Your love compels me, it is my sweet rest.
Your heart, Your arms are mine. My heart is Yours.
March on with You. We fight and dance,
Accomplish Your will, await Your coming.

2. You in my life it's so blessed, warm and beautiful.
With You I can use problems and challenge all things.
You are my life, giving me the drive.
We'll finish Your glorious commission with joy.
We're hand in hand, with love interflows,
To fight the battle, accomplish Your will.
SOL1_124.name: You in My Life

SOL2_124.content:
Jesus the very thought of Thee,
With sweetness fills my breast;
But sweeter far Thy face to see,
And in Thy presence rest.

2. Nor voice can sing, 
nor heart can frame,
Nor can the mem'ry find
A sweeter sound than Thy blest Name,
O Saviour of mankind!

3. O Hope of every contrite heart,
O Joy of all the meek,
To those who fall, how kind Thou art!
How good to those who seek!

4. And those who find Thee, find a bliss
Nor tongue nor pen can show;
The love of Jesus, what it is
None but His loved ones know.

5. O Jesus, light of all below!
Thou fount of life and fire!
Surpassing all the joys we know,
And all we can desire.

6. No other source have we but Thee,
Soulthirst to satisfy.
Exhaustless spring! The waters free!
All other streams are dry.

7. Jesus, our only Joy be Thou,
As Thou our Prize wilt be;
Jesus, be Thou our Glory now,
And through eternity.
SOL2_124.name: Jesus, the Very Thought of Thee

GFH1_124.name: Take My Life, And Let It Be

SOL1_126.content:
What a Friend I have in You,
Faithful and true.
If men are faithless,
Your love is always sure.
Whenever I need You,
You give Your hand
to carry me through.
Even men do wrongs to You,
The wounds You still can endure.
Your love makes me lift my head.
Your grace makes me walk ahead.
Having such a Friend like You,
All my life I'm content.
You accompany me to the end,
Never leave me, my intimate Friend.
SOL1_126.name: My Intimate Friend

SOL2_126.content:
Lord Jesus! When we think of Thee,
Of all Thy love and grace,
Our spirits long and fain would see
Thy beauty face to face.

2. And though the wilderness we tread,
A barren, thirsty ground,
With thorns and briars overspread,
Where foes and snares abound.

3. Yet in Thy love such depths, we see,
Our souls o'erflow with praise 
Content ourselves, while, Lord to Thee
A joyful song we raise.

4. Our Lord, our Life, our Rest, our Shield,
Our Rock, our Food, our Light 
Each thought of Thee doth constant yield
Unchanging, fresh delight.

5. Blest Saviour, keep our spirits stayed
Hard following after Thee,
Till we, in robes of white arrayed,
Thy face in glory see.
SOL2_126.name: Lord Jesus! When We Think of Thee

GFH1_126.content:
1. My Jesus, I love Thee,
I know Thou art mine!
For Thee all the follies
of sin I resign;
My gracious Redeemer
my Saviour art Thou!
If ever I loved Thee,
my Jesus, ‘tis now!

2. I love Thee,
because Thou hast first loved me,
And purchased my pardon 
on calvary’s tree;
I love Thee for wearing 
the thorns on thy brow;
If ever I loved Thee,
my Jesus, ‘tis now!

3. I’ll love Thee in life,
I will love Thee in death,
And praise Thee as long as 
Thou lendest me breath;
And say when the death-dew
lies cold on my brow:
“If ever I loved Thee,
my Jesus, ‘tis now!”

4. In mansions of glory 
and endless delight,
I’ll ever adore Thee 
in heaven so bright;
I’ll sing with the glittering crown 
on my brow:
“If ever I loved Thee,
my Jesus, ‘tis now!”
GFH1_126.name: My Jesus, I Love Thee

SOL1_128.content:
My Abba stretches out His hand,
Invites me gladly to join
Him and the Lord and the Spirit
In Their eternal dance of love.
Such love who can fathom,
Such joy who can describe,
Enter into God's circle of love,
My bliss and joy overflow.

2. Daily from morning to night,
Abba, the Lord and the Spirit
