Abide with me and surround me;
They walk, work and dance with me.
They share Their all with me;
Enter deep into my life.
Live in such warm and deep fellowship,
They are my life and sweet portion.
SOL1_128.name: Eternal Dance of Love

SOL2_128.content:
All things that happen to me in this life
Are from Your beautiful will.
Either things present, or things that are to come
Cannot change Your love to me.

2. To be abased or to abound,
All things I face in my life 
All work together to refine me
So I can finish Your will.

3. I have learned the secret of being filled.
In the Lord I have strength.
Give thanks in all things, with Him I am content.
He is my fountain of joy.
SOL2_128.name: I am Content

GFH1_128.content:
1. Gathered to Thy name, Lord Jesus,
Losing sight of all but Thee,
O what joy Thy presence gives us,
Calling up our hearts to Thee.

2. Loved with love which knows no measure –
As the Father’s love to Thee,
Blessed Lord, our hearts would treasure
All the Father’s thoughts of Thee.

3. All His joy, His rest, His pleasure,
All His deep delight in Thee.
Lord, Thy heart alone can measure
What Thy Father found in Thee.

4. How He set His love upon Thee,
Called Thee His beloved Son;
Yet for us He did not spare Thee,
By Thy death our life was won.

5. O the joy, the wondrous singing
When we see Thee as Thou art;
Thy blest name, Lord Jesus, bringing
Sweetest music to God’s heart.

6. Notes of gladness, songs unceasing,
Hymns of everlasting praise,
Psalms of glory, joy increasing
Through God’s endless day of days.
GFH1_128.name: Gathered To Thy Name, Lord Jesus

SOL2_129.content:
Jehovah is My name
forever and ever.
This is My memorial
to all generations.
Jehovah is My name
forever and ever.
This is My memorial
to all generations.

2. I AM WHO I AM,
the First and the Last,
Who is, who was and who is
to come, the Almighty.
Jehovah is My name
forever and ever.
This is My memorial
to all generations.

3. You should know Jehovah,
He who is true.
He is I AM WHO I AM,
He's from the beginning.
Jehovah is His name
forever and ever.
This is His memorial
to all generations.
SOL2_129.name: God’s Unique, Memorable Name

referenceSongs.name: O Nome Único e Memorável de Deus

SOL1_130.content:
Lord, You did know
You would suffer much on the earth.
Lord, You did know
You'd be nailed on the cross.
My glorious Lord,
You never had a single doubt.
For love You longed to be a Man fore'er.
O' my dear Lord,
it's so precious You have come.
Fore'er a Man,
that deeply comforts my heart.
You take away all my fears and distance.
You want to be the closest,
closest to me.
(O' Lord, now and forever
You dwell in my heart.)

2. Fore'er a Man,
You make me know my own value
And my precious position in Your heart.
O' Lord, You came.
It shook the heavens and the earth,
And the angels are forever amazed.
O' my dear Lord,
it's so precious You have come.
You have decid'd
to commit Yourself fore'er.
Such fervent love comforts my heart
and gives me warmth.
May I enjoy Your presence now and forever.
Emmanuel, You're worthy of my love fore'er.
SOL1_130.name: Emmanuel - God is Forever Man

referenceSongs.name: Emanuel- Deus é Homem para Sempre

SOL2_130.content:
The eternal dance of Abba and the Lord
And the Holy Spirit wonderful and sweet!
You are boundless; You self-exist,
Overflowing with life and love.
I partake in this circle of love.
What a blessing to live in this love!
Let me worship Abba and the Lord.
My joy is full; my heart rests, overflows.
My heart rests, overflows.
SOL2_130.name: The Wonderful Eternal Dance of Love

GFH1_130.content:
1. On that same night, Lord Jesus,
When all around Thee joined
To cast its darkest shadow
Across Thy holy mind,
We hear Thy voice, blest Savior,
“This do, remember me,”
With grateful hearts responding,
We do remember Thee.

2. The depth of all Thy suff’ring
No heart could e’er conceive,
The cup of wrath o’erflowing
For us Thou didst receive;
And, oh, of God forsaken
On the accursed tree;
With grateful hearts, Lord Jesus,
We now remember Thee.

3. We think of all the darkness
Which round Thy spirit pressed,
Of all those waves and billows,
Which rolled across Thy breast
Oh, there Thy grace unbounded
And perfect love we see;
With joy and sorrow mingling,
We would remember Thee.

4. We know Thee now as risen,
The Firstborn from the dead;
We see Thee now ascended,
The Church’s glorious Head.
In Thee by grace accepted,
The heart and mind set free
To think of all Thy sorrow,
And thus remember Thee.

5. Till Thou shalt come in glory,
And call us hence away,
To rest in all the brightness
Of that unclouded day,
We show Thy death, Lord Jesus,
And here would seek to be
More to Thy death conformed,
While we remember Thee.
GFH1_130.name: On That Same Night, Lord Jesus

SOL2_131.content:
Dearest Abba, How great You are!
You once sent Your beloved Son,
And on the cross You chastised Him.
O You love me dearly!
Your gentleness and Your great love
Make me re'lize how great You are!
You love me as You love the Lord.
How beautiful is Your heart!

 2. Abba, who can measure Your love?
You once sent Your beloved Son,
And on the cross You chastised Him,
For You need me the most.
Your love's boundless, Your heart's all fair,
Make me re'lize how great You are!
You embrace me into Your heart.
And in Your love, I feel so warm.
(In Your bosom my heart feels sweet.)

3. Dearest Abba, how great You are!
You love me as You love the Lord!
I'm born of You though created;
I am joint heir with Christ.
You are my true Abba!
Your affection and Your great love
Make me re'lize how great You are.
Let me deeply enter Your love.
Love You fore'er, love You the most.
SOL2_131.name: Dearest Abba, How Great You are!

SOL1_132.content:
You became flesh, dwelt among men,
Full of grace and full of truth.
You came from heaven to seek me,
And to give me hope.
You had no place to lay Your head.
You suffered much pain and grief.
To fully sympathize with me,
You offered Yourself.

*Chorus:
Such love as Yours so wide and deep;
It will always stay the same -
Everlasting!
I can't measure this great love.
My heart is amazed.
You deserve my love.*

2. Nailed on the cross,
God-forsaken,
Who could understand Your pain?
Hands, feet were nailed,
and blood was shed;
You gave up Your all.
In that while I was a sinner,
Christ gave His life for me;
God shows His own love toward me -
O' such love as Yours!

*Chorus:
Such love as Yours so wide and deep;
It will always stay the same -
Everlasting!
I can't measure this great love.
My heart is amazed.
You deserve my love.*
SOL1_132.name: Such Great Love

SOL2_133.content:
My Abba's personal love
For me is high and deep.
He would gladly send His Son
If it were only for me.

*(Chorus)
Your love thoughts for me 
who can comprehend?
Now You are my dear Abba! 
Deep affection we share.*

2. If it were only for me,
He would prepare the Lamb 
By the blood of His Son,
He washed me whiter than snow.

*(Chorus)
Your love thoughts for me 
who can comprehend?
Now You are my dear Abba! 
Deep affection we share.*

 3. Abba, Your personal love
For me is high and deep.
You forsook Your beloved Son
To gain me as Your dear child.
I'm in Your bosom of love.

*(Chorus)
Your love thoughts for me 
who can comprehend?
Now You are my dear Abba! 
Deep affection we share.*
SOL2_133.name: Abba’s Personal Love for Me

GFH1_133.content:
1. Jesus, Lord, we know Thee present
At Thy table freshly spread,
Seated at Thy priceless banquet
With Thy banner overhead.
Precious moments at Thy table
From all fear and doubt set free;
Here to rest, so sweetly able,
Occupied alone with Thee.

2. Here rejoicing in Thy nearness,
Gladly by Thy Spirit let;
Calmly in the blest remembrance
Of Thy precious blood once shed.
Lord, we take each simple token
In fond memory of Thee;
Muse upon Thy body broken,
And Thy blood shed on the tree.

3. O what joy it is to see Thee
In these emblems gathered here!
In the bread and wine of blessing,
Bread to strengthen, wine to cheer.
Lord, behold us met together,
Members of our risen Head,
Thus to take the cup of blessing,
Thus to share the broken bread.

4. Lord, we know how true Thy promise
To be with us where we meet,
When in Thy loved Name we gather
To enjoy communion sweet.
Dearer still that looked-for promise
To each waiting, yearning heart,
That we soon will be with Thee, Lord
And forever where Thou art.
GFH1_133.name: Jesus, Lord, We Know Thee Present

SOL1_134.content:
On the bitter cross You thought of me;
You saw the joy and sweetness ahead,
And You despised the shame and the cross,
That I may rest on Your bosom so sweet!

2. When You sweetly think: You've died for me,
And on the cross, You drank the bitter cup;
Your heart is filled with o'erflowing joy,
For You treasure that You have died for me.

3. I so treasure that I can love You,
And that I can live and suffer for You.
It is my joy to echo Your love,
Weaving many sweet eternal memories.
SOL1_134.name: What You and I Treasure

SOL1_135.content:
The Lord longs to see my face.
One thing I will seek.
I need to choose the good part -
Face to face with my dear Lord.
There're indeed trials on earth
But in Him I have peace.
With the Lord, my heart can rest,
For He has overcome all.

*Chorus
O' Lord, I love You. Draw me close to You.
Make me the closest to You, respond to Your love.*

2. There're indeed trials on earth;
My Lord'll carry me through.
He is moved with compassion.
His love can heal me.
All things happen for my good -
Cause me to know Him more.
His love, wisdom, power,
His heart and arms are mine.

*Chorus
O' Lord, I love You. Draw me close to You.
Make me the closest to You, respond to Your love.*

3. He loved me and died for me.
His true love I cherish.
For the Lord I'll break my flask -
Offer my perfume for Him.
(Respond to Him in this life.)
He treasures what Mary did.
He missed Bethany.
He desires my heart for Him,
For He yearns for my love most.

*Chorus
O' Lord, I love You. Draw me close to You.
Make me the closest to You, respond to Your love.*
SOL1_135.name: What the Lord Treasures

SOL2_135.content:
Wonderfully, fearfully, I was creat'd,
All things bright and beautiful, full of wonders.
My heart's amazed and I praise my dear Abba,
"How great You are! How great You are!"

2. Wonderfully, fearfully, I'm born again.
I am Your created one, yet born of You.
It's so joyful to be Your dearest child.
You love me most! You love me most!
You love me as You love the Lord.
SOL2_135.name: Fearfully Made and Born Again

SOL2_136.content:
Glorious miracle of His love 
I'm Abba's dearest child.
This affection sweetens our hearts.
We're enthralled in this deep love.
He brings me to His heart.

2. I am His dream, His glory.
I have captured His heart.
For me, He sings and shouts for joy.
I am His treasure, delight.
I satisfy His heart.
SOL2_136.name: Glorious Miracle of Love

GFH1_136.content:
1. According to Thy gracious word,
In meek humility,
This will I do, my dying Lord,
I will remember Thee.

2. Thy body, broken for my sake,
My bread from heav’n shall be;
Thy testamental cup I take,
And thus remember Thee.

3. Gethsemane can I forget
Or there Thy conflict see,
Thine agony and bloody sweat,
And not remember Thee.

4. When to the cross I turn mine eyes
And rest on Calvary,
O Lamb of God, my sacrifice,
I must remember Thee.

5. Remember Thee and all Thy pains
And all Thy love to me;
Yea, while a breath, a pulse remains,
I will remember Thee.

6. And when these failing lips grow dumb
And mind and memory flee,
When Thou shalt in Thy kingdom come,
Jesus, remember me.
GFH1_136.name: According To Thy Gracious Word

SOL1_137.content:
He died for us! He died for us,
That we can be forgiven,
That we may be set free from sin,
That we may enter heaven.

2. He died for us! He died for us,
To remove all barriers of sin;
Fore'er the veil was torn in two;
I dwell in my Abba's bosom.

3. He died for me! He died for me,
To cleanse me whiter than the snow,
So that I can unite with Him,
And that He may dwell in my heart.

4. He died for us! He died for us,
That whether we wake or sleep,
We should live together with Him,
We should live together with Him.
SOL1_137.name: His Love’s Purpose

referenceSongs.name: 或生或死晝夜與主同活
或生或死晝夜與主同活
Quer vigiemos, quer durmamos, vivamos juntamente com Ele

SOL2_137.content:
Your love is wider than the ocean.
This love captures my heart.
The heavens declare Your glory.
Every star, You call them by name.

2. O' Father, Your love and tender care
Deeply comfort my heart.
Every strand of my hair You have numbered.
From afar, You know my every thought.
SOL2_137.name: The Father’s Tender Care

SOL1_138.content:
Love again, trust again, let's shout for joy!
Pray again, do again, give again.
Hope and rejoice again, with more passion,
Sing and worship again, fly on high.
(Once again!)

2. One more time, one more time, more abundant,
One more time, one more time, love Him more.
One more time, one more time, become glorious.
One more time, one more time, be like Him.
(One more time!)

3. For the Lord, for the Church, I will strive on.
Joyfully and bravely I march on.
Lift my head, I am of good courage.
Trusting Him, we'll finish His work.
(Unstoppable!)

4. Raise my hand, lift my head, clap hands and shout.
We march on forward with joy.
Overflowing with hope, we sing along.
We press toward the goal with gladness.
(Long to see the Lord's face in the clouds!)
(Hallelujah!) (Clap hands!)
SOL1_138.name: One More Time, One More Time

referenceSongs.name: Mais um vez! Mais uma vez!

SOL2_138.content:
I treasure You're my Abba.
I exist because of You.
Your heart and Your affection
Are reserved for Your child.
(We enjoy this affection.)

2. Before time You thought of me,
Predestined me as Your child.
Your bosom and Your heart are mine.
We are enthralled in this love.
SOL2_138.name: I Exist Because of Abba

GFH1_138.content:
1. Lord, we would ne’er forget Thy love,
Who has redeemed us by Thy blood;
And now, as our High Priest above.
Dost intercede for us with God.

2. Lord, we would not forget the pain,
The blood-like sweat, the shameful tree,
The wrath Thy soul did once sustain
From sin and death to set us free.

3. We would remember we are one
With every saint that loves Thy Name;
United to Thee on the throne,
Our life, our hope, our Lord the same.

4. Here, in the broken bread and wine,
We hear Thee say, “Remember Me!
I gave My life to ransom thine,
I bore the wrath to set thee free.”

5. Lord, we are Thine, we praise Thy love,
One with Thy saints, all one in Thee;
We would, until we meet above,
In all our ways remember Thee.
GFH1_138.name: We Would Never Forget Your Love

SOL2_139.content:
O my dear Lord, 
Your love to me is so precious.
You're infinite; 
who can tell Your glory?
Yet, Lord, You came 
with joy, leaping upon mountains;
Became a Man, 
You're born in a manger.
You chose to grow 
in Nazareth, a lowly town.
You're carpenter, 
daily facing wood and nails.
You've long decid'd 
to die for me on the cross.
Lord, I treasure 
Your beautiful journey on earth.
O Lord, besides You 
to whom would I belong?
SOL2_139.name: The Tender Love and Footsteps of the Lamb

referenceSongs.name: 羔羊卑微的腳蹤與溫情

SOL1_140.content:
It's so precious the glorious Lord
Commissioned us in this age!
Your grace is sufficient for me,
You'll grant me the Holy Spirit!
You'll be with us! You'll co-work with us,
Followed with Your miracles.
Revive Your work, accomplish Your will.
There will be a glorious bride waiting for You!

2. You in my life, my hope overflows,
I fear no valleys, floods or fires.
You are my Beloved and Shepherd,
You've fully committed Yourself;
You are the First, You are the Last,
You'll take care until the end.
O' Lord, I love You, deeply love Your church.
Faithfully I'll follow You till the end.
(May Your bride love You
and welcome Your coming!)
SOL1_140.name: It’s the Lord, the Author and Finisher, Who Commissioned Us
tags: Cowork with the Lord, Finish His Commission

referenceSongs.name: 是開始成終榮耀的主託付我們
是開始成終榮耀的主託付我們
Foi o Glorioso Deus, o Autor e o Finalizador, que nos Comissionou

SOL2_140.content:
A Child was born for me, for me,
He's the Father's only Son.
He has no beginning, no end;
He is the infinite One.
For love, from heaven, He came
To be a Man forever.
He leaped with joy upon mountains.
For me, He's born in the manger.

2. He even walked to the cruel cross.
He saw the great joy ahead,
Endured the cross, despised the shame.
"It is finished!" He cried out.
He and I are in one spirit.
Fore'er He lives in my heart.
Day and night He lives with me.
O' Lord, Your love melts my heart.
O' Lord, Your love captures my heart.
Your banner o'er me is love.
May I follow You closely,
Forever love You only.
SOL2_140.name: He Came and Died for Me, Now Lives in Me

referenceSongs.name: 為我而生、而死，今永活在我心

GFH1_140.content:
1. Sweet feast of love divine!
‘Tis grace that makes us free
To feed upon this bread and wine,
In memory, Lord of Thee.

2. Here every welcome guest
Waits, Lord, from Thee to learn
The secrets of Thy Father’s breast
And all Thy grace discern.

3. Here conscience ends its strife,
And faith delights to prove
The sweetness of the Bread of Life,
The fullness of Thy love.

4. That blood that flowed for sin
In symbol here we see,
And feel the blessed pledge within
That we are loved of Thee.

5. O if this glimpse of love
Is so divinely sweet,
What will it be, O Lord, above,
Thy gladdening smile to meet!

6. To see Thee face to face,
Thy perfect likeness wear,
And all Thy ways of wondrous grace
Through endless years declare.
GFH1_140.name: Sweet Feast Of Love Divine

SOL1_142.content:
O' let us rejoice in God,
Walk the everlasting way,
Bring forth a lasting revival,
Accomplish God's glorious will.
Daily practice godliness,
Live to Him from morn to night.
Glory and joy ever increasing,
Offer aroma of love.

2. Never stray from the right way,
Pressing on towards the goal.
Ne'er deny the heavenly vision.
Finish the last beautiful race.
Let us all arise,
Strive for Him till the end.
Be faithful to the Lord unto death,
Till we meet Him in the clouds.
"I will strive for the Lord till the end!"
SOL1_142.name: Strive for the Lord till the End
tags: Cowork with the Lord, Finish His Commission

referenceSongs.name: Lutar pelo Senhor até o Fim

SOL2_142.content:
O' Lord, when You faced 
the deepest pain on the cross,
You sweetly thought of this 
fullness of joy before You.
You longed for me to be 
enthroned with You in glory.
You yearned to live in me 
forever and ever.
I cherish Your love dream.
You gave Yourself for me. 
Now Your love dream has come true.
With joy You embrace me 
into Your beautiful heart.

2. O' Lord, when You faced 
the deepest pain on the cross,
The joy of the Father and 
mine were set before You.
You longed for the Father's 
deepest love to be in me.
You desired me to live 
in Abba's heart forever.
I cherish Your love dream.
You gave Yourself to make 
Abba's and my dream come true.
Abba ran out to me, 
embraced me into His heart.

3. O' Lord, when You faced 
the deepest pain on the cross,
You sweetly thought of this 
fullness of joy before You.
You longed for Abba's house 
of glory and unity
To be the warmest home 
in the whole universe.
We all stand as one man 
to accomplish God's love plan.
The fullness of this house 
overflows to worlds of love.
I cherish Your love dream.
You offered Yourself to 
fulfill God's dream of love.

4. O' Lord, when You faced 
the deepest pain on the cross,
You sweetly thought of this 
fullness of joy before You.
You longed for me to be 
sanctified, belong to You,
Sweetly I live with You 
in our fellowship of love.
You sanctified me. 
Now I belong to Abba.
Closely I walk with Him, 
enjoy deepest affection,
Live in the Father's heart, 
delight in God's family.
I cherish Your love dream.
You gave Yourself for this 
wonderful love plan of God.
SOL2_142.name: The Lord’s Love Dream, His Joy Ahead

GFH1_142.name: “Here, O My Lord, I See Thee Face To Face”

SOL1_144.content:
It's so precious, You and I joined in love!
Fore'er, You have committed Yourself.
Fully You share Your life with my life,
What a joy to live with You through the day.
You are my life, You change me
From glory to glory;
From year to year our love grows deep more and more.
Live side by side, we fight and dance.
This glorious marathon, full of sweet memories,
I treasure this unique journey!
Burning love drives me to march with You.
Let me be true to You, strive to the end
Toward the goal, for life, I race.
How You treasure my love to You
Through all battles and pain,
I treasure that I can live for You
On earth, give my love to You.
SOL1_144.name: The Long March of Love – The One-Time Marathon
tags: Cowork with the Lord, Finish His Commission

referenceSongs.name: A Longa Marcha de Amor - A Maratona Única

SOL2_144.content:
Whenever I consider Your love,
My heart is deeply moved.
Silently You bore all agony,
Malice of sinners.
One slap after another,
One slash after another,
One nail after another,
All these pierced through Your heart.

2. My dear Lord, I think of Your wounded back.
It's like a land being plowed.
Your head was pierced by the crown of thorn,
But You were still steadfast
You carried the bitter cross to the place called Golgotha.
Heavens and earth reject'd You; Abba forsook You.

3. When I behold my Lord and His cross,
How can my heart not be moved?
His head and back were wounded, hands, feet were nailed;
His side was pierced, heartbroken.
Up high was my Saviour, down dripped His precious blood.
It was shed for me, to wash away my sins.

4. Whenever I think of my Lord and His cross,
My heart is melted and moved.
Such love, pain, righteousness, all weave into
Boundless forgiveness.
Love so deep, grace abundant, flowing to my heart,
Turning into a fountain, overflows forever.

5. Thinking of the tender love of the cross,
I fall in His ocean of love.
My stubborn and unyielding heart is melted.
My wounded spirit is healed.
The boundless love of the cross compels me always.
In His ocean of love I'll be enthralled fore'er.
SOL2_144.name: When I Consider Your Love

referenceSongs.name: Sempre que Penso no Seu Amor

GFH1_144.content:
1. For the bread and for the wine,
For the pledge that seals Him mine,
For the words of love divine,
We give Thee thanks, O Lord.

2. Only bread and only wine,
Yet to faith the solemn sign
Of the heav’nly and divine!
We give Thee thanks, O Lord.

3. For the words that turn our eye
To the cross of Calvary,
Bidding us in faith draw nigh,
We give Thee thanks, O Lord.

4. For the words that fragrance breathe
These plain symbols underneath,
Words that His own peace bequeath,
We give Thee thanks, O Lord.

5. For Thy words that tell of home,
Pointing us beyond the tomb,
“Do ye this, until I come!”
We give Thee thanks, O Lord.

6. Till He come we take the bread,
Type of Him on whom we feed,
Him who liveth and was dead!
We give Thee thanks, O Lord.

7. Till He come we take the cup;
As we at His table sup,
Eye and heart are lifted up!
We give Thee thanks, O Lord.

8. For that coming, here foreshown,
For that day to man unknown,
For the glory and the throne,
We give Thee thanks, O Lord.
GFH1_144.name: For The Bread And For The Wine

SOL1_146.content:
O' Lord, thank You 
You've brought me to Vancouver.
You know deeply what are my needs.
Under the blue sky, You appear to me,
That heals, encourages me.
Your love lights up my heart,
Makes me smile in darkness and storms.
We have love interflow in the white snow,
Leaving Your foot-prints and mine.

2. O' Lord, thank You 
You've brought me to Vancouver.
You know deeply what are my needs.
You long for me to enter Your love, desire,
And the secret of Your heart.
You want me to lay down all,
To have sweet rest in Your love.
You renew my strength, 
I'll mount up with wings,
Go from glory to glory.
SOL1_146.name: O’ Lord, Thank You You’ve Brought Me to Vancouver

referenceSongs.name: 主啊，感謝你帶領我到溫哥華
主啊，感謝祢帶領我到溫哥華

SOL2_146.content:
Hark! Ten thousand voices praising,
"Worthy is the Lamb, the Lamb of God!"
You redeemed me by Your precious blood.
Forever I will reign with You.

2. The Lamb shed His blood and died for me.
The glorious young stag came with great joy,
To see my face and to hear my voice.
He wants to live with me fore'er.

3. To show me Your love, You humbled Yourself.
From heaven, You came for Your love dream 
To live in me, fore'er heart to heart.
Lord, Your fervent love thrills my heart.

4. You're God's beloved Son, the infinite One,
But for me, You were born as a Child.
You have bridged the gap and brought me into
The depth of God's heart forever.
*(God's circle of love and joy.)*
SOL2_146.name: The Lamb of God Loved Me and Humbled Himself

referenceSongs.name: O Cordeiro de Deus me amou e se humilhou por mim

GFH1_146.content:
1. By Christ redeemed, in Christ restored,
We keep the memory adored,
And show the death of our dear Lord
Until He come.

2. His body, broken in our stead,
Is seen in this memorial bread,
And so our feeble love is fed
Until He come.

3. The drops of His dread agony,
His life-blood shed for us, we see;
The wine shall tell the mystery
Until He come.

4. Until the trump of God be heard,
Until the ancient graves be stirred,
And with the great commanding word
The Lord shall come.

5. O blessed hope! with this elate,
Let not our hearts be desolate,
But, strong in faith, in patience wait
Until He come.
GFH1_146.name: “By Christ Redeemed, In Christ Restored”

SOL1_148.content:
My dear Lord holds my hand
To walk on this glorious marathon.
He is faithful in His commission.
Step by step, He leads me to His heart.

2. My dear Lord holds my hand
To walk on this warm and joyful path.
This path of love paved with pink petals -
O' how sweet, my heart is satisfied.

3. He holds me tight to passthrough
Floods and fires, slanders, long dark valleys.
Abundant feast He lays for me.
He leads me to the abundant land.

4. Long, dark valleys are over!
He's brought forth lasting revival.
He will stretch out His mighty right hand
To finish His most beautiful will!
(A glorious bride to welcome Him back!)
Hallelujah!
SOL1_148.name: He Walks with Me through Valleys to the Land of Abundance

referenceSongs.name: 主伴我經幽谷到泉源美地
主伴我經幽谷到泉源美地
Ele caminha comigo pelos vales até a terra da abundância

SOL2_148.content:
Lord, You loved me, gave Yourself on the cross.
With Your precious blood I'm betrothed to You.
Death-daring love has melted my heart.
O' Lord, Your heart and mine are united.
Heart to heart we embrace in love fore'er.

2. Facing the cross, You saw the joy ahead:
You'll gain my heart; Your love dream will come true;
You'll meet me in the clouds and bring me home;
Enthralled in the wedding feast of the Lamb,
We'll drink in the endless river of love.
SOL2_148.name: You Betrothed Me with Your Blood

GFH1_148.content:
1. “Till He come!” O let the words
Linger on the trembling chords;
Let the “little while” between
In their golden light be seen;
Let us think how heaven and home
Lie beyond that “Till He come!”

2. When the weary ones we love
Enter on their rest above,
When their words of love and cheer
Fall no longer on our ear,
Hush! be every murmur dumb,
It is only “Till He come!”

3. Clouds and darkness round us press;
Would we have one sorrow less?
All the sharpness of the cross,
All that tells the world is loss,
Death, and darkness, and the tomb,
Pain us only “Till He come!”

4. Sweet the feast of love divine,
Broken bread and outpoured wine;
Sweet memorials, till the Lord
Call us round His heavenly board,
Some from earth, from glory some,
Severed only “Till He come!”
GFH1_148.name: Till He Come

SOL1_149.content:
The eternal dance of Abba, the Lord,
And the Spirit sweet, full of love.
They invite me and long for me to join
Their eternal dance of love.
I'm so blessed to take part in this,
To be embraced by Them all.
Daily You light fireworks,
cause all stars to dance,
Celebrate our deepest love.
(Join in our eternal dance.)
SOL1_149.name: Living in God’s Circle of Love

referenceSongs.name: Vivendo no círculo de amor de Deus

SOL2_149.content:
Were I the only sinner,
He would still come for me.
He'd endure the cross for me,
Drink the bitter cup for me.
He truly loved me,
Gave Himself for me.
His boundless personal love
Thrills and melts my heart.

2. O' my Lord's personal love stuns the whole universe.
As a seal, I'm on His heart, as a seal upon His arm.
I am my Beloved's; He desires me.
His fervent and gentle love fore'er embraces me.*

3. O' my Lord's personal love is my myrrh, my treasure.
His eternal, fervent love forever belongs to me.
A world of two surpasses all things.
When I'm in love with my Lord,
With Him, I bless the world.

O' Lord, I love You
Draw me close to You.
Make me the closest to You,
Respond to Your love.
SOL2_149.name: Stunning Personal Love

referenceSongs.name: 震撼天地、我心個人的愛
Amor Pessoal que Estremece meu Coração

SOL1_150.content:
Abba, the Lord, the Spirit
Day and night embrace me.
I'm surround'd by Abba
With His deep affection;
Embraced by the Lord
With His romantic love;
And the Spirit bore me and carries me
With tender love.
I'm so blessed, I can take part in Their
Eternal dance, enjoy deepest union.
We sing and dance fore'er.
SOL1_150.name: Living in the Embrace of Abba, the Lord and the Holy Spirit

referenceSongs.name: 活在父主聖靈的擁抱、歡樂中

GFH1_150.content:
1. “Within the Veil:” Be this, belov’d, thy portion,
Within the secret of Thy Lord to dwell;
Beholding Him, until thy face His glory,
Thy life His love, thy lips His praise shall tell.

2. “Within the Veil,” for only as thou gazest
Upon the matchless beauty of His face,
Canst thou become a living revelation
Of His great heart of love, His untold grace.

3. “Within the Veil,” His fragrance poured upon thee,
Without the Veil, that fragrance shed abroad:
“Within the Veil,” His hand shall tune the music
Which sounds on earth the praises of thy Lord.

4. “Within the Veil,” thy spirit deeply anchored,
Thou walkest calm above a world of strife:
“Within the Veil” thy soul with Him commune,
Shall live on earth His resurrection life.
GFH1_150.name: Within The Veil

SOL1_151.content:
From eternity past
when there's no beginning
To eternity which has no end,
You're thinking about me,
You've given me the best:
You gave me Your only beloved Son.
You even forsook Him on the cross.
You once suffered the greatest pain.
Your heart was pierced through
with many arrows -
I enter the holy place.

You want me to enter the depth of Your heart;
In one spirit I am joined with You -
I am Your dearest one,
You love me as the Lord.
I enjoy Your highest Father's love.
Now I taste Your deepest affection.
I'm born of You, dearest to You.
I am most glorious, the most blessed one.
You want me to be like the Lord.

Abba, You're overwhelmed with joy for me
Because You've gained
what You have long desired.
Out of Your boundless love,
You really need me most.
You truly need me the most.
Your love is wholehearted, committed.
Because You are infinite,
Your love to me is the most personal.
I give thanks to You, my Abba.
I truly affect You the most!
SOL1_151.name: The Utmost of My Abba

SOL2_151.content:
You are Jehovah - I AM WHO I AM,
Infinite, most wonderful and glorious.
Centre everywhere, You're overflowing;
Circumference nowhere, You are boundless and great.
How great! And holy! Who can compare with You?
Eternal! Infinite! You're worthy of my heart.
It's so precious Your heart is reserved for me.
I was creat'd for You. I am Your desire.
Wonderful! Beautiful is Your love to me.
I'm enthralled in this love. You hold me to Your heart.
I'm Your satisfaction, Your desire, Your love.
May You capture my heart. I'm Yours forever.
SOL2_151.name: YAH, the Infinite One’s Heart is Reserved for Me

referenceSongs.name: 永恆、無限者雅威的心底為我存留

GFH1_152.content:
1. What a Friend we have in Jesus,
All our sins and griefs to bear!
what a privilege to carry
Everything to God in pray’r!
O what peace we often forfeit,
O what needless pain we bear,
All because we do not carry
Everything to God in pray’r!

2. Have we trials and temptations?
Is there trouble anywhere?
We should never be discouraged,
Take it to the Lord in pray’r.
Can we find a friend so faithful
Who will all our sorrows share?
Jesus knows our every weakness,
Take it to the Lord in pray’r.

3. Are we weak and heavy-laden,
Cumbered with a load of care?
Precious Savior, still our refuge –
Take it to the Lord in pray’r.
Do thy friends despise, forsake thee?
Take it to the Lord in pray’r.
In His arms He’ll take and shield thee,
Thou wilt find a solace there.
GFH1_152.name: What A Friend We Have In Jesus

SOL2_153.content:
Jehovah is my true Beloved 
Boundless, self-existing.
His wholehearted and fervent love
Overflows to me fore'er.
Indeed I'm His desire.
I'm His dearest darling.

2. Jehovah is my true Beloved 
He is above all things.
His matchless love so beautiful.
We're most deeply united.
His love is my sweet rest.
His love captures my heart.

 3. Jehovah is my true Beloved 
His love is wonderful.
It's the love from the beginning 
Explained by all kinds of love.
Indeed I'm His desire.
I'm embraced by His love.
SOL2_153.name: The Flame of Love of Jehovah

SOL1_154.content:
You loved me most from eternity past.
You predestined me to be Your child.
You longed to be my dearest Abba.
You love me as Your only begotten.
I am Your dearest treasure.
You gave me to Your Son.
I'm Your greatest delight.
For me, You dance and sing.
All celebrate, and sing aloud,
"Your love dream has come true.
Your lost son has come home
To enjoy Your deep affection."
My Abba, I treasure this affection.
We're closely united in one spirit.
You hold my hand, walk to glory.
May I live in freedom and joy
As Your dearest child.
Daily enjoy family life with You.
My heart's ever close to You.
You and I, heart to heart, walk towards
The glorious eternity.
SOL1_154.name: The Eternal Love, the Deepest Affection and the Happy Family

referenceSongs.name: 無始的愛、至深親情、家庭樂

GFH1_154.content:
1. Are you weary, are you heavy-hearted?
Tell it to Jesus, Tell it to Jesus;
Are you grieving over joys departed?
Tell it to Jesus your friend.

*Refrain:
Tell it to Jesus, Tell it to Jesus,
He is a friend that’s well known;
you have no other such a friend or brother,
Tell it to Jesus your friend.*

2. Do the tears flow down your cheeks unbidden?
Tell it to Jesus, tell it to Jesus,
Have you sins that to men’s eyes are hidden?
Tell it to Jesus your friend.

*Refrain:
Tell it to Jesus, Tell it to Jesus,
He is a friend that’s well known;
you have no other such a friend or brother,
Tell it to Jesus your friend.*

3. Do you fear the gath’ring clouds of sorrow?
Tell it to Jesus, tell it to Jesus,
Are you anxious what shall be tomorrow?
Tell it to Jesus your love.

*Refrain:
Tell it to Jesus, Tell it to Jesus,
He is a friend that’s well known;
you have no other such a friend or brother,
Tell it to Jesus your friend.*

4. Are you troubled at the thought of dying?
Tell it to Jesus, tell it to Jesus,
For Christ’s coming Kingdom are you sighing?
Tell it to Jesus your love.

*Refrain:
Tell it to Jesus, Tell it to Jesus,
He is a friend that’s well known;
you have no other such a friend or brother,
Tell it to Jesus your friend.*
GFH1_154.name: Tell It To Jesus

SOL2_155.content:
In this world, there are two hearts
Closely knit'd together.
Heart to heart, deeply in love,
These two hearts are joined as one.
He and I are one,
Deepest union.
He creat'd me for Himself
To be His darling.
SOL2_155.name: A World of Two

SOL1_156.content:
Out of His love, Abba needs me most.
It is His joy to kiss me, embrace me.
My smiling face is His great delight.
For me He sings and dances,
shouts for joy.
We enjoy this affection
And our hearts feel so warm.
The past journey,
sweet memories, He treasures.
Seeing the future, we leap for joy.
We're closely united,
Hand in hand walk forward
To glory. It is so sweet.
The glory and grace
Abba saves for me
Are precious and great as
the boundless sea.
Their height and depth
can't be measured.
How blessed it is He is my dear Abba!
This deepest affection
Satisfies His heart and mine.
Long to embrace forever!
SOL1_156.name: The Heart of My Dear Abba

SOL2_156.content:
May You kiss me with kisses of Your mouth,
For Your love is better than wine.
Your oils have a pleasing fragrance.
Your name is ointment poured forth.
Lord, I love You, draw me after You.
I will run after You.
Bring me into Your chambers, 
the secret place,
I will rejoice in You.

2. Tell me, O You whom my soul loves,
Where do You pasture Your flock,
Where do You make it lie down at noon?
I want to follow You.
Most beautiful among women,
Go forth, if you do not know,
On the trail of the flock 
and feed your young goats
By the tents of the shepherds.

3. Like a lily among the thorns 
My darling among maidens.
Like an apple tree in the forest 
My beloved among young men.
With great delight, I sat in His shade.
His fruit was sweet to my taste.
He has brought me to His banquet hall.
His banner o'er me is love.

4. My Beloved is like a young stag, gazelle;
He came leaping through the mountains.
He said to me, "My beautiful one,
Arise! Come along with Me.
Winter is past, the rain is gone,
Flowers appear on the earth.
The voice of the turtledove is heard.
Arise! Come along with Me."

5. Let Me see your face and hear your voice
In the secret place of the cliff.
Let Me see your face and hear your voice
In the clefts of the rock.
For your voice is sweet to Me,
And your face is lovely.
You're My treasure, I desire you forever.
Day and night I long for you.

6. O My darling, You're so beautiful.
There is no blemish in you.
You have made My heart beat faster
With a glance of your eyes.
How much better is your love than wine,
And the fragrance of your oils.
A strand of your necklace steals My heart.
How beautiful is your love.

7. A garden enclosed is My sister,
A spring shut up, a fountain sealed.
You're a garden spring, well of freshwaters,
And streams from Lebanon.
Awake, north wind, and come, O south,
Blow upon my garden,
That the spices may blow out from my garden.
Come, my Beloved, eat its fruits.

8. My sister, My love, My perfect one,
May you open for Me,
For My head is covered with dew,
My locks the drops of the night.
Though you are weak, I know your hardship.
My love to you will not change.
You're My beloved darling. I desire you.
Quickly fly to My bosom. (I am the resurrection.)

9. The one who looks forth as the morning,
Fair as the moon, clear as the sun,
Awesome as an army with banners
Is My beautiful one!
You are lovely as Jerusalem,
As beautiful as Tirzah,
Awesome as an army with banners.
All day you capture My heart.

*Turn your eyes away from Me,
For they have overcome Me.
You are My dove, My love, My perfect one,
The only one in My heart.*

10. O My beloved, from feet to head,
You're beautiful, lovely, glorious.
The hair of your head is like purple.
I'm captured by your tresses.
O My love, how beautiful
And how delightful you are.
Let's embrace forever, heart to heart.
I always desire you!

11. Set me as a seal upon Your heart,
Like a seal upon Your arm.
For Your love is as strong as death,
Jealousy as cruel as Sheol.
Its flashes are flashes of fire,
It's the flame of Jehovah.
Waters, great waters cannot quench love.
Nothing can exchange for it.

*O, Lord, Your love has melted my heart;
I'm captured and drawn away.
I am enthralled in Your love embrace,
Live in the depth of Your heart.
Fully respond to Your love;
Fall in love with You fore'er.*
SOL2_156.name: The Lord Desires and Admires Me (Song 1-8)

referenceSongs.name: O Senhor me Deseja e Admira

GFH1_156.content:
1. Sweet hour of prayer! 
Sweet hour of prayer!
That calls me from a world of care
And bids me at my Father’s throne
Make all my wants and wishes known;
In seasons of distress and grief,
My soul has often found relief,
And oft escaped the tempter’s snare,
By thy return, sweet hour of prayer!

2. Sweet hour of prayer!
Sweet hour of prayer!
Thy wings shall my petition bear
To Him whose truth and faithfulness
Engage the waiting soul to bless;
And since He bids me seek His face,
Believe His Word, and trust His grace,
I’ll cast on Him my every care,
And wait for thee, sweet hour of prayer!

3. Sweet hour of prayer!
Sweet hour of prayer!
May I Thy consolation share,
Till, from Mount Pisgah’s lofty height,
I view my home and take my flight.
This robe of flesh I’ll drop, and rise
To seize the everlasting prize;
And should, while passing through the air,
“Farewell, farewell, sweet hour of prayer.”
GFH1_156.name: Sweet Hour Of Prayer

SOL1_158.content:
Such affection
is my treasure of the universe.
Unsearchable!
It's the greatest miracle of God.
I'm God's creation, yet I'm born of Him.
His life and my life are closely united.
The boundless God is my Abba,
I am His dearest child.

2. Such affection
is the treasure of Abba and mine.
Fatherly love is what
He and I treasure most.
For His great love He needs me most.
He enjoys embracing me and kissing me.
In Your bosom, closely we walk
Upward journey of love.
Now and ever Abba and I
Walk on the path of love.
SOL1_158.name: The Father’s Affection

GFH1_158.content:
1. Out of my bondage, sorrow, and night,
Jesus, I come! Jesus I come!
Into Thy freedom, gladness, and light,
Jesus, I come to Thee!
Out of my sickness into Thy health,
Out of my want and into Thy wealth,
Out of my sin and into Thyself,
Jesus, I come to Thee!

2. Out of my shameful failure and loss,
Jesus, I come! Jesus I come!
Into the glorious gain of Thy cross,
Jesus, I come to Thee!
Out of earth’s sorrows into Thy balm,
Out of life’s storm and into Thy calm,
Out of distress to jubilant psalm,
Jesus, I come to Thee!

3. Out of unrest and arrogant pride,
Jesus, I come! Jesus, I come!
Into Thy blessed will to abide,
Jesus, I come to Thee!
Out of torment to dwell in Thy love,
Out of despair into raptures above,
Upward for aye on wings like a dove,
Jesus, I come to Thee!

4. Out of the fear and dread of the tomb,
Jesus, I come! Jesus, I come!
Into the joy and light of Thy home,
Jesus, I come to Thee!
Out of the depths of ruin untold,
Into the peace of Thy sheltering fold,
Ever Thy glorious face to behold,
Jesus I come to Thee!
GFH1_158.name: Jesus, I Come

SOL1_160.content:
It's so precious
You are my dear Abba.
I am Your dearest child, dearest child.
What we treasure most
is this deep affection,
We enjoy this affection forever.
Sweetly You and I embrace
In this highest love.
'Tis Your sweet dream of love
through all Eternity-
Brings forth the most wonderful plan.
For You, I was creat'd,
Born again. I'm for You.
Your love, Your heart reserved for me.
How glorious!
Your love dream has now come true!
I am in Your bosom, Your beloved one,
And I'm joint heir with Christ.
With my dear Lord, I inherit all,
Sit with You on the throne!
You love me as You love the Lord!
It's my eternal sweet rest!
SOL1_160.name: The Deepest Affection

GFH1_160.content:
1. I am Thine, O Lord, I have heard Thy voice,
And it told Thy love to me;
But I long to rise in the arms of faith,
And be closer drawn to Thee.

*Refrain:
Draw me nearer, nearer, blessed Lord,
To the cross where Thou hast died;
Draw me nearer, nearer, nearer, blessed Lord,
To Thy precious, bleeding side.*

2. Consecrate me now forever to Thee
By the pow’r of grace divine;
Let my soul look up with a steadfast hope,
And my will be lost in Thine.

*Refrain:
Draw me nearer, nearer, blessed Lord,
To the cross where Thou hast died;
Draw me nearer, nearer, nearer, blessed Lord,
To Thy precious, bleeding side.*

3. O the pure delight of a single hour
That before Thy throne I spend,
When I kneel in prayer, and with Thee, my God,
I commune as friend with friend!

*Refrain:
Draw me nearer, nearer, blessed Lord,
To the cross where Thou hast died;
Draw me nearer, nearer, nearer, blessed Lord,
To Thy precious, bleeding side.*

4. There are depths of love that I cannot know
Till I cross the narrow sea;
There are heights of joy that I may not reach
Till I rest in peace with Thee.

*Refrain:
Draw me nearer, nearer, blessed Lord,
To the cross where Thou hast died;
Draw me nearer, nearer, nearer, blessed Lord,
To Thy precious, bleeding side.*
GFH1_160.name: I Am Thine, O Lord

SOL1_162.content:
I'm the dearest one in Your bosom.
You love me as You love the Lord.
My beautiful smile gladdens Your heart.
Every moment You treasure.
My Abba, You enjoy loving me.
Your hand holds my little hand.
My heart's content in this affection and love,
Rest 'nd rejoice in Your bosom.

2. Day and night You long to see my face.
You love to hear my sweet voice.
Abba, my joy is also Your joy.
You want me to enjoy all.
You meet me with Your love and Your smile.
Your gentleness makes me great.
You desire to give me infinite blessings,
Bring me into glory.

3. Abba, I treasure this deep affection
And You are my dear Abba.
Calling You "Abba"
makes my heart feel sweet.
Your bosom is my rest.
This affection precious, warm and sweet.
You make all stars dance with You.
I rejoice in Your circle of love,
And eternal dance of love.
(Dance of the Royal family!)

Daily You light fireworks,
cause all stars to dance,
Celebrate our union!
(Join in our eternal dance!)
SOL1_162.name: Rest and Rejoice in Your Bosom

referenceSongs.name: Descanso e Regozijo em Seus Braços

SOL2_162.content:
Your love to me is wholehearted,
Infinitely personal.
Your have reserved Your heart for me.
Now I know You delight in me.
Now I know Your desire for me.

2. You'll embrace me forever
With Your love from beginning.
Deathdaring love shakes heav'n and earth.
Now I know You delight in me.
Now I know Your desire for me.

3. You've longed to live in my heart,
To unite with me forev'r.
We are in love; live together.
Now I know You delight in me.
Now I know Your desire for me.

4. For You and me, You have designed
An eternal plan of love.
We have the same beautiful dream.
Now I know You delight in me.
Now I know Your desire for me.
SOL2_162.name: He Desires Me and Delights in Me the Most

GFH1_162.content:
1. Lord Jesus, Thou who only art
The endless source of purest joy.
O come and fill this longing heart;
May nought but Thee my thoughts employ.
Teach me on Thee to fix my eye,
for none but Thee can satisfy.

2. The joys of earth can never fill
The heart that’s tasted of Thy love;
No portion would I seek until
I reign with Thee, my Lord, above,
When I shall gaze upon Thy face,
And know more fully all Thy grace.

3. When from Thy radiant throne on high
Thou didst my fall and ruin see,
Thou cam’st on earth for me to die
That I might share that throne with Thee.
Loved with an everlasting love,
My hopes, my joys are all above.

4. O what is all that earth can give?
I’m called to share in God’s own joy;
Dead to the world, in Thee I live,
In Thee I’ve bliss without alloy:
Well may I earthly joys resign;
All things are mine, and I am Thine!

5. Till Thou shalt come to take me home
Be this my one ambition, Lord,
Flesh, sin, the world, to overcome.
Fast clinging to Thy faithful Word;
More of Thyself each day to know,
And more into Thine image grow.
GFH1_162.name: Lord Jesus, Thou Who Only Art

SOL1_164.content:
You sent Your Son to be a Man
To die for me on the cross,
So I can live in Your bosom.
Now I know You delight in me.

2. The veil was torn, and You dashed out,
Embraced me to Your heart.
You kissed me, rejoiced for me.
Now I know You delight in me.

3. Abba Father, You have inscribed
My name fore'er on Your palm.
I am Your beloved son.
Now I know You delight in me.

4. You meet me with Your mercy.
You help me with Your count'nace.
Your thoughts for me exceed the stars.
Now I know You delight in me.

5. You gave me to Your beloved Son
As Your most precious gift.
I am the Lord's dearest darling.
Now I know You delight in me.
SOL1_164.name: Living in the Father’s Delight

SOL2_164.content:
By You, the best is now,
For You're better than all.
I'm not ashamed when I rely on You.
By You, I will rejoice.
I once believed
The past's better than now.
And I forgot You are with me now.
Your love is surrounding me.
You're loving me, embracing me.
Your love has never changed.
For You are better than all,
By You the best is now.
SOL2_164.name: By You the Best is Now

GFH1_164.content:
1. O Love, that wilt not let me go,
I rest my weary soul in Thee;
I give Thee back the life I owe,
That in Thy ocean depths its flow
May richer, fuller be.

2. O Light that foll’west all my way,
I yield my flick’ring torch to Thee;
My heart restores its borrowed ray,
That in Thy sunshine’s blaze it’s day
May brighter, fairer be.

3. O Joy that seekest me thro’ pain,
I cannot close my heart to Thee;
I trace the rainbow thro’ the rain,
And feel the promise is not vain,
That morn shall tearless be.

4. O Cross that liftest up my head,
I dare not ask to fly from Thee;
I lay in dust life’s glory dead,
And from the ground there blossoms red,
Life that shall endless be.
GFH1_164.name: O Love, That Wilt Not Let Me Go

SOL2_165.content:
Lord, I am moved, You've chosen me.
Your personal love to me!
I am Your chosen vessel.
May I closely co-work with You 
Serve in this age by Your purpose,
Finish Your will with great glory.

2. Among thousands, Lord, You chose me,
Gave me this great commission.
Your wonderful, personal love
Touches my heart, captures my heart.

3. Lord, what can I render to You?
I'll follow You to the end.
I'll live for You, strive to the end,
Sing all the way, love You only.
SOL2_165.name: He Chose Me. He Loves Me

SOL1_166.content:
Day and night my Abba surrounds me.
He lays His hand on me.
From young to old He carries me,
Holds me on His lap.
His thoughts of love to me
Are so precious, and so tender,
More than the stars and the sand.
O' He is my dear Abba!
(I'm so blessed to have You/Him!)

2. My Abba is acquainted with
My path and my lying down.
When I smile, clap hands and shout for joy,
Abba admires me.
Day 'n night He thinks of me,
Attends to me, knows me deeply.
O' He shouts for joy for me.
I am His delight and joy.
(It's so precious I have You/Him!)

3. When I lift my head and raise my hand,
Abba looks at me sweetly.
When I think of Him and sing to Him,
Abba's heart is ravished.
Precious fatherly love!
It is Your joy to embrace me.
You are my dearest Abba.
We walk hand in hand fore'er.
SOL1_166.name: His Attention of Love

referenceSongs.name: Amor Atencioso de Dia e de Noite

SOL2_166.content:
Rejoice we'll meet 
the Lord in the clouds.
Our bodies will be 
transformed like His.
I will be with Him, 
share His glory,
Ever in Abba's house.

2. Glorious rewards 
before stage of Christ!
Jubilant wedding feast of the Lamb!
Reign with the Lord in Millennium.
Joint-heir with Christ fore'er!
SOL2_166.name: The Glorious Hope

GFH1_166.content:
1. Thou hidden love of God, whose height,
Whose depth unfathom’d no man knows,
I see from far Thy beauteous light,
Only I sigh for Thy repose;
My heart is pained, nor can it be
At rest, till it finds rest in Thee.

2. Thy secret voice invites me still
The sweetness of Thy yoke to prove;
And fain I would, but though my will
Seems fixed, yet wide my passions rove;
Yet hindrances strew all the way;
I aim at Thee, yet from Thee stray.

3. ‘Tis mercy all, that Thou hast brought
My mind to seek her peace in Thee;
Yet, while I seek amiss, from Thee
No peace my wandering soul shall see.
Oh, when shall all my wand’rings end,
And all my steps to Thee-ward tend!

4. Is there a thing beneath the sun
That strives with Thee my heart to share?
Ah! Tear it thence, and reign alone,
The Lord of every motion there.
Then shall my heart from earth be free,
When it has found repose in Thee.

5. O Lord, Thy sovereign aid impart,
To save me from low-thoughted care;
Chase this worry through all my heart
Through all its latent mazes there.
Make me Thy happiest child, that I
Ceaseless may Abba, Father, cry.

6. Each moment draw from earth away
My heart which lowly waits Thy call;
Speak to my inmost soul and say,
“I am thy love, thy God, thy all.”
To feel Thy power, to hear Thy voice,
To taste Thy love, be all my choice.
GFH1_166.name: Thou Hidden Love Of God

SOL2_167.content:
Lord, for Your love for me,
Your eternal, exquisite love,
You longed to be a Man,
Same with me in all things.
You want to take away
All the distance and fear.
You chose to come for me
To taste the life of a man.
Lord, You comfort'd my heart,
Healed me and filled me with gladness.
Lord, You want to be with me,
To live closest with me.

 2. Lord, for Your love for me,
Your eternal, exquisite love,
You longed to be a Man,
Forever live in me.
You leaped o'er the mountains.
You saw the great joy ahead.
You despised all the shame,
Endured the pain on the cross.
Now we are joined as one.
You are my Beloved forever.
I am Your dearest darling.
Forever we live in love.
Forever and ever
We relish this deepest love.
You love me; I love You,
Heart to heart forever,
Enjoy eternal love.
SOL2_167.name: Same with Me in All Things

referenceSongs.name: Todas as Coisas Igual a Mim

SOL1_168.content:
Once I was lost, away from home,
Wand'ring, grieving in sins.
Abba sent His beloved Son
To become a Man.
He's forsaken by the Father.
He drank the bitter cup.
The Lord cried,
"It's finished!" It is finished!
Forever the veil is torn!
I have a new, living way.
I enter the Holy Place,
See Abba face to face, behold His glory.
He presses me deeply into His heart.
The lost son's come home. Let's celebrate!
SOL1_168.name: Father Welcomes Me Home

referenceSongs.name: Reunião de Pai e filho, Aproveitar Juntos Alegria da Família

SOL2_169.content:
Lord, You are God, dwelling in the light which no man
Can come near. Yet You long for me.
For Your love dream, You came from heaven to the earth,
Became a Man, to draw near to me.
The Great I AM, with no beginning and no end;
And yet for me, You are a Man forever.
Because of me, You treasure to be God and Man.
I am amazed, Lord, You're no longer God only.

2. Fore'er a Man, You deeply comfort my heart.
Fore'er a Man, You explain Your great love.
I am amazed, O' Lord I affect You so much.
For Your desire, You're a Man forever.
Fore'er a Man, You're glad to give Yourself for me.
Fore'er a Man, You've proved Your love to me.
Fore'er a Man, You've declared Your full commitment.
You gladly kept the wounds of love on Your body
To confirm Your love and desire for me.
O' Lord, Your love moves me and captures my heart.
SOL2_169.name: His Zealous Heart to Me

GFH1_169.content:
1. Jesus Thy boundless love to me
No thought can reach, no tongue declare;
O knit my thankful heart to Thee,
And reign without a rival there;
Thine wholly, Thine alone, I am,
Lord, with Thy love my heart inflame.

2. O grant that nothing in my soul
May dwell, but Thy pure love alone;
Oh, may Thy love possess me whole,
My joy, my treasure, and my crown!
All coldness from my heart remove;
May ev’ry act, word, thought be love.

3. O love, how cheering is Thy ray!
All pain before Thy presence flies;
Care, anguish, sorrow, melt away
Where’er Your healing beams arise:
O Jesus, nothing may I see,
Nothing desire, or seek, but Thee.

4. In suffering be Thy love my peace;
In weakness be Thy love my power;
And when the storms of life shall cease,
Jesus, in that important hour,
In death, as life, be Thou my Guide,
And save me who for me hast died.
GFH1_169.name: Jesus, Your Boundless Love To Me

SOL1_170.content:
Parents and friends may forsake me,
You're my eternal Father!
You're Father of the fatherless.
Your eternal bosom is mine!
You carry me forever!

2. Your big hand holds my little hand.
I entrust my life to You.
You will perfect all things for me.
Abba, Your time must be the best.

3. Let me always enjoy with You
This Father-son affection,
Live in the depths of Your heart.
Abba, Your heart is satisfied.
SOL1_170.name: My Eternal Father

SOL2_171.content:
You are a Man forever.
You live with me from morn to night.
I'm not Your obligation.
But I'm Your love dream indeed,
Your yearning from eternity,
Your joy ahead, Your joy fore'er.
Lord, I'm thrilled by Your love for me.
Let me respond to You always.
Lord, Your contentment let me be.
Fore ver we are heart to heart.
SOL2_171.name: The Yearning of Love

GFH1_171.content:
1. Lord Jesus Christ we seek Thy face,
Within the veil we bow the knee;
O let Thy glory fill the place,
And bless us while we wait on Thee.

2. We thank Thee for the precious blood
That purged our sins and brought us nigh,
All cleansed and sanctified, to God,
Thy holy Name to magnify.

3. Shut in with Thee, far, far above
The restless world that wars below,
We seek to learn and prove Thy love,
Thy wisdom and Thy grace to know.

4. The brow that once with thorns was bound,
Thy hands, Thy side, we fain would see;
Draw near, Lord Jesus, glory-crowned,
And bless us while we wait on Thee.
GFH1_171.name: “Lord Jesus Christ, We Seek Thy Face”

SOL1_172.content:
I'm so precious in Your heart, O' Lord.
You do not just call me Your friend.
You want me to be Your darling.
Forever and ever
You desire me.
For me You came from heav'n.
You longed to be a Man.
My glorious Lord,
You passed through death for me.
You love me. You're willing
To die for me.
You were chastised and forsaken by God.
You bore all shame for me and gave Your life.
On the cross, You opened Your heart.
Freely I live
In Your deepest love.
SOL1_172.name: I’m so Precious in Your Heart, O’ Lord

referenceSongs.name: Senhor, que Precioso Sou no Seu Coração

SOL2_172.content:
Your choice of love moves me deeply.
You set Your love on me forever.
You chose to be a Man forever.
Your choice made You go onto the cross.
Now I live in union with You.
With greatest joy You live in me.
You chose me to be Your first love.
I share Your all forevermore.

2. Your choice of love moves me deeply.
You set Your love on me forever.
I'm Your love dream since eternity.
You chose to be a Man forever.
You are fully committed to me,
Involve Yourself eternally.
You and I dwell in deepest union.
We become one - how warm and sweet.

3. I shall love You with all my heart,
Lay aside all and overcome all.
I shall love You, follow You fore'er.
Apart from You, all are vanities.
I'm Your first love now and forever.
You'll be with me eternally.
O' Lord, may I love You only,
Follow closely, till I see Your face.

4. It is Your choice to love me fore'er.
Your flame of love has overcome all.
You're overjoyed to live in me,
Set Your banner of love on me.
O' Lord, Your love, Your glorious life,
Your heart, Your all forever are mine.
There'll be endless discoveries
In Your boundless ocean of love.
SOL2_172.name: Your Choice. Your Love

GFH1_173.name: Abide With Me

SOL1_174.content:
You are fairer than heaven,
Beyond compare on earth.
All the stars in heaven
And the flowers on earth
Speak of Your glory,
Your beauty, dream and love.
My heart treasures your journey of love.
It warms my heart.
Your desire, Your flames of love to me
Is the myst'ry of this whole universe.
O' You are the Lamb who once was slain!
Joyful young stag! You're worthy of my heart.
O' You are a glorious young stag!
My true Beloved! We enjoy our union.
SOL1_174.name: Your Love, Dream and Glory

SOL2_174.content:
In heav'n I sit with You.
How precious t'is my place,
Forever sure!
It's sweet to stay before
Abba's and Your countenance.
Now through eternity we'll never part.
In heaven live with You, abide in love.
SOL2_174.name: Gladly Sit in Heaven with the Lord

SOL2_175.content:
Though You're in heaven high,
I am on earth below,
You're in my heart.
I'm joined to You as one,
Fore'er in one spirit.
I am Yours; You are mine. We're heart to heart.

2. Though You're in heaven high,
You are closest to me in one spirit.
You've made a home in me.
Gladly I live in You.
Love interflow with You
O' such sweet bliss!
Living with You feels like spring every day.

3. Though You're in heaven high,
I am on earth below,
we're joined as one.
No distance, no hindrance,
we share the closest tie.
I'll never be lonely in this union.
We're lovers, hand in hand in unison.
SOL2_175.name: Heart to Heart

referenceSongs.name: Amor entre Céu e Terra, Corações Unido

GFH1_175.content:
1. Thou, my everlasting portion,
More than friend or life to me,
All along my pilgrim journey,
Saviour, let me walk with Thee.
Close to Thee, close to Thee,
Close to Thee, close to Thee.
All along my pilgrim journey,
Saviour, let me walk with Thee.

2. Not for ease or worldly pleasure,
Nor for fame my prayer shall be;
Gladly will I toil and suffer,
Only let me walk with Thee.
Close to Thee, close to Thee.
Close to Thee, close to Thee.
Gladly will I toil and suffer,
Only let me walk with Thee.

3. Lead me through the vale of shadows.
Bear me o’er life’s fitful sea;
Then the gate of life eternal
May I enter, Lord, with Thee;
Close to Thee, close to Thee;
Close to Thee, close to Thee.
Then the gate of life eternal
May I enter, Lord, with Thee.
GFH1_175.name: Close To Thee

SOL1_176.content:
Jehovah is Your name, You're "I am who I am".
You are "who is and who was and who is to come",
Infin'tely glorious person. Your love is personal.
I love Your wonderful name. You're my greatest treasure.

2. You self-exist infinite, wonderful, glorious,
Like a waterfall flowing; Your glory's above all.
Thru' eternity I'll have surprising discov'ries.
Your heart belongs to me. We're closely united.
(We can embrace as one.)
(Enthralled in love embrace.)
SOL1_176.name: The Infinitely Glorious Lord is Most Deeply United with Me

referenceSongs.name: 無限榮美的主與我至深聯合

SOL1_177.content:
You're boundless, self-existing.
Your glory I'm amazed.
You're the only holy One,
who can compare with You?
Only You're always with me,
love me with all Your heart.
You always attend to me.
Your love thoughts more than stars.

2. Only You have desired me
since eternity past.
Your thoughts of love towards me-
ever active and fresh.
Your love is infinitely
personal towards me.
You make all work together;
Nothing can distract You.

3. Lord, Your love never changes,
it's forever steadfast.
I forever treasure Your desire towards me.
Your joy and affection overflow like rivers.
Your fervent, beautiful love
Makes me desire, adore.
(Draws my heart towards You.)
SOL1_177.name: The Unique, Self-existing, Infinite and Incomparable Lord

referenceSongs.name: 獨一自有無限無比的主

SOL2_177.content:
*1947-1997*
Lord, I treasure 
this glorious first stage.
Your task I took, 
foundation was laid.
You carried me from 
Guizhou to Hong Kong,
And in this place, 
I was gloriously saved.
I'm captured by Your love appearing.
Your love's so sweet, 
more than words can tell.
You called, You chose, 
You commissioned me
To build the church 
after Your own heart.
Lord, I thank You for 
Your love and grace.
Your love for me moved 
and melt'd my heart.

*1968-1997*
2. Lord, You defeat'd the pow'r of darkness.
From a village, You raised this movement.
I can't forget vision of the church,
Your great presence, glorious revivals.
Your carried me through storms and fires.
Lord, by Your grace, I have conquered all.
Lord, You sent Your loved ones to all lands
To build the church after Your own heart.
This precious stage, nothing can replace.

*1997-2013*
3. You guid'd our way to the second stage,
You covered our wings with silver.
Lord, You disclosed Your heart of Beloved,
And You declared the Father's sweet name,
Rebuilt David's tabernacle 
Worship and sing to You and Abba.
You led us to life eternal.
Thank You, my Lord, for Your tender love.
This precious stage nothing can replace.

*2013 - the Lord's coming*
4. We walk with joy onto the third stage,
Run together this final journey.
We're heart to heart, 
build the church He desires,
Fulfill His dream, complete the Lord's will.
He will come back to receive His bride
To live with Him sweet eternity.
O' Lord, keep me till I see Your face.

5. Brothers, sisters, arise with joy.
May you walk on this glorious journey:
Live out His will, with Abba and the Lord,
March on with Him and fight the good fight.
Let's offer Him what He's long desired.
For Him, we'll write the glorious last page.
With our dear Lord, we'll make sweet memories.
SOL2_177.name: Our Three Stages—Take up the Task, Finish His Will

referenceSongs.name: 肩負、完成主託付、愛願的三程

GFH1_177.content:
1. Jesus! I am resting, resting,
In the joy of what Thou art;
I am finding out the greatness
Of Thy loving heart.
Thou hast bid me gaze upon Thee,
And Thy beauty fills my soul,
For by Thy transforming power,
Thou hast made me whole

*Refrain:
Jesus! I am resting, resting,
In the joy of what Thou art;
I am finding out the greatness
Of Thy loving heart.*

2. Oh, how great Thy loving-kindness,
Vaster, broader than the sea;
Oh, how marvelous Thy goodness,
Lavished all on me!
Yes, I rest in Thee, Beloved.
Know what wealth of grace is Thine,
Know Thy certainty of promise,
And have made it mine.

*Refrain:
Jesus! I am resting, resting,
In the joy of what Thou art;
I am finding out the greatness
Of Thy loving heart.*

3. Simply trusting Thee, Lord Jesus,
I behold Thee as thou art,
And Thy love, so pure, so changeless,
Satisfies my heart –
Satisfies its deepest longings,
Meets, supplies its every need,
Compasseth me round with blessings,
Thine is love indeed.

*Refrain:
Jesus! I am resting, resting,
In the joy of what Thou art;
I am finding out the greatness
Of Thy loving heart.*

4. Ever lift Thy face upon me,
As I work and wait for Thee,
Resting ‘neath Thy smile, Lord Jesus,
Earth’s dark shadows flee.
Brightness of my Father’s glory,
Sunshine of my Father’s face,
Keep me ever trusting, resting,
Fill me with They grace.

*Refrain:
Jesus! I am resting, resting,
In the joy of what Thou art;
I am finding out the greatness
Of Thy loving heart.*
GFH1_177.name: Jesus! I Am Resting, Resting

SOL1_178.content:
Lord, You're the infinite God, attend fully to me.
Lord, Your beautiful love is the most personal.
O Lord, I love You. You're my treasure.
I cherish Your true love. It's beyond measure.

2. Infinitely personal is Your love to me.
Your wholehearted, committ'd love
Draws me and captures my heart.
O' Lord, I love You. You're my treasure.
In heav'n, on earth there's no one who can compare to You.

(Lord, You desire me! You long for me.
Your ever o'erflowing love how can I deny?)
SOL1_178.name: Infinitely Personal Love

referenceSongs.name: 無限個人性的情愛、真情

SOL1_179.content:
The love of the Son of God -
Is from eternity past.
I'm in His dream of love.
I'm His secret of love!
'Tis the love of God!
He's longed for this union.
In one spirit,
joined heart to heart as one,
In love with Him!
He and I walk on this path of love
With pink petals, in the river of love.
He is God! His love of true Beloved-
Beyond compare! Embrace me to His heart.
(I rest in His bosom.)
SOL1_179.name: The Love of the Son of God

GFH1_179.content:
1. I love to tell the story
Of unseen things above;
Of Jesus and His glory,
Of Jesus and His love,
I love to tell the story
Because I know’tis true;
It satisfies my longings
As nothing else can do.

*Refrain:
I love to tell the story,
“Twill be my theme in glory,
To tell the old, old story
Of Jesus and His love.*

2. I love to tell the story,
More wonderful it seems
Than all the golden fancies
Of all our golden dreams.
I love to tell the story,
It did so much for me;
And that is just the reason
I tell it now to thee.

*Refrain:
I love to tell the story,
“Twill be my theme in glory,
To tell the old, old story
Of Jesus and His love.*

3. I love to tell the story,
“Tis pleasant to repeat
What seems, each time I tell it,
More wonderfully sweet.
I love to tell the story,
For some have never heart
The message of salvation
From God’s own Holy Word.

*Refrain:
I love to tell the story,
“Twill be my theme in glory,
To tell the old, old story
Of Jesus and His love.*

4. I love to tell the story,
For those who know it best
Seem hungering and thirsting
To hear it like the rest.
And when, in scenes of glory,
I sing the new, new song,
“Twill be the old, old story
That I have loved so long.

*Refrain:
I love to tell the story,
“Twill be my theme in glory,
To tell the old, old story
Of Jesus and His love.*
GFH1_179.name: I Love To Tell The Story

SOL1_180.content:
O' Lord, Your life, 
Your affection and joy
Is like an ever rushing falls.
Ever overflows, overwhelms my heart.
Now I can drink from Your river of joy.
Day'n night You attend to me,
Gazing with Your longing.
Your love's full of passion, 
romance, and beauty,
The very flame of Jehovah.
Your reaction is like volcanic eruption.
Your thoughts of love are more than stars.
For me You shout for joy; You sing and dance.
You delight in me, You desire me.
You meet me with loving kindness.
You in my life, infinite bliss and joy.
In the depth of Your heart,
I enjoy living in love with You.
I feel satisfied and warm.
(My heart ever overflows.)
SOL1_180.name: The Deepest Affection of the Son of God. His River of Joy

referenceSongs.name: 神兒子的情感、喜樂的江河

SOL1_182.content:
To live in me is Your deepest desire.
Facing the cross, You sweetly thought of this.
The Spirit came, You gladly live in me.
Sweetest union You're with me forever.

2. To live in me is Your eternal dream.
You creat'd me to be closest to You.
Living union! My life's bound up in Yours.
Union of love we're ever heart to heart.
(Deepest union - our hearts are satisfied.)

3. Now is better - You're forever in me.
Glory upon glory, You are my life.
Deepest union surpasses all things.
One day You'll come. I'll see you face to face.
SOL1_182.name: To Live in Me

SOL2_182.content:
I have a dream heavenly vision.
Others have doubts, 
envy and disbelief.
Through the long, dark valley
He lit up my path.
He set me free 
from the dark dungeon.
We prosper in the land of affliction.
Glory and joy wipe away all our tears.
His dream and mine, 
glorious commission!
We will never forget!

2. He is the first; He is the last.
He gives me faith; 
He'll take care till the end.
I overflow with hope,
Singing all the way,
Same mind with Him, 
anchor the race of faith.
'Tis His glorious 
commission of this age.
What an honour to closely follow Him!
*Through suffering enter glory.
Joyfully I'll finish His will.*

3. Long, dark valley is over.
He will stretch out His mighty arm for us!
We passed through floods and fires
To the fruitful land.
Valleys of tears turned into springs of joy.
We prosper in the land of affliction.
Glory and joy wipe away all our tears.

His dream and mine, 
glorious commission,
Will soon be accomplished.
Glory and joy ever-increasing
Until we meet one day in the cloud.
The vict'ry won, my Lord, You will come!
O' my Beloved, may You come quickly!
SOL2_182.name: March Forward to a Glorious Journey

referenceSongs.name: 出離幽谷邁向榮美一程
Marche Adiante para a Jornada Gloriosa

GFH1_182.content:
1. To the regions beyond 
I must go, I must go,
Where the story has never been told;
To the millions 
that never have heart of His love,
I must tell the sweet story of old.

*Refrain:
To the regions beyond,
I must go, I must go,
Till the world, all the world,
His salvation shall know.*

2. To the hardest of places
He calls me to go,
Not thinking of comfort or ease;
The world may pronounce me a dreamer, a fool,
Enough if the Master I please.

*Refrain:
To the regions beyond,
I must go, I must go,
Till the world, all the world,
His salvation shall know.*

3. Oh, ye that are spending
you leisure and pow’rs
In pleasures so foolish and fond;
Awake from your selfishness, folly and sin,
And go to the regions beyond.

*Refrain:
To the regions beyond,
I must go, I must go,
Till the world, all the world,
His salvation shall know.*

4. There are other “lost sheep”
that the Master must bring,
And they must the message be told;
He sends me to gather them out of all lands,
And welcome them back to His fold.

*Refrain:
To the regions beyond,
I must go, I must go,
Till the world, all the world,
His salvation shall know.*
GFH1_182.name: The Regions Beyond

SOL1_183.content:
I appear in Your love.
I'll stay in Your love forever.
I exist because of You.
Your heart has long been reserved for me.
I've been on Your mind
Ever since eternity past.
Eternity is ours -
Rejoice in our embrace of love.
Walk on the path of endless love.
You have dreamed of me since eternity past.
Forever we will live in love,
The endless dream!
SOL1_183.name: I’m for You, Your Heart is Reserved for Me

referenceSongs.name: 我為你而有，你心底為我存留

SOL1_184.content:
The song of songs reveals Your heart,
So I can enjoy Your heart.
You lead me to inner chambers.
Now I know You delight in me.

2. I have captured Your heart and sight.
I'm Your lily among thorns.
Your banner o'er me is love.
Now I know You delight in me.

3. Forever, Lord, You are a Man.
You came leaping on mountains
To see my face and hear my voice.
Now I know You delight in me.

4. Abba prepares a wedding feast,
Gives me to You as "beloved".
I'm Your greatest treasure and joy.
Now I know You delight in me.

5. You praise me, "You are all fair,
No blemish, capture My heart."
I satisfy You the most.
Now I know You delight in me.

6. My eyes have overcome You
I've captured Your heart and sight.
I'm Your only perfect one.
Now I know You delight in me.

7. From feet to head You praise me
I am Your delight and joy,
Capture Your heart. You desire me.
Now I know You delight in me.

8. May we embrace forever.
Your heart is reserved for me.
I was creat'd to satisfy
Now I know You delight in me.

9. I'm set as a seal on Your heart,
As a seal upon Your arm.
The flames of love is strong as death.
Now I know You delight in me.
SOL1_184.name: His Delight and Desire

referenceSongs.name: 喜悅、戀慕之情（主至喜悅、戀慕我）

GFH1_184.content:
1. Tho’ your sins be as scarlet,
They shall be as white as snow;
Tho’ your sins be as scarlet,
They shall be as white as snow;
Tho’ they be red like crimson,
They shall be as wool!
Tho’ your sins be as scarlet,
Tho’ your sins be as scarlet,
They shall be as white as snow,
They shall be as white as snow.

2. Hear the voice that entreats you,
O return ye unto God!
Hear the voice that entreats you,
O return ye unto God!
He is of great compassion,
And of wondrous love;
Hear the voice that entreats you,
Hear the voice that entreats you,
O return ye unto God!
O return ye unto God!

3. He’ll forgive your transgressions,
And remember them no more;
He’ll forgive you transgressions,
And remember them no more;
“Look unto me, and be ye saved.”
Saith the Lord your God!
He’ll forgive your transgressions,
He’ll forgive your transgressions,
And remember them no more,
And remember them no more.
GFH1_184.name: Though Your Sins Be As Scarlet

SOL2_185.content:
When I think of the day the Lord will crown me,
Many rewards I'll gain at Stage of Christ.
Light affliction is for my glory.
Eternal, far beyond compare.
My heart's lightened, from strength to strength.
My labour in the Lord's not in vain.
Now I am strong; my heart's gladdened.
You understand; You admire me.
My burden's light, I can smile again.
To live for You not in vain.
My rewards I desire to gain,
Despise all trials, run the race ahead.
Striving forward, press on toward the goal.

See the clouds in the sky. Hear now heaven's applause.
I will pour out all my life for the Lord.
Strive till I rest in His bosom
Or see Him face to face in the clouds.
No more tears, nor death, nor sorrow, nor crying.
What priceless treasure to live for the Lord.
Sweet memories last forever.
What a joy to lay my crowns before Your feet.
Render my all to You for Your true love,
For Your most amazing love to me.
SOL2_185.name: The Day the Lord Will Crown Me

referenceSongs.name: Quando penso no dia que o Senhor me coroar (recompensar)

GFH1_186.content:
1. If I gained the world, but not the Savior,
Were my life worth living for a day?
Could my yearning heart find rest and comfort
In the things that soon must pass away?
If I gained the world, but not the Savior,
Would my gain be worth the life-long strife?
Are all earthly pleasures worth comparing
For a moment with a Christ-filled life?

2. Had I wealth and love in fullest measure,
And a name revered both far and near,
Yet no hope beyond, no harbor waiting,
Where my storm-tossed vessel I could steer;
If I gained the world, but not the Savior,
Who endured the cross and died for me,
Could then all the world afford a refuge,
Whither, in my anguish, I might flee.

3. O what emptiness – Without the Savior
‘Mid the sins and sorrows here below!
And eternity, how dark without Him!
Only night and tears and endless woe!
What, tho’ I might life without the Savior,
When I come to die, how would it be?
O to face the valley’s gloom without Him!
And with Him all eternity!

4. O the joy of having all in Jesus!
What a balm the broken heart to heal!
Ne’er a sin so great, but He’ll forgive it,
Nor a sorrow that He does not feel!
If I have but Jesus, only Jesus –
Nothing else in all the world beside –
O then ev’rything is mine in Jesus;
For my needs and more He will provide.
GFH1_186.name: If I Gained The World

SOL1_187.content:
You leaped with joy, came as a child.
You saw the joy ahead,
Despised all shame, endured the cross.
Now I know You delight in me.

2. Your personal love towards me
Made You give Yourself for me.
Your desire, Your flame of love,
Now I know You delight in me.

3. Your eternal dream of love is
To live fore'er in my heart.
My heart is Your favourite dwelling.
Now I know You delight in me.

4. How can I not respond to You?
I long to love You only,
Day and night draw near to You.
O' Lord Jesus, may You come soon.
SOL1_187.name: Living in the Lord’s Delight

SOL2_187.content:
Face to face, face to face,
Your love dream come true!
Face to face, face to face,
Our hearts satisfied!
Face to face, together,
We'll live forever!
Face to face, we will share
Love eternity!
Sweet eternity!
SOL2_187.name: Face to Face

SOL1_188.content:
Day and night, think of me,
desire me, dear Lord,
You always attend to me.
You long to see my face,
hear my voice, dear Lord,
Sweetly and closely live with me.
Since eternity You have loved me, dear Lord,
Unchanging, o'erflowing, ever fresh.
Living in the depth of
Your heart and embrace,
I feel so sweet. My heart o'erflows.

2. Fully You involve Yourself in my life, Lord,
Now and through all eternity.
Forever live with You, in love with You, Lord,
Nothing can compare my joy.
Now I live in Your love and desire, dear Lord,
My heart's satisfied, overflowing.
With all my heart I'll respond to You, dear Lord.
Forever we embrace in love.
SOL1_188.name: Your Desire and Gazing Day and Night

referenceSongs.name: Seu Desejo e Olhar de Dia e Noite

SOL2_188.content:
From everlasting to everlasting,
I'm Your deepest desire, sweet dream of love.
For me You became a man forever.
You gladly chose to be the Son of Man.
Lord, for me You were hung on the tree.
O' Your love for me stuns the universe.
You longed to closely unite with me.
Hand in hand we walk on this path of love.
Together we will share this love eternity.
I am Your first love, eternal love.
I've captured Your heart; You love me fore'er
Please quickly return, O' my Beloved.
Full of romance we'll meet in the clouds.
Fly to the place You have prepared for me.
Fly to the place You have prepared for us.
New Jerusalem! New Jerusalem!
SOL2_188.name: I am Your Sweet Love Dream

referenceSongs.name: Eu sou o Seu doce Sonho de Amor

GFH1_189.content:
1. Softly and tenderly Jesus is calling,
Calling for you and for me;
See, on the portals, He’s waiting and watching,
Watching for you and for me.

*Refrain:
Come home, Come home,
Ye who are weary come home;
Earnestly, tenderly, Jesus is calling,
Calling, O sinner, come home!*

2. Why should we tarry when
Jesus is pleading –
Pleading for you and for me?
Why should we linger and heed not His mercies –
Mercies for you and for me?

*Refrain:
Come home, Come home,
Ye who are weary come home;
Earnestly, tenderly, Jesus is calling,
Calling, O sinner, come home!*

3. Time is now fleeting,
the moments are passing –
Passing from you and from me;
Shadows are gathering, death-beds are coming –
Coming for you and for me!

*Refrain:
Come home, Come home,
Ye who are weary come home;
Earnestly, tenderly, Jesus is calling,
Calling, O sinner, come home!*

4. Oh, for the wonderful love
He has promised –
Promised for you and for me!
